1001405473.english: Since the genes are mixed, it's possible but...&nof course nothing comes out now! From the start, that's...&nMaster? That look in your eyes... n-no, stop!&nMuch earlier than the future schedule...&nNo... it'll ruin the entire plan...!
1001405473.korean: 소 유전자가 섞여서 가능성은 있지만...&n지금은 당연히 안 나옵니다! 애초에 그건...&n주인님? 눈빛이... 아, 안 됩니다!&n미래 계획표보다 훨씬 이른...&n안 돼요... 계획이 전부 엉망이 돼버려요...​

1001405474.english: Even though we go on dates every time, it's always fun!&nIt excites me and makes me look forward to it, just like the first time.&nWhere shall we go today? Of course,&nas long as I'm with you, Commander, it'll be fun no matter what!
1001405474.korean: 매번 하는 데이트지만 언제나 즐겁네요!&n처음처럼 설레고 기대돼요.&n오늘은 어디로 갈까요? 물론 사령관님과&n함께라면 뭘 해도 즐겁겠지만요!​

1001405475.english: I am proud to be Spartoia.&nAnd even more proud that the Boss loves me.&nBattle, space, and... love.&nWhatever it is, leave it to me, Boss!
1001405475.korean: 나는 내가 스파토이아라는 것이 자랑스러워.&n그리고 그 이상으로 대장이 나를 좋아해 주는&n것이 자랑스러워. 전투면 전투, 우주면 우주&n그리고...사랑이면 사랑. 어느 것이든 맡겨줘, 대장!​

1001405476.english: I'm drafting a future schedule.&nAt least the small plans, I should be the one to prepare.&n...A childcare plan?! Well, I... did make one, but...&nN-no! I can't show you that! Ugh...
1001405476.korean: 미래 계획표를 작성 중입니다.&n사소한 계획 정도는 제가 세워야죠.&n...육아 계획표요?! 그게... 만들긴, 했습니다만...&n아, 안 돼요! 보여드릴 수 없습니다! 으으...​

1001405477.english: In the past, I didn't want to wake up because the thought of going to work would come to mind as soon as I opened my eyes. But these days, since the Commander is the first person I see... I look forward to the morning. ...I'm sleeping in the Commander's bed today.
1001405477.korean: 예전엔 눈을 뜨면 출근이 생각나서 깨기&n싫었는데. 요새는 사령관님이 가장 먼저&n보이니까... 아침이 기대돼요.&n...오늘은 사령관님 침대에서 자요.​

1001405478.english: Busy, Commander? Schedule planning? I'll take care of that for you! Everyone's been tired lately, so if I let everyone rest... come to think of it, it's fine? Great! Then you'll stay with me now, right?
1001405478.korean: 바빠, 사령관? 일정 계획? 그 정도야&n내가 대신해줄게! 요새 다들 피곤했으니&n전부 쉬게 하면... 생각해 보니 괜찮다구?&n좋아! 그럼 이제 나랑 같이 있어줄 거지?​

1001405479.english: Want to grab a quick drink after work? We do have non-alcoholic beer, but since we're both off tomorrow for the first time in a while... I mean, um... you know what I'm trying to say, right...?
1001405479.korean: 업무 끝나고 가볍게 한잔하실래요?&n무알코올 맥주도 있긴 하지만&n모처럼 내일 둘 다 휴가니까... 그러니까, 으음...&n제가 무슨 말을 하고 싶은 건지 아시죠...?​

1001405480.english: Did you hear? An artist named Nostrahaus said the world is going to end today! There were so many things I wanted to do... It's all over now! It's not going to end? Really? Since the Commander said it, it must be right. That's a relief!
1001405480.korean: 들었어? 노스트라하우스라는 예술가가&n오늘 지구가 멸망할 거라 했대!&n해보고 싶었던 거 많은데... 전부 끝이야~!&n멸망 안 해? 정말? 사령관이 한 말이니까&n맞겠지. 다행이네!​

1001405481.english: The only time I can take the lead is when you're playing, Commander~ Usually, I just struggle... Alright, it's started. You need to focus on the game, right?
1001405481.korean: 제가 주도권을 잡을 수 있는 건&n사령관님이 게임하실 때 뿐이잖아요~&n평소에는 허덕이기만 하니까...&n자, 시작했어요. 게임... 집중 하셔야죠?​

1001405482.english: I got really scolded by the kids yesterday. They said I couldn't explain things properly. But… how can I explain a real-life situation in words! All I know is that my mind goes completely blank...
1001405482.korean: 어제 애들한테 엄청 혼났어.&n설명을 제대로 못한다고. 하지만…&n실전을 어떻게 말로 설명해!&n머릿속이 새하얘진다는 것밖에 모르겠는걸...​

1001405483.english: In the past, I didn't want to wake up because the thought of going to work would come to mind as soon as I opened my eyes. But these days, since the Commander is the first person I see... I look forward to the morning. ...I'm sleeping in the Commander's bed today.
1001405483.korean: 예전엔 눈을 뜨면 출근이 생각나서 깨기&n싫었는데. 요새는 사령관님이 가장 먼저&n보이니까... 아침이 기대돼요.&n...오늘은 사령관님 침대에서 자요.​

1001405484.english: Busy, Commander? Schedule planning? I'll take care of that for you! Everyone's been tired lately, so if I let everyone rest... come to think of it, it's fine? Great! Then you'll stay with me now, right?
1001405484.korean: 바빠, 사령관? 일정 계획? 그 정도야&n내가 대신해줄게! 요새 다들 피곤했으니&n전부 쉬게 하면... 생각해 보니 괜찮다구?&n좋아! 그럼 이제 나랑 같이 있어줄 거지?​

1001405485.english: Want to grab a quick drink after work? We do have non-alcoholic beer, but since we're both off tomorrow for the first time in a while... I mean, um... you know what I'm trying to say, right...?
1001405485.korean: 업무 끝나고 가볍게 한잔하실래요?&n무알코올 맥주도 있긴 하지만&n모처럼 내일 둘 다 휴가니까... 그러니까, 으음...&n제가 무슨 말을 하고 싶은 건지 아시죠...?​

1001405486.english: Did you hear? An artist named Nostrahaus said the world is going to end today! There were so many things I wanted to do... It's all over now! It's not going to end? Really? Since the Commander said it, it must be right. That's a relief!
1001405486.korean: 들었어? 노스트라하우스라는 예술가가&n오늘 지구가 멸망할 거라 했대!&n해보고 싶었던 거 많은데... 전부 끝이야~!&n멸망 안 해? 정말? 사령관이 한 말이니까&n맞겠지. 다행이네!​

1001405487.english: The only time I can take the lead is when you're playing, Commander~ Usually, I just struggle... Alright, it's started. You need to focus on the game, right?
1001405487.korean: 제가 주도권을 잡을 수 있는 건&n사령관님이 게임하실 때 뿐이잖아요~&n평소에는 허덕이기만 하니까...&n자, 시작했어요. 게임... 집중 하셔야죠?​

1001405488.english: I got really scolded by the kids yesterday. They said I couldn't explain things properly. But… how can I explain a real-life situation in words! All I know is that my mind goes completely blank...
1001405488.korean: 어제 애들한테 엄청 혼났어.&n설명을 제대로 못한다고. 하지만…&n실전을 어떻게 말로 설명해!&n머릿속이 새하얘진다는 것밖에 모르겠는걸...​

1001405489.english: Hehehe, maybe because I've gotten used to it, it's a bit overwhelming, but it doesn't hurt. Rather, I guess you could say I'm getting more addicted to that feeling... Maybe that's how it feels...?
1001405489.korean: 에헤헤, 익숙해져서 그런지 조금 버겁기는&n하지만 아픈 건 아니에요. 오히려 그 느낌에&n더 중독된다고 해야 할까... 그런 느낌일지도...?​

1001405490.english: Um... does it really have to be now? I can't forget what happened yesterday... I'll keep wishing for it over and over again, is that okay? ...Yeah! Then, here...
1001405490.korean: 저기... 꼭 지금이어야 돼?&n어제 일이 안 잊혀져서...&n내가 계속계속 바랄 텐데, 괜찮아?&n...응! 그럼, 자...​

1001405491.english: Ehehe, maybe because I've gotten used to it, it feels a little overwhelming…&nBut it doesn't hurt. If anything, I'd say I've gotten addicted to that feeling...&nMaybe that's it...?
1001405491.korean: 에헤헤, 익숙해져서 그런지 조금 버겁기는&n하지만 아픈 건 아니에요. 오히려 그 느낌에&n더 중독된다고 해야 할까... 그런 느낌일지도...?​

1001405492.english: Hey... does it really have to be now?&nI can't forget what happened yesterday…&nI'll keep wanting it again and again, is that okay?&n...Mm! Then, come on...
1001405492.korean: 저기... 꼭 지금이어야 돼?&n어제 일이 안 잊혀져서...&n내가 계속계속 바랄 텐데, 괜찮아?&n...응! 그럼, 자...​

1001405493.english: This outfit? It’s the one I wore a while ago when I was helping out at the Elven Ranch. What do you think, Master? Do you like it? If you do, I’m happy too.
1001405493.korean: 이 옷이요? 얼마 전에 엘븐 목장의 일을&n도와줄 때 입었던 옷이랍니다.&n어떠신가요, 주인님? 마음에 드시나요?&n마음에 드신다면 저도 기뻐요.​

1001405494.english: They say the special wavelength of my voice shakes the audience's hearts. They claim it's thanks to genetic engineering, not superpowers or magic... but who cares! As long as I can give the fans a perfect performance, that's all that matters. What's the next training, Producer?
1001405494.korean: 내 목소리의 특별한 파장이 관객들의 마음을&n뒤흔든대. 초능력이나 마법이 아니라 유전 공학&n덕이라는데... 아무렴 어때! 팬들에게 완벽한&n공연만 선보일 수 있으면 됐지.&n다음 트레이닝은 뭐야, 프로듀서?​

1001405495.english: I am the embodiment of battle and destruction...! Right, that is— Stop! I am not Happy!
1001405495.korean: 이 몸은 전투와 파괴의 화신...! 그래, 바로-&n그만! 이 몸은 해피가 아니다!​

1001405496.english: No matter how much you like my voice, aren't you asking me too often? I'm a little shy about it, too... Okay, I'll tell you once a day. I love you, Producer.
1001405496.korean: 아무리 내 목소리를 좋아해도 너무 자주&n부탁하는 거 아냐? 나도 좀 쑥스러운데...&n알았어, 하루에 한번씩은 말해줄게.&n사랑해, 프로듀서.​

1001405497.english: The reason I want to become a hero is simple. Because I can be a source of strength for others. I used to say I would become a hero thanks to the Commander... but now, I will become the Commander's hero with my own strength.
1001405497.korean: 영웅이 되고 싶은 이유는 단순해.&n다른 사람의 힘이 될 수 있으니까. 예전엔 사령관&n덕분에 히어로가 될 거라 얘기했지만...&n이젠 내 힘으로 사령관만의 히어로가 되겠어.

1001405498.english: What would I have done if I hadn't been a firefighter? I think being a PE teacher would have suited me well, right? Well, I suppose no matter what job I had, the fact that I would have ended up with the Commander wouldn't have changed.
1001405498.korean: 내가 소방관이 아니었다면 뭘 했을까.&n체육교사도 잘 맞을 것 같은데, 그치?&n뭐, 어떤 직업을 가져도 사령관이랑 맺어지는 건&n변하지 않았겠지만.​

1001405499.english: Lately, Poi gets wary whenever she sees me. It gets even worse when she looks at my chest. I wonder why. Does she want to be held? I would hug her as much as she wants if she just asked.
1001405499.korean: 포이가 요즘 저만 보면 경계하더라고요.&n제 가슴을 보면 더욱 심하게요.&n왜 그런 걸까요? 안기고 싶은 걸까요?&n말만 하면 얼마든지 안아줄 텐데.​

1001405500.english: Even when I'm resting, I love meeting fans outside. Singing right there, holding fan meetings... just imagining it gives me strength. The fans' interest and affection are the driving force that moves me!
1001405500.korean: 쉴 때도 밖에서 팬들 만나는 게 좋아.&n그 자리에서 노래도 하고, 팬미팅도 갖고...&n상상만 해도 힘이 나네.&n팬들의 관심과 애정이 날 움직이는 원동력이야!​

1001405501.english: Master! The Spider Woman looked down on me again! If this were my main body without a safety mechanism, she wouldn't have dared to look up...! Order me to attack, right now! Hurry...! ...Give it to me quickly.
1001405501.korean: 주인! 거미녀가 또 이 몸을 깔봤다!&n안전장치가 없는 본체였다면 감히&n올려다보지도 못 했을 것이...!&n이 몸에게 공격 명령을 내려라, 당장! 어서...!&n...빨리 내려줘.​

1001405502.english: Ah~ I'm so happy... Interacting with the fans is fun, but being held in the producer's arms is also healing... Hmm~ Should I stay like this all day? I really need to get a good rest once in a while.
1001405502.korean: 아~ 행복해... 팬들과의 교류도 즐겁지만,&n프로듀서 품에 안겨 있는 것도 힐링되네...&n흐음~ 하루 종일 이대로 있을까?&n가끔씩은 푹 쉬어야지.​

1001405503.english: Want to watch a fun superhero movie together? It's famous, so I'm sure you've heard of it, Commander. The one where the hero is hanging upside down on a rainy day... and... uh, the heroine... um...! Kissing like this!
1001405503.korean: 재밌는 히어로 영화 같이 볼래?&n유명해서 사령관도 들어봤을 거야.&n비 오는 날 히어로가 거꾸로 매달려서...&n그, 여주인공이랑... 으음...! 이렇게 키스하는 거!

1001405504.english: Snacks? Hmm... later. I have a calendar shoot coming up soon, so I'm working on my body. It's not that I lack confidence in my figure, but since the Commander will be seeing it, I need to take better care of it. Aren't you looking forward to it?
1001405504.korean: 간식? 음... 나중에. 곧 달력 촬영해야 돼서&n몸관리 중이거든. 몸매에 자신 없는 건&n아니지만 사령관이 볼 거니까 더 가꿔놔야지.&n기대되지 않아?​

1001405505.english: What? What am I holding? Hehe, it’s a tool called a baby bottle, used to feed babies formula, water, or breast milk. What? You’re asking why I’m holding this when there are no babies in Orca? Hehe, do you think?
1001405505.korean: 네? 제가 들고 있는 거요? 후후, 아기들에게&n분유나 물 혹은 모유 같은 것을 먹이기 위한&n젖병이라는 도구랍니다. 네? 오르카에는 아기가&n없는데 왜 이걸 들고 있냐고요? 후후, 왤까요?​

1001405506.english: Producer, look at this! The fans gave me tons of gifts. I'll read the handwritten letters before I go to bed, and as for the food... I guess I'll have to eat non-stop. Huh? It's okay, I'll just eat by myself. The fans prepared this for me, after all?
1001405506.korean: 프로듀서, 이것 봐봐! 팬들이 선물 잔뜩 줬어.&n손편지는 자기 전에 읽고, 먹을 건...&n쉬지 않고 먹어야겠네. 응? 괜찮아, 혼자서&n먹어야지. 팬들이 나를 위해 준비해 준 거잖아?​

1001405507.english: Is this squishy and sticky thing cake...? I wonder why female bioroids like things like this... I'll give it a try, but... Master! Offer me more cake. Hurry!
1001405507.korean: 물컹거리고 끈적거리는 이게 케이크...?&n바이오로이드 암컷들은 왜 이런 걸&n좋아하는지... 씹어보긴 하겠다만, 음...&n주인! 내게 더 많은 케이크를 바쳐라. 어서!​

1001405508.english: My dream of putting on the best performance remains the same. That is the only way to repay the fans' love. Once I achieve my dream, I’ll happily run up to the producer~ You have to welcome me then!
1001405508.korean: 최고의 무대를 선보이겠다는 꿈은 여전해.&n팬들의 사랑에 보답할 방법은 그게 전부니까.&n꿈을 이루고 나면 기뻐하면서 프로듀서한테&n뛰어들어야지~ 그땐 잘 받아줘야 돼!​

1001405509.english: I'm canceling our offer to be heroes together. It might be fun to hang out together, but I realized it would be troublesome if villains targeted what is most precious to us. So stay safe, Commander. I'll protect you!
1001405509.korean: 같이 히어로 활동하자던 거 취소할래.&n같이 다니면 즐거울진 몰라도, 악당들이 가장&n소중한 걸 노리면 곤란하겠더라구. 그러니까&n안전한 곳에 있어, 사령관. 내가 지켜줄게!​

1001405510.english: I'm here! You did call for me, right? Did you miss me a lot? Huh...? It's just a slight scratch. It heals with just some saliva... Commander?! It's fine, but you put that in your mouth... Ugh... Wait, just a moment! I'll go clear my head and be back.
1001405510.korean: 나 왔어! 호출한 거 맞지, 나 많이 보고 싶었어?&n응...? 살짝 긁힌 것뿐이야. 침만 발라도 나으니...&n사령관?! 괜찮은데, 그걸 입에... 으...&n자, 잠깐만! 나 머리 좀 식히고 다시 올게.​

1001405511.english: Never take your eyes off Master, never let your guard down, never… fall… in love. What? Ah… it’s nothing, Master.
1001405511.korean: 절대 주인님에게서 눈을 떼지 말 것,&n절대 경호를 풀지 말 것,&n절대… 사랑에… 빠지지 말 것.&n네? 아… 아무것도 아니랍니다, 주인님.​

1001405512.english: A composer named Muse... The songs this person makes are special. They must be just as passionate about music as I am. I’ve really wanted to meet them— Are you here!? Really? Hurry up and introduce me, Producer!
1001405512.korean: 뮤즈라는 작곡가... 이 사람이 만든 노래는&n특별해. 나만큼 노래에 진심인 사람이겠지.&n꼭 한번 만나보고 싶었- 여기에 있어!?&n정말? 빨리 소개해줘, 프로듀서!​

1001405513.english: I am the embodiment of battle and destruction...! Right, that is— Stop! I am not Happy!
1001405513.korean: 이 몸은 전투와 파괴의 화신...! 그래, 바로-&n그만! 이 몸은 해피가 아니다!​

1001405514.english: No matter how much you like my voice, aren't you asking me too often? I'm a little shy about it, too... Okay, I'll tell you once a day. I love you, Producer.
1001405514.korean: 아무리 내 목소리를 좋아해도 너무 자주&n부탁하는 거 아냐? 나도 좀 쑥스러운데...&n알았어, 하루에 한번씩은 말해줄게.&n사랑해, 프로듀서.​

1001405515.english: The reason I want to become a hero is simple. Because I can be a source of strength for others. I used to say I would become a hero thanks to the Commander... but now, I will become the Commander's hero with my own strength.
1001405515.korean: 영웅이 되고 싶은 이유는 단순해.&n다른 사람의 힘이 될 수 있으니까. 예전엔 사령관&n덕분에 히어로가 될 거라 얘기했지만...&n이젠 내 힘으로 사령관만의 히어로가 되겠어.

1001405516.english: What would I have done if I hadn't been a firefighter? I think being a PE teacher would have suited me well, right? Well, I suppose no matter what job I had, the fact that I would have ended up with the Commander wouldn't have changed.
1001405516.korean: 내가 소방관이 아니었다면 뭘 했을까.&n체육교사도 잘 맞을 것 같은데, 그치?&n뭐, 어떤 직업을 가져도 사령관이랑 맺어지는 건&n변하지 않았겠지만.​

1001405517.english: Of course, I like you, Master. I want to cherish you and hold you close. However, this feeling I have right now goes beyond mere liking. It is closer to a need, a desire, or a craving. What should I call this feeling?
1001405517.korean: 물론 저는 주인님을 좋아해요. 아껴드리고 싶고,&n안아드리고 싶죠. 하지만 지금의 이 감정은&n단순히 좋아함을 넘어서요. 욕구, 욕망, 갈망에&n가깝죠. 이 감정을 뭐라고 해야 할까요?​

1001405518.english: Here! It’s a small gesture, but I prepared this gift with all my heart. My fans take care of me, but if I don't, who will take care of you, Producer? ...How is it? Do you like it?
1001405518.korean: 여기! 약소하지만 정성껏 준비한 선물이야.&n나는 팬분들이 챙겨주지만, 프로듀서는 내가&n안 챙기면 누가 챙겨주겠어.&n...어때? 마음에 들어?​

1001405519.english: Master! The Spider Woman looked down on me again! If this were my main body without a safety mechanism, she wouldn't have dared to look up...! Order me to attack, right now! Hurry...! ...Give it to me quickly.
1001405519.korean: 주인! 거미녀가 또 이 몸을 깔봤다!&n안전장치가 없는 본체였다면 감히&n올려다보지도 못 했을 것이...!&n이 몸에게 공격 명령을 내려라, 당장! 어서...!&n...빨리 내려줘.​

1001405520.english: Ah~ I'm so happy... Interacting with the fans is fun, but being held in the producer's arms is also healing... Hmm~ Should I stay like this all day? I really need to get a good rest once in a while.
1001405520.korean: 아~ 행복해... 팬들과의 교류도 즐겁지만,&n프로듀서 품에 안겨 있는 것도 힐링되네...&n흐음~ 하루 종일 이대로 있을까?&n가끔씩은 푹 쉬어야지.​

1001405521.english: Want to watch a fun superhero movie together? It's famous, so I'm sure you've heard of it, Commander. The one where the hero is hanging upside down on a rainy day... and... uh, the heroine... um...! Kissing like this!
1001405521.korean: 재밌는 히어로 영화 같이 볼래?&n유명해서 사령관도 들어봤을 거야.&n비 오는 날 히어로가 거꾸로 매달려서...&n그, 여주인공이랑... 으음...! 이렇게 키스하는 거!

1001405522.english: Snacks? Hmm... later. I have a calendar shoot coming up soon, so I'm working on my body. It's not that I lack confidence in my figure, but since the Commander will be seeing it, I need to take better care of it. Aren't you looking forward to it?
1001405522.korean: 간식? 음... 나중에. 곧 달력 촬영해야 돼서&n몸관리 중이거든. 몸매에 자신 없는 건&n아니지만 사령관이 볼 거니까 더 가꿔놔야지.&n기대되지 않아?​

1001405523.english: I realized that my heart had reached a point of no return. To me, Master is no longer an object of protection, an object of escort, or someone to be looked after. I… Master…
1001405523.korean: 저는 제 마음이 돌이킬 수 없는 단계에&n접어들었음을 알게 되었어요. 저에게 주인님은&n더 이상 보호의 대상, 호위의 대상, 돌봐줘야 할&n대상이 아니게 되었어요. 저는… 주인님을…​

1001405524.english: I prepared this stage for just one person. Producer! Thank you for always cheering for me and watching over me. The performance fee is everything for the rest of my life. But you won't regret it, right? Just keep an eye on me!
1001405524.korean: 이번 무대는 단 한 사람을 위해 준비했어.&n프로듀서! 항상 날 응원하고 지켜봐 줘서&n고마워. 공연료는 프로듀서의 남은 인생&n전부야. 그래도 후회하지는 않을 걸? 잘 지켜봐!​

1001405525.english: This soft, sticky thing is… cake?&nWhy do female Bioroids like this stuff... I'll try chewing it, but, hmm…&nMaster! Bring me more cake. Quickly!
1001405525.korean: 물컹거리고 끈적거리는 이게 케이크...?&n바이오로이드 암컷들은 왜 이런 걸&n좋아하는지... 씹어보긴 하겠다만, 음...&n주인! 내게 더 많은 케이크를 바쳐라. 어서!​

1001405526.english: My dream of putting on the best performance remains the same. That is the only way to repay the fans' love. Once I achieve my dream, I’ll happily run up to the producer~ You have to welcome me then!
1001405526.korean: 최고의 무대를 선보이겠다는 꿈은 여전해.&n팬들의 사랑에 보답할 방법은 그게 전부니까.&n꿈을 이루고 나면 기뻐하면서 프로듀서한테&n뛰어들어야지~ 그땐 잘 받아줘야 돼!​

1001405527.english: I'm canceling my offer to be a hero together. It might be fun to hang out together, but I realized it would be troublesome if villains targeted what is most precious to us. So stay safe, Commander. I'll protect you!
1001405527.korean: 같이 히어로 활동하자는 거 취소할래.&n같이 다니면 즐거울진 몰라도, 악당들이 가장&n소중한 걸 노리면 곤란하겠더라구. 그러니까&n안전한 곳에 있어, 사령관. 내가 지켜줄게!​

1001405528.english: I'm here! You did call for me, right? Did you miss me a lot? Huh...? It's just a slight scratch. It heals with just some saliva... Commander?! It's fine, but you put that in your mouth... Ugh... Wait, just a moment! I'll go clear my head and be back.
1001405528.korean: 나 왔어! 호출한 거 맞지, 나 많이 보고 싶었어?&n응...? 살짝 긁힌 것뿐이야. 침만 발라도 나으니...&n사령관?! 괜찮은데, 그걸 입에... 으...&n자, 잠깐만! 나 머리 좀 식히고 다시 올게.​

1001405529.english: Oh my? Yes. Come here, Master. Your Frigga is always ready to indulge your childish whims.
1001405529.korean: 어머나? 네. 이리 오세요, 주인님.&n주인님의 프리가는 언제나 주인님의 어리광을&n받아 드릴 준비가 되어있답니다.​

1001405530.english: You know how fatal a scandal is to a singer, producer?

1001405531.english: I have an inexplicable feeling...! Stop! Stop, Master! Please... I'll do everything you tell me to, so please stop... I'm going crazy...
1001405531.korean: 알 수 없는 느낌이...! 그만! 멈춰라, 주인!&n부탁이니까... 시키는 대로 다 할 테니까, 그만해...&n이상해져버려...

1001405532.english: ...Suddenly? It's not that I wasn't prepared... but since I might make a sound like last time... keep kissing me, without stopping.
1001405532.korean: ...갑자기? 준비 안 된 건 아닌데...&n저번처럼 내가 소리 낼지도 모르니까...&n계속, 쉬지 않고 입 맞춰줘.​

1001405533.english: Don't ask me so spitefully. I already said I agree. Keep doing what the Commander wanted to do. Because... I want that too.
1001405533.korean: 심술궂게... 자꾸 묻지 마.&n동의한다고 말했잖아.&n사령관이 하고 싶었던 거, 계속해.&n나도... 바라고 있으니까.​

1001405534.english: Won't we rest for a bit? The room is hot... and our bodies are super hot too, so maybe we can air out for a moment...? You're incorrigible... Okay, I'll stick close to you.
1001405534.korean: 조금만 쉬지 않을래? 방도 덥고...&n우리 몸도 엄청 뜨거워서, 잠시 환기라도...?&n못 말려... 알았어, 꼭 붙어 있을게.​

1001405535.english: M-Master… if you do this… Of course, I don't hate it.&nHow could I hate it? It's just… these days, I've become conscious of it…&nSo… Master? If it's alright… would you pamper me?
1001405535.korean: 주, 주인님… 이러시면… 물론 싫지는 않아요.&n싫어할 리가 없잖아요. 단지… 요즘은 의식하게&n돼서... 저… 주인님? 괜찮으시다면…&n어리광을 부려 주시겠어요?​

1001405536.english: Ah! No, Producer.&nEven if it's not me, someone else… does it have to be me?&nActually, I don't dislike you, Producer.&nYou're someone I've kept deep in my heart…&nThe fans will understand, right...?
1001405536.korean: 앗! 안 돼, 프로듀서.&n내가 아니어도 다른... 꼭 나여야 돼...?&n사실 나도 프로듀서가 싫지 않으니까.&n내 마음 깊이 담아둔 사람이니까...&n팬들도 이해해주겠지...?​

1001405537.english: This strange feeling…! Stop! Please stop, Master!&nI'll do whatever you say, just stop…&nI'm changing, it's too much...
1001405537.korean: 알 수 없는 느낌이...! 그만! 멈춰라, 주인!&n부탁이니까... 시키는 대로 다 할 테니까, 그만해...&n이상해져버려...

1001405538.english: ...Suddenly? It's not like I'm unprepared…&nBut like last time, I might end up making noises…&nSo just keep kissing me without stopping.
1001405538.korean: ...갑자기? 준비 안 된 건 아닌데...&n저번처럼 내가 소리 낼지도 모르니까...&n계속, 쉬지 않고 입 맞춰줘.​

1001405539.english: Don't be so mean… stop asking already.&nI said I agree.&nDo whatever you wanted to do, Commander.&nI want it too…
1001405539.korean: 심술궂게... 자꾸 묻지 마.&n동의한다고 말했잖아.&n사령관이 하고 싶었던 거, 계속해.&n나도... 바라고 있으니까.​

1001405540.english: Shall we take a short break? The room's hot…&nAnd our bodies are burning up, maybe a bit of air?&nYou're impossible… fine, I'll stick close.
1001405540.korean: 조금만 쉬지 않을래? 방도 덥고...&n우리 몸도 엄청 뜨거워서, 잠시 환기라도...?&n못 말려... 알았어, 꼭 붙어 있을게.​

1001405541.english: Hehe. Please hug me, Master.&nHugging someone brings happiness,&nBut being hugged also makes me happy.&nSo, Master… could I… act spoiled for once?
1001405541.korean: 후후. 저를 안아주세요, 주인님.&n누군가를 안아주는 것도 행복하지만&n누군가가 저를 안아주는 것도 행복하네요.&n저기 주인님… 제가… 어리광… 부려봐도 될까요?​

1001405542.english: If there's a song you want to hear, tell me.&nI'll sing anything.&nIf my voice can make Producer happy,&nThat makes me really happy too!
1001405542.korean: 듣고 싶은 노래가 있으면 얘기해.&n어떤 노래든지 불러줄게.&n내 목소리로 프로듀서가 즐거워해주면&n나도 엄청 행복하거든!

1001405543.english: S-Victory! You have arrived, Your Excellency the Commander! ...Yes! These are the summer combat uniforms I was issued this time! I modified the parts that didn't fit a bit... but I feel like I've been reborn as a true Second Lieutenant of the Steel Line!
1001405543.korean: 스, 승리! 오셨습니까, 사령관 각하! ...네!&n이번에 보급 받은 하계 전투복입니다! 맞지&n않는 부분은 약간 변형했지만… 진정한&n스틸라인의 소위로 거듭난 기분이에요!​

1001405544.english: Curious about what I went through? Well, it’s probably not a very pleasant story. Haven’t you heard what the others went through? ...Would you understand if I compared you to an expensive lab rat?
1001405544.korean: 내가 겪은 일이 궁금해? 글쎄, 썩 유쾌한&n이야기는 아닐 텐데. 다른 애들한테&n어떤 꼴을 겪었는지 못 들어봤나 봐?&n...비싼 실험쥐에 빗대면 알아 듣겠어?​

1001405545.english: It is our Science Defense Corps, the P-Strikers, to protect minority science persecuted by evil! Although we are the only members, we have no doubt that many more will join us. What? Weren't you already the Commander of the Science Defense Corps?
1001405545.korean: 악으로부터 박해받는 소수과학을 지키는 것이&n우리 과학방위대 P-스트라이커즈! 비록 대원은&n우리들뿐이지만, 더 많은 이들이 합류할 거라&n믿어 의심치 않사와요. 네? 사령관은 이미&n과학방위대의 사령관 아니셨나요? ​

1001405546.english: You have chosen a rough path. Saving a ruined world all by yourself—that is something only an idealist would say. But don't worry. I am your Nauthiz, so I will stay by your side until the very end.
1001405546.korean: 험난한 길을 택했네, 당신. 멸망한 세계를&n혼자 구해내겠다니 이상주의자나 할 소리지.&n그래도 걱정 마. 나는 당신의 Nauthiz니까,&n끝까지 곁에서 어울려 줄게.​

1001405547.english: You saw something amazing on your way here, you know? It's close by, but... are you busy right now? That's a shame... I really wanted to show you, but we rarely have days off together... You're free on the weekend? Great!
1001405547.korean: 오면서 굉장한 거 봤다? 여기랑 가까운데&n지금... 바빠? 아쉽네... 꼭 보여주고 싶었는데&n같이 쉬는 날이 잘 없으니…&n주말엔 시간 빈다구? 좋아!​

1001405548.english: Lately, I keep losing weight no matter how much I eat. ...Isn't that a good thing, Master? Don't you have any idea why I'm losing weight? You keep saying we should train, yet you keep... Well, I suppose you could call that training, though.
1001405548.korean: 요새는 먹어도 먹어도 살이 빠지네. ...좋은 거&n아니냐구? 주인. 내가 살 빠지는 이유가 뭔지&n짐작 가는 거 없어? 수련하자면서 자꾸…&n뭐, 그것도 수련이라면 수련이라 할 수 있지만.​

1001405549.english: I have identified the supplies for each unit as requested by His Excellency the Commander! I cross-referenced them with the current material ledgers and loaded the data onto a cart... Was, was that really necessary?
1001405549.korean: 사령관 각하께서 말씀하신 각 부대의&n보급품을 파악해 왔습니다! 지금까지의&n물자수불대장을 대조해, 수레에다&n자료를... 그, 그럴 필요까진 없었나요?​

1001405550.english: I'm sorry you have to visit so often, but I'm a bit busy right now. Could you come back next time? Well... though I feel like something else might come up by then.
1001405550.korean: 자주 찾아와줘서 미안한데,&n지금은 내가 좀 바빠서.&n다음에 다시 와주겠어?&n뭐... 그땐 또 다른 일이 생길 것 같지만.​

1001405551.english: Are you talking about the other members? I hear the other members are being produced by other magical girls. Although we don't have enough time to all get together and practice, I trust my friends.
1001405551.korean: 다른 대원들 말씀이신가요? 다른 대원들은&n다른 마법소녀 분들께 프로듀싱을 받고&n있다고 하네요. 모두 모여서 연습할 시간이&n부족하기는 하지만 본녀는 친우들을 믿사와요.​

1001405552.english: It was that kid's catchphrase to say they would live happily with the person they loved. Back then, all I could do was laugh... but these days, I think I understand why they said those things.
1001405552.korean: 사랑하는 사람과 행복하게 살겠다는 게&n그 아이의 입버릇이었지. 당시엔 웃음밖에&n안 나왔는데... 요즘은 왜 그런 말을 했는지&n이해될 것 같아.​

1001405553.english: I didn't realize it before, but having someone to welcome me back feels like a huge deal. Sometimes, when the Commander is busy and I can't see him, I feel really down the next day. Thank you for welcoming me with a smile again today.
1001405553.korean: 예전엔 몰랐는데, 돌아오면 날 반겨줄 사람이&n있다는 게 엄청 큰 거 같아. 가끔 사령관이&n바빠서 못 보면 다음날 축 처지거든.&n오늘도 웃는 얼굴로 반겨줘서 고마워.​

1001405554.english: Come to think of it, making it big isn't such a big deal. If I meet someone to spend the rest of my life with and tie the knot, what greater success could there be? I've practically already made it big!
1001405554.korean: 생각해 보니 출세가 별거 아니네. 여생을&n함께 할 수 있는 이성을 만나, 백년가약을&n맺으면 그보다 더한 출세가 어딨겠어?&n난 이미 출세한 거나 마찬가지야!​

1001405555.english: Ah, it's refreshing... As expected, the summer combat uniform is better than the regular one...? S-Victory! I am Second Lieutenant Habetrot of the Steel Line Unit, greeting His Excellency the Commander! What brings you here...?
1001405555.korean: 아, 시원하다... 역시 군복보단 하계&n전투복이...? 스, 승리! 스틸라인 부대의&n하베트롯 소위, 사령관 각하를 뵙습니다!&n어쩐 일로 이곳에...?​

1001405556.english: Strikes up conversations without hesitation is your strength. There was someone similar even before the apocalypse. He was a guy who just spouted empty words no matter who he was talking to... You must be different, right?
1001405556.korean: 스스럼없이 말 거는 게 당신 장점이지.&n멸망 전에도 비슷한 인간이 있었어.&n상대가 누구든 속알맹이 없는 소리만&n늘어놓던 녀석인데... 당신은 다르겠지?​

1001405557.english: Have you ever heard the saying, "Sufficiently developed science and technology are indistinguishable from magic"? That is why we, the Science Girls, were born. However, even though magic has transformed into science, friendship and courage still remain together.
1001405557.korean: 충분히 발달한 과학 기술은 마법과 구별할 수&n없다'는 말은 들어 보셨나요? 그래서 탄생한&n것이 저희 과학소녀들. 하지만 마법이&n과학으로 변했다고 하더라도 우정과 용기는&n여전히 함께 한답니다.​

1001405558.english: Don't get out of my sight. I don't mean anything by it. If anything happens to you, I... You're welcome. It's just the right thing to do.
1001405558.korean: 내 시야에서 벗어나지 마. &n별다른 뜻은 없어. &n당신한테 무슨 일이 생기면 내가…&n고맙기는. 당연히 해야 하는 일인 걸​

1001405559.english: ...Huh? I was keeping an eye on you so you wouldn't get distracted. If you do this, you can only look at me, right? ...What? Why are you laughing? It makes me laugh too.
1001405559.korean: ...응? 사령관이 딴데 한눈 팔지 않게 지켜보고&n있었어. 이러면 나밖에 못 보잖아?&n...뭐야, 왜 웃어. 나까지 웃게 되잖아.​

1001405560.english: What should I do once I've conquered the world? Master, do you have any plans? ...Ah! I just thought of something. I'm going to establish my martial arts dojos all over the world. The instructors of each dojo would be the kids born between you and me. How about that?
1001405560.korean: 세계 정복까지 이루면 뭘 할까. 주인은&n계획 없어? ...아! 방금 떠올랐는데, 전 세계에&n내 권법도장을 세우는 거야. 각 도장의 사범은&n주인이랑 나 사이에 태어난 애들이 맡고. 어때?​

1001405561.english: Wearing the summer combat uniform fills me with pride as a Second Lieutenant of the Steel Line. For some reason, I feel a surge of confidence...! However, it is still a bit tight... Why aren't there any larger sizes in the issued supplies...
1001405561.korean: 하계 전투복을 입으니 스틸라인의 소위로서&n자긍심이 솟아나요. 왠지 자신감이 생기는&n듯한...! 그렇지만 아직도 조금, 끼네요…&n보급품엔 왜 더 큰 사이즈가 없는 걸까요...​

1001405562.english: To guys who have money to burn, anything that can be solved with money isn't a problem. They are expendables that can just be rebuilt even if they are roughly handled and broken... Do you understand? That's the Bermuda Team.
1001405562.korean: 돈이 썩어나는 놈들에게 돈으로 해결할&n수 있는 건 문제가 안 되지. 험하게 다뤄&n부서져도 다시 만들면 그만인 소모품…&n이해됐어? 그게 버뮤다팀 애들이야.​

1001405563.english: I am studying and practicing thoroughly, but I still fall far short compared to Baekto's perfect acting. Hmm... Commander, would you help me with my practice?
1001405563.korean: 철저하게 공부하고 연습도 하고 있는데&n백토 씨의 완벽한 연기와 비교하면&n많이 부족하네요. 으음... 사령관,&n제 연습을 도와주시겠어요?​

1001405564.english: You have chosen a rough path. Saving a ruined world all by yourself—that is something only an idealist would say. But don't worry. I am your Nauthiz, so I will stay by your side until the very end.
1001405564.korean: 험난한 길을 택했네, 당신. 멸망한 세계를&n혼자 구해내겠다니 이상주의자나 할 소리지.&n그래도 걱정 마. 나는 당신의 Nauthiz니까,&n끝까지 곁에서 어울려 줄게.​

1001405565.english: You saw something amazing on your way here, you know? It's close by, but... are you busy right now? That's a shame... I really wanted to show you, but we rarely have days off together... You're free on the weekend? Great!
1001405565.korean: 오면서 굉장한 거 봤다? 여기랑 가까운데&n지금... 바빠? 아쉽네... 꼭 보여주고 싶었는데&n같이 쉬는 날이 잘 없으니…&n주말엔 시간 빈다구? 좋아!​

1001405566.english: Lately, I keep losing weight no matter how much I eat. ...Isn't that a good thing, Master? Don't you have any idea why I'm losing weight? You keep saying we should train, yet you keep... Well, I suppose you could call that training, though.
1001405566.korean: 요새는 먹어도 먹어도 살이 빠지네. ...좋은 거&n아니냐구? 주인. 내가 살 빠지는 이유가 뭔지&n짐작 가는 거 없어? 수련하자면서 자꾸…&n뭐, 그것도 수련이라면 수련이라 할 수 있지만.​

1001405567.english: You came to see me...? Ah, so you came because of the training schedule. I was going to organize it for you, but if you need it now— You just came to see me? Uh... really...?
1001405567.korean: 절 보러요...? 아~ 훈련계획표 때문에&n찾아오셨군요. 정리해서 드리려 했는데&n지금 필요하시다면- &n그냥 절 보러 왔다구요? 어... 정말요...?​

1001405568.english: There was someone at the lab who was just like you. She was the type to make a fuss, asking if I needed anything or saying she’d found her husband... I just wanted to mention it because it came to mind. It doesn't mean anything special.
1001405568.korean: 연구소에 당신과 비슷한 인간이 있었어.&n나한테 필요한 건 없냐느니, 남편을&n찾았다느니 호들갑 떨던 애인데…&n생각나서 해본 얘기야. 특별한 의미는 없어.​

1001405569.english: As for this outfit, it is a uniform that we all gathered and discussed before practice. How could anyone possibly have a problem with it? Besides, since I am the perfect girl, of course I can pull it off, right? Ohohohoho!
1001405569.korean: 이 복장으로 말씀드리자면 연습 전에 모두가&n모여서 의논하여 결정한 유니폼. 어떻게&n불만을 가질 수 있을까요? 그리고 완벽한&n본녀이니 당연히 소화할 수 있지 않겠어요?&n오호호호호!​

1001405570.english: It was that kid's catchphrase to say they would live happily with the person they loved. Back then, all I could do was laugh... but these days, I think I understand why they said those things.
1001405570.korean: 사랑하는 사람과 행복하게 살겠다는 게&n그 아이의 입버릇이었지. 당시엔 웃음밖에&n안 나왔는데... 요즘은 왜 그런 말을 했는지&n이해될 것 같아.​

1001405571.english: I didn't realize it before, but having someone to welcome me back feels like a huge deal. Sometimes, when the Commander is busy and I can't see him, I feel really down the next day. Thank you for welcoming me with a smile again today.
1001405571.korean: 예전엔 몰랐는데, 돌아오면 날 반겨줄 사람이&n있다는 게 엄청 큰 거 같아. 가끔 사령관이&n바빠서 못 보면 다음날 축 처지거든.&n오늘도 웃는 얼굴로 반겨줘서 고마워.​

1001405572.english: Come to think of it, making it big isn't such a big deal. If I meet someone to spend the rest of my life with and tie the knot, what greater success could there be? I've practically already made it big!
1001405572.korean: 생각해 보니 출세가 별거 아니네. 여생을&n함께 할 수 있는 이성을 만나, 백년가약을&n맺으면 그보다 더한 출세가 어딨겠어?&n난 이미 출세한 거나 마찬가지야!​

1001405573.english: ...Are you sleeping? You'll catch a cold, so I should cover you. Do you know how scared I was last time? It's punishment... Ah?! Th-You're awake? Could it be... from the beginning?! Agh...
1001405573.korean: ...주무시나? 감기 걸리실 텐데 덮어드려야겠다.&n저번엔 제가 얼마나 놀랐는지 아세요?&n벌이에요… 앗?! 이, 일어나셨어요?&n혹시... 처음부터?! 아으으...​

1001405574.english: You get told a lot that you're clueless, don't you? Can't you tell that I'm deliberately keeping my distance? ...Don't come any closer. Nothing good will ever happen if you stay by my side.
1001405574.korean: 당신, 눈치 없다는 소리 많이 듣지?&n내가 일부러 거리 두는 것도 모르겠어?&n...더 이상 다가오지 마. 내 곁에 있어봤자&n좋은 일 따위, 절대 일어나지 않으니까.​

1001405575.english: Please watch over me, Commander. I will show you my perfect self. On stage, too. And… at any time...
1001405575.korean: 본녀를 잘 지켜봐 주시와요, 사령관.&n완벽한 모습을 보여드리겠사와요.&n무대에서도. 그리고… 그 어느 때에도...​

1001405576.english: Don't get out of my sight. I don't mean anything by it. If anything happens to you, I... You're welcome. It's just the right thing to do.
1001405576.korean: 내 시야에서 벗어나지 마. &n별다른 뜻은 없어. &n당신한테 무슨 일이 생기면 내가…&n고맙기는. 당연히 해야 하는 일인 걸​

1001405577.english: ...Huh? I was keeping an eye on you so you wouldn't get distracted. If you do this, you can only look at me, right? ...What? Why are you laughing? It makes me laugh too.
1001405577.korean: ...응? 사령관이 딴데 한눈 팔지 않게 지켜보고&n있었어. 이러면 나밖에 못 보잖아?&n...뭐야, 왜 웃어. 나까지 웃게 되잖아.​

1001405578.english: What should I do once I've conquered the world? Master, do you have any plans? ...Ah! I just thought of something. I'm going to establish my martial arts dojos all over the world. The instructors of each dojo would be the kids born between you and me. How about that?
1001405578.korean: 세계 정복까지 이루면 뭘 할까. 주인은&n계획 없어? ...아! 방금 떠올랐는데, 전 세계에&n내 권법도장을 세우는 거야. 각 도장의 사범은&n주인이랑 나 사이에 태어난 애들이 맡고. 어때?​

1001405579.english: Ah...! P-Commander, if you pull there...!

1001405581.english: Was this in the script? It wasn't. Please follow the script, Commander.
1001405581.korean: 대본에 이런 내용이 있었나요?&n없네요. 대본을 따라주시와요, 사령관.​

1001405582.english: ...You're hot. Did you keep holding it in until it got this bad...? Fine. I'm no different from you. Go ahead and do whatever you want until you're satisfied.
1001405582.korean: ...뜨겁네, 당신.&n이렇게 될 때까지 담아두고 있었어...?&n좋아. 나도 당신과 다르지 않으니까.&n성에 찰 때까지 마음껏 해봐.​

1001405583.english: ...Again? You said it would only be this once last time... Fine. Thank you for booking the Express today. For VIP guests- Eek?! W-wait! I'm still talking...
1001405583.korean: ...또? 저번에도 딱 한번만이라 했으면서…&n알았어. 금일 익스프레스를 예약해주셔서&n감사합니다. VIP인 손님에겐-&n꺅?! 자, 잠깐만! 아직 말하고 있는데...​

1001405584.english: ...I guess I’ve become a scoundrel before I knew it. Whenever I see my master these days... Is it like that for you, master? Then shall we do an all-night training session starting now?
1001405584.korean: ...어느새 나도 파렴치한이 됐나 봐.&n요즘 주인만 보면... 주인도 그래?&n그럼 지금부터 밤샘 수련할까?​

1001405585.english: Above expectations… If I had known you'd like it this much, I would have worn it sooner… um…&nTomorrow is a day off,&nIf you want, today…
1001405585.korean: 기대 이상이라니... 이렇게 좋아해 주실 줄&n알았으면 좀 더 빨리 입을 걸... 저…&n내일은 근무휴식이어서,&n오빠가 원하면 오늘은...​

1001405586.english: ...This isn't the end, right?&nCompared to what you were confident about, it's disappointing.&nDo more, as much as you've been craving.
1001405586.korean: ...이대로 끝은 아니지?&n자신있어 하던 것에 비하면 실망인데.&n더, 갈망했던 만큼 더 해봐.​

1001405587.english: Ac-Actually, the science girl's Setting is that her strength increases from contact with the commander. …Sorry,&nIt's a lie. But… if the commander touches me, I really get strength. So…&nCould you stay with me a little longer?
1001405587.korean: 사, 사실 과학소녀는 사령관과의 저, 접촉으로&n힘이 증가한다는 설정이 있사와요. ...죄송해요,&n거짓말이에요. 하지만... 사령관이 본녀를&n만져주면 정말로 힘이 나요. 그러니…&n조금만 더 본녀와 함께해 주시겠어요?​

1001405588.english: ...It's hot, you.&nYou've been holding it in until now…?&nAlright. I'm no different from you.&nDo as much as you want until satisfied.
1001405588.korean: ...뜨겁네, 당신.&n이렇게 될 때까지 담아두고 있었어...?&n좋아. 나도 당신과 다르지 않으니까.&n성에 찰 때까지 마음껏 해봐.​

1001405589.english: ...Again? You said just once last time…&nAlright. Thank you for reserving the express today.&nFor VIP guests—&nEek?! W-Wait! I'm still talking…
1001405589.korean: ...또? 저번에도 딱 한번만이라 했으면서…&n알았어. 금일 익스프레스를 예약해주셔서&n감사합니다. VIP인 손님에겐-&n꺅?! 자, 잠깐만! 아직 말하고 있는데...​

1001405590.english: ...Have I become shameless without realizing it?&nLately, whenever I see Master… Master too?&nThen shall we practice overnight now?
1001405590.korean: ...어느새 나도 파렴치한이 됐나 봐.&n요즘 주인만 보면... 주인도 그래?&n그럼 지금부터 밤샘 수련할까?​

1001405591.english: Hey! Why are you in such a rush, brother?&nI'm here. If you're busy,&nI'll help. If not, we can go out together!
1001405591.korean: 에잇! 어딜 그렇게 급하게 가요, 오빠?&n저는 여기 있는데. 바쁜 일 있으면&n도와줄게요. 없으면 둘이 놀러 가구요!​

1001405592.english: I don't wish for anything.&nI've lived, so I lived… I have a purpose now.&nI won't tell you either.&nBecause it's my Uruz.
1001405592.korean: 바라는 것 따위 없어.&n살아있으니까 살아온 건데… 목적이 생겼어.&n당신에게도 안 알려줄 거야.&n나만의 Uruz니까.​

1001405593.english: This work's ending is a happy ending.&nIn a world where justice wins and evil disappears,&nthe hero and heroine pledge their love…&nThe heroine is me. The hero is… the commander, right? Hehe.
1001405593.korean: 이 작품의 엔딩은 해피엔딩이네요.&n정의가 승리하고 악은 사라진 세상에서&n히어로와 히로인이 사랑을 맹세하는..&n히로인은 본녀. 히어로는... 사령관이시죠? 후훗.​

1001405594.english: We, the P-Strikers, are the guardians of the heart, protecting people's hearts from monsters that sicken them! We will do our best for everyone again today. Uh... how was it?
1001405594.korean: 마음을 병들게 하는 괴물로부터 사람들의&n마음을 지키는 것이 마음의 수호자인 우리&nP-스트라이커즈! 오늘도 모두를 위해서&n최선을 다하겠어요. 어…어땠나요?

1001405595.english: Our Laughter Commando P-Strikers is here to bring back laughter to those who have lost it! With that in mind, we prepared a simple gag... Huh? Commander, you laughed, didn't you? I'm happy when someone laughs.
1001405595.korean: 웃음을 잃은 사람들에게 웃음을 되찾아주는&n것이 우리 웃음특공대 P-스트라이커즈!&n그런 의미로 간단한 개그를 준비했는데…&n어? 사령관 웃었지? 누가 웃으면 나도 좋아.

1001405596.english: I was in charge of logistics management and the relief of the wounded. My role is to support our compatriots on the front lines by increasing their survival rate by even just 1% so that they can focus on their mission.
1001405596.korean: 저는 병참 관리와 부상병 구호를 담당했어요.&n전선에 서는 동포의 생존율을 1%라도&n높이 향상시켜, 임무에 전념할 수 있도록&n서포트하는 게 제 역할이랍니다.

1001405597.english: So, lying on the Commander's lap watching a movie again today— ...Nagging again? Fine, I won't smoke when watching movies. They say the one who loves more loses...
1001405597.korean: 어디 오늘도 사령관 무릎에 누워서&n영화 한 편- ...또 잔소리야? 알았어,&n영화볼 땐 안 필게.&n더 좋아하는 사람이 지는 거라더니...

1001405598.english: Commander, it's morning. Please wake up. You need to wash your face and change your clothes. Breakfast is already ready. Oh come on. Don't just laugh, please get up.
1001405598.korean: 사령관님, 아침이에요. 일어나세요.&n세수하시고 옷 갈아입으셔야죠.&n아침식사도 준비가 다 끝났단 말이에요.&n아이참. 웃지만 마시고 일어나세요.

1001405599.english: Whoa! Are you surprised? You didn't expect me to be here first, did you? I picked out some nice spots in advance. Since it's been a while since I've had some sunshine, you're going to take your time, right?
1001405599.korean: 왁! 놀라셨어요? 제가 먼저 와있을 줄 예상&n못 하셨죠. 미리 괜찮은 곳들을 봐놨어요.&n간만에 햇볕 쬐는 거니까,&n느긋하게 있다 가실 거죠?

1001405600.english: It still feels like a dream that the first thing I see when I wake up in the morning is your face, Commander. Just as you need me... I have come to need you too.
1001405600.korean: 아침에 일어나서, 제일 먼저 보는 게&n사령관님의 얼굴이란 게 아직도 꿈만 같아요.&n사령관님이 절 필요로 해주시는 것처럼…&n저도, 사령관님이 필요해졌어요.

1001405601.english: Is something wrong? You look down. Hmm... I guess I have no choice! I'm a sophisticated 'Star Beauty' right here, so I'll do what I learned for you. It's a lap pillow—you have to lie on the other side!
1001405601.korean: 무슨 일 있어? 기운 없어 보이네.&n으음... 하는 수 없지! 여기서 지성미 넘치고&n'별세미인'인 내가 배워온 걸 해줄게.&n무릎베개라고- 바, 반대로 눕는 거야!

1001405602.english: The others must be working hard too, right? Now that we are all of one mind, I want to work hard and have fun. And I want the viewers to enjoy it as well. Of course… the Commander, too…
1001405602.korean: 다른 애들도 열심히 하고 있겠죠?&n모두 한마음이 되었으니 열심히 그리고&n즐겁게 하고 싶어요. 그리고 보는 사람들도&n즐겁길 원해요. 당연히… 사령관도…

1001405603.english: I forgot my glasses, so I couldn't see the materials properly during the meeting. However, I could tell that everyone wanted to create a fun piece that would make everyone laugh. I'm going to work hard too, not to be outdone.
1001405603.korean: 안경을 깜빡해서 회의 때 자료를 제대로&n못 봤어. 하지만 모두가 웃을 수 있는 재밌는&n작품을 만들고 싶어 하는 것은 알 수 있었어.&n나도 지지 않고 열심히 하려고.

1001405604.english: Ah, Commander... No, I guess I was a little tired because these are things I'm not used to yet. I'll get used to it soon, so you don't have to worry. I'll get used to it soon...
1001405604.korean: 아, 사령관님… 아뇨, 아직 익숙하지 않은&n일들이라 조금 피곤했나 봐요. 금방&n익숙해질 거니까, 걱정하지 않으셔도 돼요.&n금방 익숙해질 거니까...

1001405605.english: We were just setting the mood, why are you acting like this? Don't worry about Feather. Why don't you just go all out and show them? That way, everyone will... realize that the Commander is mine.
1001405605.korean: 한창 분위기 잡다 왜그래?&n…페더는 신경쓰지 마. 오히려 화끈하게&n보여주는 게 어때? 그래야 다들…&n사령관이 내 거란걸 알게 될 테니까.

1001405606.english: Commander. You worked hard today. I... I'll give you a kiss as a gift. ...Yes! Actually, I'm the one who wants to do it! Is that not allowed? Please... kiss me.
1001405606.korean: 사령관님. 오늘 하루도&n수고 많으셨어요. 제, 제가&n선물로 키… 키스해 드릴게요.&n…네! 사실 제가 하고 싶은 거예요!&n그러면 안 되나요? 키스… 해주세요.

1001405607.english: To become as strong as him, a mere few years would be far from enough. I have to train consistently... The reason I'm trying? It's simple. Because I've found someone precious to me.
1001405607.korean: 그분처럼 강해지려면 고작 몇 년 가지고는&n턱없이 부족하겠죠. 꾸준히 단련해야…&n노력하는 이유요? 단순해요.&n소중한 사람이 생겼으니까요.

1001405608.english: I used to be a coward, but... everyone believed in me and waited for me. My comrades... and... the Commander... I won't run away anymore.
1001405608.korean: 옛날의 전 겁쟁이였지만… 모두가 믿어주고 &n기다려줬어요. 동료들이… 그리고…사령관님이…&n이제 도망치지 않아요.

1001405609.english: What would it have been like to go to school with the Commander? Sitting next to each other in class, sharing textbooks, holding hands on the way home... I'm happy now, but I think school life would have been fun too. Right?
1001405609.korean: 사령관이랑 같이 학교 다녔으면 어땠을까?&n옆자리에 앉아서 같이 수업도 듣고, 교과서도&n나눠보고, 하굣길에 손잡고... 지금도&n행복하지만, 학교생활도 즐거웠을 것 같아. 그치?

1001405610.english: It is something I have never done before. However, rather than being afraid, I am excited, and I feel motivated because I want to do well. Of course, I have never done anything half-heartedly.
1001405610.korean: 지금까지 해본 적 없는 일이긴 해요.&n하지만 두렵다기보다는 기대되고,&n잘하고 싶어서 의욕이 생겨요.&n물론 지금까지 대충 한 적은 없지만요.

1001405611.english: Do you want to see what I practiced? I mean… Commander? Commander, you’re over there… right? Please don’t leave me alone. Please… This isn’t acting…
1001405611.korean: 내가 연습한 거 볼래? 그러니까… 사령관?&n사령관 거기 있지…요? 혼자 두지 말아주세요.&n제발… 연기가 아니에요…

1001405612.english: Um... for some reason, the beautiful lady over there has been glaring at me for a while... Did I do something wrong? Did I unintentionally cause some trouble...!
1001405612.korean: 저... 왠지, 아까부터 저쪽의 미녀분께서&n노려보셔서... 혹시 제가 잘못한 게 있을까요?&n저도 모르는 사이에 실례라도 저지른 건...!

1001405613.english: Alcohol... is a little... Are you asking because you don't know? Did you forget how many marks were left on my body because of the Commander back then? Haa... Alright, alright. I'm going crazy because that childlike side of you is just so adorable.
1001405613.korean: 술...은 조금… 몰라서 물어? 그때 사령관 때문에&n내 몸에 자국이 얼마나 많이 남았는지&n까먹었어? 하아… 알았어, 알았어. 그런 애 같은&n점이 정말 사랑스러워서 미치겠다니까.

1001405614.english: Actually, I don't mind if you act lazy, Commander. It just means I can be close to you and take care of you... And I like it when you're quick and efficient too. In fact... I like you no matter what you look like.
1001405614.korean: 사실 사령관님께서 나태하게&n구셔도 싫지 않아요.&n그만큼 사령관님과 가까이&n지낼 수 있고 돌볼 수 있으니까요…&n그리고 빠릿한 모습도 좋아해요. 사실…&n어떤 모습이든 사령관님을 좋아해요.

1001405615.english: Commander, why is there a wound here...? Just a moment, I'll treat it right now. It looks like it happened recently— Ah, no way?! Ah, it's nothing! I have absolutely no idea!
1001405615.korean: 사령관님, 왜 여기에 상처가...? 잠시만요,&n지금 치료해 드릴게요. 아무래도 최근에&n생긴 것 같은- 앗, 설마?! 아, 아무것도&n아니에요! 짐작 가는 거 전혀 없어요!

1001405616.english: Once I mustered up the courage, I became able to do so much more than before. For example… I like you, Commander… Ugh. I’m still embarrassed by this.
1001405616.korean: 용기를 내니 옛날보다 훨씬 많은 일을 할 수&n있게 되었어요. 예를 들어서…&n좋아해요, 사령관님…&n아으으. 아직도 이건 부끄럽네요.

1001405617.english: Please excuse me from remedial class, Commander~ They keep telling me to come in because I failed the exam... What am I supposed to do besides class? Play! They just added a 2-player mode to Steel Line Online. Let's play together until tomorrow!
1001405617.korean: 보충수업 좀 빼줘, 사령관~ 시험에서&n낙제됐다고 계속 나오래... 수업 말고 뭐할&n거냐구? 놀아야지! 이번에 스틸라인 온라인&n2인 모드 추가됐어. 내일까지 같이 하자!

1001405618.english: This outfit? They say it was made specifically for the new project. It’s a little… embarrassing, but… everyone said they liked it… and they said the Commander would like it…
1001405618.korean: 이 복장요? 새 작품을 위해서 일부러 만든&n옷이라고 해요. 조금… 부끄럽긴 하지만…&n모두가 좋다고 했고…&n사령관이 좋아할 거라고 해서…

1001405619.english: Commander. I’ve come up with a few gags that would be good to include in the piece; would you listen? Faucre just laughs ahahaha... and doesn't give me a proper evaluation...
1001405619.korean: 사령관. 작품에 넣기 좋은 개그 몇 가지&n구상해 봤는데 들어줄래?&n뽀끄루는 아하하.... 웃기만 하고&n제대로 평가를 안 해줘서…

1001405620.english: Phew... Ah, no. The Horde members really set a great record again today... it's just hard to keep up completely. But I am gradually improving, so someday I'll be able to stand by their side, too.
1001405620.korean: 후우... 아, 아뇨. 오늘도 호드 분들께서 전공을&n세우셨는데... 완벽히 쫓아가기 버거워서요.&n그래도 점점 나아지고 있으니까.&n언젠가 저도 그분들 옆에 설 수 있겠죠.

1001405621.english: So, lying on the Commander's lap watching a movie again today— ...Nagging again? Fine, I won't smoke when watching movies. They say the one who loves more loses...
1001405621.korean: 어디 오늘도 사령관 무릎에 누워서&n영화 한 편- ...또 잔소리야? 알았어,&n영화볼 땐 안 필게.&n더 좋아하는 사람이 지는 거라더니...

1001405622.english: Commander, it's morning. Please wake up. You need to wash your face and change your clothes. Breakfast is already ready. Oh come on. Don't just laugh, please get up.
1001405622.korean: 사령관님, 아침이에요. 일어나세요.&n세수하시고 옷 갈아입으셔야죠.&n아침식사도 준비가 다 끝났단 말이에요.&n아이참. 웃지만 마시고 일어나세요.

1001405623.english: Whoa! Are you surprised? You didn't expect me to be here first, did you? I picked out some nice spots in advance. Since it's been a while since I've had some sunshine, you're going to take your time, right?
1001405623.korean: 왁! 놀라셨어요? 제가 먼저 와있을 줄 예상&n못 하셨죠. 미리 괜찮은 곳들을 봐놨어요.&n간만에 햇볕 쬐는 거니까,&n느긋하게 있다 가실 거죠?

1001405624.english: It still feels like a dream that the first thing I see when I wake up in the morning is your face, Commander. Just as you need me... I have come to need you too.
1001405624.korean: 아침에 일어나서, 제일 먼저 보는 게&n사령관님의 얼굴이란 게 아직도 꿈만 같아요.&n사령관님이 절 필요로 해주시는 것처럼…&n저도, 사령관님이 필요해졌어요.

1001405625.english: Is something wrong? You look down. Hmm... I guess I have no choice! I'm a sophisticated 'Star Beauty' right here, so I'll do what I learned for you. It's a lap pillow—you have to lie on the other side!
1001405625.korean: 무슨 일 있어? 기운 없어 보이네.&n으음... 하는 수 없지! 여기서 지성미 넘치고&n'별세미인'인 내가 배워온 걸 해줄게.&n무릎베개라고- 바, 반대로 눕는 거야!

1001405626.english: I received a lot of help from Magical MoMo. Vocalization, pronunciation, movements, eye contact, background, mindset, and… y… things like dating…
1001405626.korean: 모모 씨께 도움 많이 받았어요.&n발성법이나 발음, 동작, 시선처리, 배경,&n마음가짐 그리고… 여…연애라던가…

1001405627.english: How about this outfit, Commander? We unanimously decided at the meeting that you would like it... Don't you think it would be fun to put a funny word on it? Do you have any good ideas? Huh? What's with the look on your face?
1001405627.korean: 이 옷 어때, 사령관? 회의 때 사령관이&n좋아할 거 같다고 만장일치로 결정한 옷인데…&n여기다가 웃긴 단어를 써도 재밌을 거 같지?&n좋은 아이디어 있어? 응? 표정이 왜 그래?

1001405628.english: If you, Khan the Swift, were a Keshik like me... would I be able to become like him someday? Like a lone wolf protecting the pack by defeating enemies instead of praying for the safe return of comrades.
1001405628.korean: 칸 님도 저랑 같은 케시크였다면... 언젠가&n저도 그분처럼 될 수 있을까요? 전우들이&n무사히 돌아오길 기도하는 대신 적을 쓰러뜨려&n무리를 지키는, 한 마리의 늑대처럼요.

1001405629.english: We were just setting the mood, why are you acting like this? … Don't worry about Feather. Why don't you just go all out? That way, everyone… will realize the Commander is mine.
1001405629.korean: 한창 분위기 잡다 왜그래?&n…페더는 신경쓰지 마. 오히려 화끈하게&n보여주는 게 어때? 그래야 다들…&n사령관이 내 거란걸 알게 될 테니까.

1001405630.english: Commander. You worked hard today. I... I'll give you a kiss as a gift. ...Yes! Actually, I'm the one who wants to do it! Is that not allowed? Please... kiss me.
1001405630.korean: 사령관님. 오늘 하루도&n수고 많으셨어요. 제, 제가&n선물로 키… 키스해 드릴게요.&n…네! 사실 제가 하고 싶은 거예요!&n그러면 안 되나요? 키스… 해주세요.

1001405631.english: To become as strong as him, a mere few years would be far from enough. I have to train consistently… The reason I’m trying? It’s simple. Because I’ve found someone precious to me.
1001405631.korean: 그분처럼 강해지려면 고작 몇 년 가지고는&n턱없이 부족하겠죠. 꾸준히 단련해야…&n노력하는 이유요? 단순해요.&n소중한 사람이 생겼으니까요.

1001405632.english: I used to be a coward, but... everyone believed in me and waited for me. My comrades... and... the Commander... won't run away anymore.
1001405632.korean: 옛날의 전 겁쟁이였지만… 모두가 믿어주고 &n기다려줬어요. 동료들이… 그리고…사령관님이…&n이제 도망치지 않아요.

1001405633.english: What would it have been like to go to school with the Commander? Sitting next to each other in class, sharing textbooks, holding hands on the way home... I'm happy now, but I think school life would have been fun too. Right?
1001405633.korean: 사령관이랑 같이 학교 다녔으면 어땠을까?&n옆자리에 앉아서 같이 수업도 듣고, 교과서도&n나눠보고, 하굣길에 손잡고... 지금도&n행복하지만, 학교생활도 즐거웠을 것 같아. 그치?

1001405634.english: I feel that I have changed a lot while preparing for this project. It is not just that I have grown; I have also become able to face my past. Please watch over this changed me, Commander.
1001405634.korean: 작품을 준비하면서 제가 많이 변했음을 느껴요.&n단순히 성장한 것이 아니라 저의 과거까지&n마주할 수 있게 되었어요.&n달라진 저를 지켜봐 주세요, 사령관.

1001405635.english: I prepared this piece to make everyone laugh. But right now, I want to make the Commander laugh more than anyone else. So please watch over me, Commander. I will definitely make you laugh.
1001405635.korean: 모두를 웃게 하기 위해서 이 작품을 준비했어.&n하지만 지금은 다른 누구보다도 사령관을&n웃게 하고 싶어. 그러니 잘 지켜봐 줘, 사령관.&n꼭 당신을 웃게 할게.

1001405636.english: Commander? What brings you here... Ah, I came out for equipment inspection. This is the only help I can offer... What? Hey, you're going to get your hands dirty...! An excuse to stay together... Well, I guess it can't be helped.
1001405636.korean: 사령관님? 어쩐 일로 이곳에... 아~&n저는 장비 점검 때문에 나왔어요.&n도움 될 수 있는 게 이런 거뿐이라...&n네? 저기, 손이 더러워지실...!&n같이 있을 핑계라니... 그럼 어쩔 수 없네요.

1001405637.english: Alcohol... is a little... Are you asking because you don't know? Did you forget how many marks were left on my body because of the Commander back then? Haa... Alright, alright. I'm going crazy because that childlike side of you is just so adorable.
1001405637.korean: 술...은 조금… 몰라서 물어? 그때 사령관 때문에&n내 몸에 자국이 얼마나 많이 남았는지&n까먹었어? 하아… 알았어, 알았어. 그런 애 같은&n점이 정말 사랑스러워서 미치겠다니까.

1001405638.english: Actually, I don't mind if you act lazy, Commander. It just means I can be close to you and take care of you... And I like it when you're quick and efficient too. In fact... I like you no matter what you look like.
1001405638.korean: 사실 사령관님께서 나태하게&n구셔도 싫지 않아요.&n그만큼 사령관님과 가까이&n지낼 수 있고 돌볼 수 있으니까요…&n그리고 빠릿한 모습도 좋아해요. 사실…&n어떤 모습이든 사령관님을 좋아해요.

1001405639.english: Commander, why is there a wound here...? Just a moment, I'll treat it right now. It looks like it happened recently— Ah, no way?! Ah, it's nothing! I have absolutely no idea!
1001405639.korean: 사령관님, 왜 여기에 상처가...? 잠시만요,&n지금 치료해 드릴게요. 아무래도 최근에&n생긴 것 같은- 앗, 설마?! 아, 아무것도&n아니에요! 짐작 가는 거 전혀 없어요!

1001405640.english: Once I mustered up the courage, I became able to do so much more than before. For example… I like you, Commander… Ugh. I’m still embarrassed by this.
1001405640.korean: 용기를 내니 옛날보다 훨씬 많은 일을 할 수&n있게 되었어요. 예를 들어서…&n좋아해요, 사령관님…&n아으으. 아직도 이건 부끄럽네요.

1001405641.english: Please excuse me from remedial class, Commander~ They keep telling me to come in because I failed the exam... What am I supposed to do besides class? Play! They just added a 2-player mode to Steel Line Online. Let's play together until tomorrow!
1001405641.korean: 보충수업 좀 빼줘, 사령관~ 시험에서&n낙제됐다고 계속 나오래... 수업 말고 뭐할&n거냐구? 놀아야지! 이번에 스틸라인 온라인&n2인 모드 추가됐어. 내일까지 같이 하자!

1001405643.english: Aaaah! I-I told you I'm sensitive, Commander. Oh, since my clothes are thinner, be a little more... gentle... huh?
1001405643.korean: 꺄악! 미, 민감하다고 했잖아, 사령관.&n오, 옷이 얇아진 만큼 더… 상냥하게… 응?

1001405645.english: Who was it again who told us to be mindful of the time and place? You can't stand it, can you? Alright...
1001405645.korean: 시간과 장소를 가리라고 했던 건&n어디사는 누구셨더라~?&n못 참겠는거지? 자...

1001405646.english: Commander... a bad child deserves to be punished, right? As punishment... please... just a little more.
1001405646.korean: 사령관님... &n나쁜 아이는 벌을 받아야겠죠?&n벌로… 조금만 더… 해주세요.

1001405647.english: Um... if you don't mind, this time I... P-it's not that it's lacking! I actually prepared something to make you even happier. ...Yes. Then...
1001405647.korean: 저... 괜찮으시면 이번엔 제가…&n부, 부족한 게 아니라!&n좀 더 기뻐하실 수 있게,&n준비해 온 게 있어서요. ...네. 그럼...

1001405648.english: Aaaah! I-I'm fine. Since you want me, Commander... Um... Commander? You can... want me... even more...
1001405648.korean: 꺄악! 괘, 괜찮아요.&n사령관님께서 저를 원하시는 거니…&n저… 사령관님?&n저를… 더… 원하셔도 되는데…

1001405649.english: I studied so much... but I forgot it all again. Can you teach me everything from A to Z again, Commander? Yes... starting now...
1001405649.korean: 잔뜩 공부해왔는데... 또 전부 잊어버렸어.&n하나부터 열까지 다시 가르쳐줄래, 사령관?&n응... 지금부터...

1001405650.english: My strength… is the strength of my heart.&nWhat makes my heart strong is the bond with the Commander… so…&nShall we… strengthen our bond?
1001405650.korean: 저, 저의 강함은 마음의 강함.&n저의 마음을 강하게 만드는 것은&n사령관과의 유대… 그, 그러니…&n유대를… 강하게 하러 갈까요?

1001405651.english: Can I… close my eyes? It's not scary even if it's dark.&nI'm connected with the Commander.&nI want to feel the Commander… a little more…
1001405651.korean: 눈… 감아도 될까? 어두워도 무섭지 않아.&n사령관이랑 이어져 있잖아.&n조금 더… 사령관을 느끼고 싶어…

1001405652.english: I know nothing yet… but I'll do my best to become skilled quickly.&nSo please… teach me step by step…
1001405652.korean: 모르는 것투성이지만... 금방 능숙해지도록&n노력할게요. 그러니 하나씩 차근차근…&n알려주세요.

1001405653.english: Who said I should care about time and place?&nCan't stand it, huh? Well…
1001405653.korean: 시간과 장소를 가리라고 했던 건&n어디사는 누구셨더라~?&n못 참겠는거지? 자...

1001405654.english: Commander…&nNaughty children must be punished, right?&nAs punishment… a little more… please.
1001405654.korean: 사령관님... &n나쁜 아이는 벌을 받아야겠죠?&n벌로… 조금만 더… 해주세요.

1001405655.english: If it's okay, this time I will…&nIt's not that I'm lacking!&nTo make you happier, I've prepared something… Yes. Then…
1001405655.korean: 저... 괜찮으시면 이번엔 제가…&n부, 부족한 게 아니라!&n좀 더 기뻐하실 수 있게,&n준비해 온 게 있어서요. ...네. 그럼...

1001405656.english: Ah! It's o-okay.&nBecause the Commander wants me…&nI… Commander?&nYou can… want me more…
1001405656.korean: 꺄악! 괘, 괜찮아요.&n사령관님께서 저를 원하시는 거니…&n저… 사령관님?&n저를… 더… 원하셔도 되는데…

1001405657.english: I studied a lot… but forgot it all again.&nWill you teach me again, Commander, from one to ten?&nYes… from now…
1001405657.korean: 잔뜩 공부해왔는데... 또 전부 잊어버렸어.&n하나부터 열까지 다시 가르쳐줄래, 사령관?&n응... 지금부터...

1001405658.english: Even if I become a hero of illusion, I wanted to protect people's hearts.&nBut as I practiced, acting felt real.&nI will become someone's hero, like you.
1001405658.korean: 허상의 영웅이 되어서라도 사람들의 마음을&n지켜주고 싶었어요. 하지만 연습을 하면서&n연기가 진짜가 되는 것이 느껴져요.&n당신처럼 저도 누군가의 영웅이 되겠어요.

1001405659.english: By preparing the performance with everyone, I realized I'm not alone.&nOf course, I haven't completely overcome it…&nBut with these memories… and the Commander, I can overcome it.
1001405659.korean: 모두와 힘을 합쳐 작품을 준비하면서 내가&n외톨이가 아니라는 것을 확실히 알게 되었어.&n물론 완전히 극복한 것은 아니지만…&n이 추억과… 사령관이 있으면 극복할 수 있어.

1001405660.english: If you have time, would you like to have a health check?&n…I know you're healthy, but just in case,&nIt's my duty to support you so you can always stay in perfect condition.
1001405660.korean: 시간 나시면 건강 검진 받아 보실래요?&n...거, 건강하신 건 저도 알고 있지만 혹시나&n해서요. 언제나 만전의 상태를 유지할 수 있게&n서포트하는 것이 제 임무니까요.

1001405661.english: Building Aqua Land was tough. The others made the blueprints, so I didn't really struggle too much... but still, it's work. Can I get some good rest now?
1001405661.korean: 아쿠아 랜드 만드는 거 힘들었어. 설계도는&n다른 애들이 만들어놔서 크게 고생한 건&n없지만... 그래도 노동한 건 노동한 거니까.&n이제 좀 푹 쉬어도 되지?​

1001405662.english: You say the atmosphere has changed? ...Of course I would feel that way. Tell me exactly where and how it's changed, Commander? We both have plenty of time.
1001405662.korean: 분위기가 달라졌다고? ...당연히 그렇게&n느끼겠지. 어디가 어떻게 달라졌는지 나한테&n얘기해보겠어, 사령관? 피차 시간은 널널하잖아.​

1001405663.english: I accepted it because they said I could just lie down. Otherwise, I’d have to do other work. I absolutely hate anything bothersome...
1001405663.korean: 누워만 있어도 된대서 받아 들였어.&n아니면 다른 일을 해야 된다더라고.&n귀찮은 건 질색이니까...​

1001405664.english: Hahaha! Don't just stand there, come here. It's been a while since it's been just the two of us, hasn't it? How much more manly you've become, Commander, and how more feminine I've become... Don't you think we need a sincere conversation?
1001405664.korean: 하하핫! 가만 서있지 말고 이리 와.&n간만에 둘만 있는 거잖아? 사령관이 어떻게 더&n남자다워졌는지, 내가 어떻게 더 여자다워졌는지...&n진솔한 대화가 필요하지 않겠어?​

1001405665.english: I know the story. You lose your voice in exchange for two legs. But not being able to speak is a hassle... so how about losing your health instead? It’s the same thing—losing something.
1001405665.korean: 동화 내용은 알고 있어. 두 다리를 얻는 대신&n목소리를 잃잖아. 하지만 말을 못하면&n귀찮으니까... 대신에 건강을 잃은 걸로 어때?&n뭔가를 잃었다는 건 똑같잖아.​

1001405666.english: How about a drink? Even though it has some alcohol, this would be like plain water to the Commander. You won't get drunk. Or... do you need another excuse?
1001405666.korean: 한잔 어때? 도수가 있긴 해도 이정도는&n사령관한텐 맹물이겠지. 취할 일은 없을 거야.&n아니면... 다른 핑계거리가 필요한가?​

1001405667.english: Did you say someone got blown away on the flume ride...? It's fine, it's standard. I wrote it in the instructions to be careful because the water pressure is strong. … You want me to rebuild it? That's a hassle.
1001405667.korean: 플룸라이드에서 누가 날아갔다고...?&n괜찮아, 기본 스펙대로야. 안내문에&n적어놨어, 수압이 강력하니 주의하라고.&n…다시 만들어 달라고? 귀찮은데.​

1001405668.english: That’s a really unusual reaction~? You seem a bit uneasy, but I like seeing this side of you, Commander. There’s one way to make me even happier right here... Do you know what it is?
1001405668.korean: 평소답지 않은 반응이네~? 어쩐지 여유 없어&n보이는데, 이런 사령관 모습도 새로워서 좋은 걸.&n여기서 날 더 즐겁게 하는 방법이 하나 있는데...&n뭔지 알겠어?​

1001405669.english: Just one... The Commander took it. Give it back. You know nicotine and caffeine are essential to me—let me go. Just because you do this, I... It's only for an hour.
1001405669.korean: 슬슬 한 대... 사령관이 가져갔지. 돌려줘.&n나한테 니코틴이랑 카페인이 필수 성분인 걸&n알면서- 놔줘. 이런다고 내가... 1시간만이야.​

1001405670.english: Hmm... It tastes better like this than from a glass. As for the Commander— Haha! Looks like you liked it? Shall I drink the whole bottle in one gulp like I just did? Getting drunk isn't so bad, anyway.
1001405670.korean: 음... 잔으로 마시는 것보다 이렇게 먹는 편이&n더 맛있네. 사령관은- 하하! 맘에 들었나 봐?&n한 병은 방금처럼 쭉 마셔볼까.&n취하면 취하는대로 나쁘지 않으니까.​

1001405671.english: Want to come up? I’ve refurbished it to be soft, so it’s more comfortable than a bed. ...It’s been a while since I’ve seen the Commander this close. ...I can close this; what do you want to do? You decide, Commander.
1001405671.korean: 올라와볼래? 푹신하게 개조해놔서&n침대보다 편안해. ...이렇게 가까이서 사령관을&n보는 건 오랜만이네. ...이거 닫을 수 있는데&n어떻게 할래? 사령관이 정해.​

1001405672.english: Keeping me on edge doesn't suit me. It was fun seeing the Commander's eyes widen, butやっぱり—this is more like me. You like this way too, Commander, right?
1001405672.korean: 애태우는 건 나랑 안 맞네. 사령관 눈이&n커다래지는 건 재밌었지만 역시-&n이게 더 나답지. 사령관도 이쪽이 좋지?​

1001405673.english: ...I can just stay put, right? Make sure to clean up the mess.

1001405674.english: ...Are you going to be satisfied with just a taste?

1001405675.english: Stop talking about voices.&nAnyway, no one else will hear it but the commander…&nThere's no one else to tell besides the commander.&nYou understand what I mean, right?
1001405675.korean: 목소리 얘기 그만해.&n어차피 사령관 아니면 들을 애도 없고...&n사령관 말고 들려줄 사람도 없으니까.&n무슨 뜻인지 알겠지?​

1001405676.english: Of course, commander. You're a man I can respect. But…&nYou're still lacking. Put more sincerity into it.&nSo… completely break me.
1001405676.korean: 역시 사령관. 내가 인정한 남자답네. 하지만...&n한참 모자란 걸. 좀 더 진심으로 해봐.&n그래서... 날 완전히 무너뜨려봐.​

1001405677.english: When you're free, sleep a bit. Once you close your eyes,&nyou don't know when you'll wake… but if needed,&nthe commander will wake you. In a fairy tale way.&n…Ah, that was another story.
1001405677.korean: 한가할 때 좀 자두게. 한번 눈 감으면&n언제 일어날지 모르지만... 필요하면&n사령관이 깨워주겠지. 동화 속 방식으로.&n...아, 그건 다른 얘기였나.​

1001405678.english: The important thing is to learn the mindset.&nI realized it late, but isn't what comes next what matters?&nAren't you looking forward to the future, commander?
1001405678.korean: 중요한 건 마음가짐이란 걸 배웠지.&n늦게 깨달았지만 이제부터가 중요한 거&n아니겠어? 앞으로가 기대되지 않아, 사령관?​

1001405679.english: Since I'm dressed like this anyway, shall I sing a song? Haha, it's an upbeat song, so don't worry too much.
1001405679.korean: 이왕 이렇게 입은 거 노래나 불러볼까?&n하하, 신나는 노래니까 너무 걱정하지는 말라고.​

1001405680.english: Talonfeather and Quick Camel brought out some old-fashioned magazines and underwear. My curiosity was piqued before I knew it... so I tried them on...
1001405680.korean: 탈론페더와 퀵 카멜이 구시대의&n잡지와 속옷들을 가져다 주더군.&n나도 모르게 호기심이 동해서… 입어봤다…​

1001405681.english: I am the Empress's hound. Following the Empress's command, I destroyed my targets and annihilated my enemies. I also undertook the execution of traitors. Come to think of it… I saw a familiar face.
1001405681.korean: 나는 여제님의 사냥개다. 여제님의 명에 따라&n목표를 파괴하고, 적을 멸절했다. 또한&n배신자들의 처형도 맡았지. 그러고보니…&n낯익은 얼굴이 보이더군.​

1001405682.english: I think I understand a little bit why others follow you. It doesn't seem to be simply because you are human. However, since the reason isn't clear yet... I need to get to know you even better.
1001405682.korean: 왜 다른 이들이 너를 따르는지 조금은 알 거&n같다. 단순히 인간이라서 그런 건 아닌 거 같군.&n하지만 아직 이유가 명확하지 않으니…&n더욱 너를 알아야겠다.​

1001405683.english: They say that back in the day, no one would suspect anything if you wore clothes like this. That's why there were even instances of people robbing banks while dressed in this outfit!
1001405683.korean: 옛날에는 이런 복장을 하면 아무도&n의심하지 않았다고 해. 그래서 이 옷을 입고&n은행을 터는 일도 있었다니까?​

1001405684.english: Just in case... did your subordinates tell you to go see me? ... ... Seeing that you can't answer, it must be true... Is it a werewolf?
1001405684.korean: 혹시나 해서 묻는데… 부하들이&n지금 나에게 가보라고 하던가?&n……대답을 못하는 것을 보니 맞군…&n워울프인가?​

1001405685.english: I dislike disarray. I also dislike improper behavior. I do not expect everyone to live exactly like me, but I hope you will tolerate reprimanding those who break the rules.
1001405685.korean: 흐트러진 것은 싫다. 바르지 못한 것도 싫다.&n모두가 나처럼 사는 것까지는 바라지&n않지만, 규칙을 어긴 자를 훈계하는 건&n용납해 주길 바란다.​

1001405686.english: Huh? Ah... is that you? I was listening to a recording from a long time ago. The conversation I had with you. But now that you're right here beside me... I guess I don't need to listen to it.
1001405686.korean: 응? 아… 너인가? 옛날에 녹음했던 것을&n듣고 있었다. 너랑 대화했던 것을 말이다.&n하지만 지금 네가 옆에 있으니…&n들을 필요가 없겠군.​

1001405687.english: You're asking if I shouldn't drink or smoke while wearing this outfit? There's no way the Light would be that stingy.
1001405687.korean: 이 옷을 입고 술 마시고&n담배 피우면 안 되는 거 아니냐고?&n빛께서 그렇게 쫀쫀할리 없잖아.​

1001405688.english: Hmm... um... since you're here anyway... would you like to stop by for a cup of tea? Scarabya gifted me some nice tea a while ago...
1001405688.korean: 음… 저기… 이왕 왔으니…&n잠시 차 한잔 하고 가겠나?&n얼마 전에 스카라비아가&n좋은 차를 선물하더군…​

1001405689.english: You mean this? It's a voice recorder. Since memories fade faster than you think, I use it often when I need to recall old memories. Plus, it's effective against guys who break promises or lie.
1001405689.korean: 이것 말인가? 녹음기다. 기억은 생각보다&n빨리 풍화되는 것이다 보니 옛 기억을 떠올릴 때&n애용하지. 덤으로 약속을 지키지 않거나,&n거짓말 하는 녀석들에게도 유효하다.​

1001405690.english: I like things that are clear and proper, like commands, laws, rules, discipline, symmetry, and straight lines. You just have to act exactly according to them. But it gets annoying when emotions get involved. It just makes things unclear... That's why you're such a hassle these days. Hehe.
1001405690.korean: 나는 명령, 법, 규칙, 규율, 대칭, 직선처럼&n명확하고 바른 게 좋다. 딱 거기에 맞춰서&n행동하면 되니. 하지만 여기에 감정이 개입되면&n귀찮다. 명확해지지 않으니… 그래서 요즘&n너 때문에 너무 귀찮다. 후후.​

1001405691.english: The reason I'm wearing this outfit? Hmm... I saw a movie where the main character was wearing this outfit. Want to watch it together? Don't worry, there are hundreds of them.
1001405691.korean: 내가 이 옷을 입은 이유? 음… 이 옷을 입은&n주인공이 나오는 영화를 봤거든. 같이 볼래?&n수백 편은 있으니까 걱정하지 말라고.​

1001405692.english: This pillow was a gift from A-15 Salamander. I don't know what it is, but it had "Yes" written on both the front and back. Huh? Do you know?
1001405692.korean: 이 베개는 샐러맨더가 선물한 거다.&n뭔지는 모르겠지만 앞뒤로 예스라고&n써 있더군. 응? 그대는 알고 있나?​

1001405693.english: The military discipline here is excessively lax. If you give me command, I will restore order. First, following the example of Sun Tzu and Peng Yue, I will behead a few of them.
1001405693.korean: 이곳은 군기가 지나치게 해이해져 있더군.&n나에게 명령권을 주면 군기를 바로잡겠다.&n우선은 손무와 팽월을 본 받아&n몇 명의 목을 베겠다.​

1001405694.english: I think I understand a little bit why others follow you. It doesn't seem to be simply because you are human. However, since the reason isn't clear yet... I need to get to know you even better.
1001405694.korean: 왜 다른 이들이 너를 따르는지 조금은 알 거&n같다. 단순히 인간이라서 그런 건 아닌 거 같군.&n하지만 아직 이유가 명확하지 않으니…&n더욱 너를 알아야겠다.​

1001405695.english: I asked Charlotte to lend me some clothes... but there was a bit of a size difference. Besides, it was the only set, so I couldn't get them altered. So I went to the Kohei Order and borrowed them. I'm telling you, it's true! I swear by the light.
1001405695.korean: 샬럿한테 옷을 빌려달라고 했는데…&n사이즈 차이가 좀 나더라고. 더군다나 한 벌&n밖에 없는 옷이라 수선할 수도 없고 말이야.&n그래서 코헤이 교단에 가서 빌려왔지.&n진짜라니까? 빛에 맹세코.​

1001405696.english: Ah, come to think of it, T-40 Hyena and T-4 Kheshig gave me a scented candle. I put it somewhere around here… Ah. Here it is. Would you like to smell it?
1001405696.korean: 아, 그러고보니 하이에나와 케시크가&n향초를 선물했다. 여기 어디에 뒀는데…&n아. 여깄군. 한 번 향을 맡아보겠나?​

1001405697.english: Prototype Labiata, Lemonade Alpha, the Invincible Dragon… I still don’t know why they follow you. They aren’t the kind of people who would follow simply because they are human… I will keep a close eye on you.
1001405697.korean: 라비아타, 레모네이드 알파, 무적의 용…&n이들이 왜 너를 따르는 지는 아직 모르겠다.&n단순히 인간이라서 따를 이들이 아닌데…&n너를 좀 더 지켜보겠다.​

1001405698.english: Huh? Ah... is that you? I was listening to a recording from a long time ago. The conversation I had with you. But now that you're right here beside me... I guess I don't need to listen to it.
1001405698.korean: 응? 아… 너인가? 옛날에 녹음했던 것을&n듣고 있었다. 너랑 대화했던 것을 말이다.&n하지만 지금 네가 옆에 있으니…&n들을 필요가 없겠군.​

1001405699.english: If I wear this outfit, I can become anything. A devil, a vengeful murderer, a holy servant, a great saint. And… I could even become a seductive woman who tempts men… Right now… what do you think? Hehe.
1001405699.korean: 이 옷을 입으면 무엇이든 될 수 있어.&n악마, 복수에 미친 살인마, 거룩한 봉사자,&n위대한 성자. 그리고… 남자를 유혹하는 색녀가&n될 수도 있어… 지금은… 어떤 거 같아? 후후.​

1001405700.english: Ugh! Ah, no. I'm sorry. I have a strange feeling right now... Um... could you... stay by my side just a little longer?
1001405700.korean: 읏! 아, 아니. 미안하다.&n지금 뭔가 이상한 기분이 들어서…&n저… 조금만… 더… 곁에 있어주겠나?​

1001405701.english: You say it seems like we run into each other often lately? Is it just your imagination? Since we've crossed paths, let me ask... may I accompany you? The reason? ...Can you wait a moment? I'll think about it now.
1001405701.korean: 요즘 자주 마주치는 거 같다고?&n기분탓 아닌가? 이왕 마주친 김에 묻는데…&n동행해도 되겠나? 이유? …잠시만&n기다려 줄 수 있나? 지금 생각해보겠다. ​

1001405702.english: I like things that are clear and proper, like commands, laws, rules, discipline, symmetry, and straight lines. You just have to act exactly according to them. But it gets annoying when emotions get involved. It just makes things unclear... That's why you're such a hassle these days. Hehe.
1001405702.korean: 나는 명령, 법, 규칙, 규율, 대칭, 직선처럼&n명확하고 바른 게 좋다. 딱 거기에 맞춰서&n행동하면 되니. 하지만 여기에 감정이 개입되면&n귀찮다. 명확해지지 않으니… 그래서 요즘&n너 때문에 너무 귀찮다. 후후.​

1001405703.english: You will be punished by heaven if you lay a hand on a clergyman...

1001405704.english: Wait, hold on! Isn't this too rushed?
1001405704.korean: 자, 잠깐! 너무 급한 거 아닌가! ​

1001405705.english: Choose the one you like. Decapitation, boiling, dismemberment, burning at the stake, slicing, drowning by force, dismemberment by the waist, crushing to death. If you do not like these, there is also castration.
1001405705.korean: 마음에 드는 것으로 골라라.&n참수형, 팽형, 거열형, 화형,&n능지형, 익수형, 요참형, 압사형.&n이것들이 싫다면 궁형도 있다.​

1001405706.english: Ugh! … ​​Even though I am ignorant about the affection between men and women, I recently learned that the situation, place, and time are important when it comes to making love. … Right now, I think my room… is the most suitable…
1001405706.korean: 읏! …내가 남녀의 정에는 무지해도&n운우지정에는 상황과 장소와 시간이&n 중요하다는 것을 최근에 배웠다.&n…지금이라면 내 방이…&n가장 알맞다고… 생각한다...​

1001405707.english: Is it because I'm wearing this outfit?&nOr because it's me?&nIf I had to choose... I'd rather it be the latter...
1001405707.korean: 이 옷을 입어서 그런 거야?&n아니면 나라서 그런 거야?&n이왕이면… 후자였으면 좋겠는데…​

1001405708.english: T-this... this is the underwear I wore for this purpose, but...&ntoday, I want to take it slow, for a long time...&nto make love. Could you do that for me?
1001405708.korean: 이… 이러기 위해서 입은 속옷이긴 하지만…&n그… 오늘은 천천히 오랫동안…&n사랑을 하고 싶다. 그래 줄 수 있나?​

1001405709.english: Weren't you taught not to touch someone else's body without permission?&nWhat? Because I'm cute? You think that counts as a reason?&n......Just a little, then.
1001405709.korean: 함부로 남의 몸에 손대지 말라고 못 배웠나?&n뭐? 귀여워서? 그게 이유가 될 거라 생각했나?&n……조금만이다.​

1001405710.english: Ugh! ...Even if I'm ignorant of love between man and woman,&nI've recently learned that for passion, time, place,&nand circumstance matter most.&n...And right now, my room...&nI think it's the most suitable place...
1001405710.korean: 읏! …내가 남녀의 정에는 무지해도&n운우지정에는 상황과 장소와 시간이&n 중요하다는 것을 최근에 배웠다.&n…지금이라면 내 방이…&n가장 알맞다고… 생각한다...​

1001405711.english: Werewolf says: Commander, the night is long,&nand the space beside me is empty, so what shall I do?&nIt's because this Werewolf longs for the Commander.&nWhen a follower calls, shouldn't you answer? Hmm?
1001405711.korean: 워울프가 가로되 사령관이시여 긴 밤이 외롭고&n옆자리가 공허하니 이를 어찌하오리까. 이는&n워울프가 사령관을 그리워하기 때문이외다.&n신도가 부르는데 답해줘야지? 응?​

1001405712.english: There's a magazine I've been reading.&nWould you pick which one you like?&nIf you choose, I'll... wear that one for you.
1001405712.korean: 내가 보던 잡지가 있다.&n어떤 게 마음에 드는지 골라주겠나?&n그대가 고르면… 그것을 입도록 하겠다.​

1001405713.english: I'll say it again, I know nothing of love between man and woman.&nI may disappoint you. No... I surely will.&nIf I do disappoint you... then cast me aside whenever you wish.&nI beg you.
1001405713.korean: 다시 말하지만 나는 남녀의 정에 무지하다.&n너를 실망시킬지도 모른다. 아니… 분명&n실망시키겠지. 내가 너를 실망시킨다면…&n언제든지 나를 내쳐라. 부탁한다.​

1001405714.english: My wish? Hmm… to sit on a long chair,&nbasking in the warm sunlight, leisurely listening&nto the sounds around me? And… I'd like you, Commander,&nto be by my side. Hehe, just like now.
1001405714.korean: 제 소원 말인가요? 음… 긴 의자에 앉아,&n따뜻한 햇살을 받으며, 느긋하게 주위 소리를&n듣는 거랍니다? 그리고… 그 옆에 사령관님께서&n계셨으면 좋겠어요. 후후, 지금처럼요.​

1001405715.english: Special training has made my body more flexible! There are moves&nI couldn't do with the Commander before…&nY-yoga, I mean! Of course… that's possible too.
1001405715.korean: 특훈으로 몸이 더 유연해졌어요! 이전에&n사령관이랑 할 수 없었던 동작들도…&n요, 요가 말이에요! 물론... 그것도 가능하지만요.​

1001405716.english: When I was finally able to release the feelings I'd held for so long,&nyou can't imagine how happy I was. Hm? Wasn't it hard?&nOf course, there were hard times. But… if you love enough&nfor even the waiting to become joy, then it's fine.
1001405716.korean: 오래 간직한 마음을 마침내 풀어낼 수 있게 되자&n얼마나 기뻤는지 몰라요. 네? 힘들진 않았냐고요?&n물론 힘들 때도 있었어요. 하지만… 그 기다림&n조차도 기쁨이 될 정도로 연모하면 괜찮답니다?​

1001405717.english: I can't say I'm positive in my self-introduction anymore.&nEven being apart from the Commander for a short while makes me&na little uneasy. So… will you allow me&nto stay by your side again today?
1001405717.korean: 자기소개로 긍정적이라고는 더 말 못하겠네요.&n사령관이랑 잠시라도 떨어지면 살짝 불안해&n졌거든요. 그러니 오늘도 곁에 있는 걸 허락해&n주시겠어요?​

1001405718.english: Doom Bringer's confidential documents? Whose files&ndo you want to access? Me… you mean?&nHehe. Then I'll tell you directly.
1001405718.korean: 둠 브링어의 기밀문서요? 누구의 자료를&n열람하시길 원하시나요? 저… 말씀이신가요?&n후후. 그러면 제가 직접 알려드릴게요.​

1001405719.english: I used to be the type to share good things,&nbut I must have changed a lot. At least with the Commander…&nI just want to spend time together like this,&nfrom sunrise to sunset.
1001405719.korean: 좋은 건 나누자는 편이었는데, 저 많이&n달라졌나봐요. 다른 건 몰라도 사령관만큼은…&n이렇게 둘이서만 시간을 보내고 싶어요.&n해가 뜰 때부터 저물 때까지요.​

1001405720.english: My wish? Hmm… to sit on a long chair,&nbasking in the warm sunlight, leisurely listening&nto the sounds around me? And… I'd like you, Commander,&nto be by my side. Hehe, just like now.
1001405720.korean: 제 소원 말인가요? 음… 긴 의자에 앉아,&n따뜻한 햇살을 받으며, 느긋하게 주위 소리를&n듣는 거랍니다? 그리고… 그 옆에 사령관님께서&n계셨으면 좋겠어요. 후후, 지금처럼요.​

1001405721.english: Special training has made my body more flexible! There are moves&nI couldn't do with the Commander before…&nY-yoga, I mean! Of course… that's possible too.
1001405721.korean: 특훈으로 몸이 더 유연해졌어요! 이전에&n사령관이랑 할 수 없었던 동작들도…&n요, 요가 말이에요! 물론... 그것도 가능하지만요.​

1001405722.english: When I was finally able to release the feelings I'd held for so long,&nyou can't imagine how happy I was. Hm? Wasn't it hard?&nOf course, there were hard times. But… if you love enough&nfor even the waiting to become joy, then it's fine.
1001405722.korean: 오래 간직한 마음을 마침내 풀어낼 수 있게 되자&n얼마나 기뻤는지 몰라요. 네? 힘들진 않았냐고요?&n물론 힘들 때도 있었어요. 하지만… 그 기다림&n조차도 기쁨이 될 정도로 연모하면 괜찮답니다?​

1001405723.english: I can't say I'm positive in my self-introduction anymore.&nEven being apart from the Commander for a short while makes me&na little uneasy. So… will you allow me&nto stay by your side again today?
1001405723.korean: 자기소개로 긍정적이라고는 더 말 못하겠네요.&n사령관이랑 잠시라도 떨어지면 살짝 불안해&n졌거든요. 그러니 오늘도 곁에 있는 걸 허락해&n주시겠어요?​

1001405724.english: Doom Bringer's confidential documents? Whose files&ndo you want to access? Me… you mean?&nHehe. Then I'll tell you directly.
1001405724.korean: 둠 브링어의 기밀문서요? 누구의 자료를&n열람하시길 원하시나요? 저… 말씀이신가요?&n후후. 그러면 제가 직접 알려드릴게요.​

1001405725.english: I used to be the type to share good things,&nbut I must have changed a lot. At least with the Commander…&nI just want to spend time together like this,&nfrom sunrise to sunset.
1001405725.korean: 좋은 건 나누자는 편이었는데, 저 많이&n달라졌나봐요. 다른 건 몰라도 사령관만큼은…&n이렇게 둘이서만 시간을 보내고 싶어요.&n해가 뜰 때부터 저물 때까지요.​

1001405726.english: How could feelings knotted for so long&ndisappear in just one night?&nI beg of you… please enjoy me to your heart's content…
1001405726.korean: 오랫동안 응어리진 마음이 어찌&n하룻밤 만에 사라질 수 있을까요.&n부디 바라건대… 저를 마음껏 즐겨주시길…​

1001405727.english: You're not going to end it with just simple affection, right?&nI know it's not enough. And since it's our day off too…&nwhat do you think?
1001405727.korean: 단순한 애정표현으로 끝내실 건 아니죠?&n부족하다는 거 알아요. 마침 쉬는 날도 겹쳤으니…&n어떠세요?​

1001405728.english: How could feelings knotted for so long&ndisappear in just one night?&nI beg of you… please enjoy me to your heart's content…
1001405728.korean: 오랫동안 응어리진 마음이 어찌&n하룻밤 만에 사라질 수 있을까요.&n부디 바라건대… 저를 마음껏 즐겨주시길…​

1001405729.english: You're not going to end it with just simple affection, right?&nI know it's not enough. And since it's our day off too…&nwhat do you think?
1001405729.korean: 단순한 애정표현으로 끝내실 건 아니죠?&n부족하다는 거 알아요. 마침 쉬는 날도 겹쳤으니…&n어떠세요?​

1001405730.english: After discussing it with my colleagues at Watcher of Nature, I opened a shaved ice shop. I determined that it suited my abilities and was the best way to increase my interactions with people.
1001405730.korean: 와쳐 오브 네이쳐 동료들과 의논하여 빙수가게&n를 열었습니다. 저의 능력에 적합하고, 사람들&n과 교류를 늘리기에 가장 좋은 방법 이라고&n판단했습니다.​

1001405731.english: I am the Admiral of the Vampire Pirates, Pirate Princess! An adventurer who roams the five oceans and six continents in pursuit of romance and treasure! Now! Won't you set off on an adventure with me?
1001405731.korean: 짐은 뱀파이어 파이러츠의 제독 파이러츠&n프린세스이니라! 오대양 육대주를 누비며&n로망과 보물을 추구하는 모험가지! 자!&n짐과 함께 모험을 떠나보지 않겠느냐?​

1001405732.english: I started selling drinks for the Commander. … But sales are going so well that I don't have time to talk to the Commander… Look… Someone else has come to order.
1001405732.korean: 사령관을 위해서 음료 판매를 시작했다.&n… 하지만 판매가 너무 잘 돼서 사령관이랑&n이야기할 시간이 없다… 봐라… 또 누가&n주문하러 왔다.​

1001405733.english: We are keeping a close eye on the members with low mental ages. They might get sick if they eat too much shaved ice.
1001405733.korean: 정신 연령이 낮은 대원들은 유심히 관찰하고&n있습니다. 빙수를 너무 많이 먹으면 탈이 날&n수도 있으니까요.​

1001405734.english: Um... how is that kid's reaction? They took on a new role to fit the attraction... I hope they aren't disappointed. They like it? That's a relief...
1001405734.korean: 저기… 그 아이는 반응이 어떻지? 어트랙션에&n맞춰서 새로운 역을 맡았는데… 그 아이가&n실망하지 않기를 바란다. 좋아한다고?&n다행이다…​

1001405735.english: Selling beverages is harder than you might think. Rather than the physical strain, predicting customer demand or density, and above all, conversing with customers, is difficult.
1001405735.korean: 음료 판매라는 것은 생각보다 어렵다. 몸이&n고달픈 것보다는 고객의 수요나 고객의&n밀도를 예측하는 것, 그리고 무엇보다도&n고객과 대화하는 것이 힘들다.​

1001405736.english: Sometimes I recall how my past self lived on the Ark. I… came to the conclusion that returning to my past self is irreversible. … I feel fear.
1001405736.korean: 가끔은 과거의 제가 어떻게 방주에서 지냈는지&n떠올려봅니다. 저는… 과거의 저로 돌아가는&n것은 비가역적이라는 결론을 내렸습니다.&n…두려움을 느낍니다. ​

1001405737.english: Pirates Princess is more popular than I expected. I wish a professional writer would create a Pirates Princess spin-off series…
1001405737.korean: 예상보다 파이러츠 프린세스가 인기가 좋구나.&n전문 작가가 스핀오프로 파이러츠 프린세스&n시리즈를 만들어 주면 좋으련만…​

1001405738.english: Walking around constantly carrying a drink container is a bit tiring, even for someone like me. I'm especially thirsty because I've been sweating so much. Commander, some water... Huh? W-pretend you didn't hear that!
1001405738.korean: 음료통을 지고 계속 돌아다니니까 아무리&n나라도 조금은 힘들다. 특히나 땀을 너무&n많이 흘려서 목이 마르다. 사령관, 물 좀…&n어? 모, 못 들은 것으로 해라!​

1001405739.english: While opening the shaved ice shop, I had conversations with members I hadn't interacted with before. The old me wouldn't have been able to open the shop, let alone have a conversation. All of this is thanks to you, Manager.
1001405739.korean: 빙수 가게를 여는 동안 지금까지 교류가 없었던&n대원들과 대화를 나눴습니다. 옛날의 저라면&n대화를 나누기는 커녕 가게를 열지도 못했을&n것입니다. 이 모든 것은 관리자님 덕분입니다.​

1001405740.english: Ahem. I say this to you, children. Pirates are inherently bad guys, so don't look at my cool side and say you want to become a pirate when you grow up, okay?
1001405740.korean: 흠흠. 어린이 여러분에게 고한다. 해적은 원래&n나쁜 놈들이니 짐의 멋진 모습만 보고 나중에&n자라서 해적이 되겠다는 소리를 하면 안된다?​

1001405741.english: At first, I sold beer. However, a city guard superintendent confiscated it, warning that consuming alcohol while swimming is dangerous. Later, when I looked for the superintendent, I found her sleeping drunk under a parasol.
