1001405741.korean: 처음에는 맥주를 팔았다. 하지만 시티 가드의&n경정이 물놀이 때 알코올 섭취는 위험하다고&n해서 맥주를 압수했다. 나중에 그 경정을 찾아&n보니 파라솔 밑에서 술에 취해 자고 있었다.​

1001405742.english: While I was opening the shop, I kept waiting for the manager to arrive. The wait was long, but... it wasn't bothersome at all because I knew he would come eventually.
1001405742.korean: 가게를 여는 동안 관리자님께서 언제 오시나&n계속 기다리고 있었습니다. 기다리는 시간은&n길었지만… 언젠가 오실 것을 알았기에 전혀&n괴롭지 않았습니다.

1001405743.english: Where are you looking, Captain! It looks like you're looking at my feet... Haha! Do you want to be trampled by me like a cannonball, too? How utterly pathetic... Huh? Really?
1001405743.korean: 어딜 보고 있느냐 선장! 짐의 발을 보고 있는&n듯 한데… 하하! 선장도 대포처럼 짐에게&n밟히고 싶은 것이더냐? 한심하기 그지 없구…&n어? 진짜로?​

1001405744.english: This swimsuit? Is, is it weird? If it's weird, I'll take it off! Ah... um... I heard this is... the best swimsuit... so... um... is it... pretty? If it's pretty... that's good.
1001405744.korean: 이 수영복? 이, 이상한가? 이상하면 벗겠다!&n아… 응… 이게… 제일 잘 가는 수영복이라는&n말을 들어서… 저기… 예쁜…가?예쁘면… 좋다.

1001405745.english: Manager, it is almost time for the shift change, so could you please wait? I would like to tour Aqua Land with you.
1001405745.korean: 관리자님, 조금만 있으면 교대할 시간이니&n기다려 주실 수 있으십니까? 관리자님과 함께&n아쿠아 랜드를 둘러보고 싶습니다.​

1001405746.english: There are so many who long for me that I have no time to rest. Therefore, Captain! Come to my side! Having you by my side is my greatest rest!
1001405746.korean: 짐을 바라는 이들이 많으니 쉴 시간이 없구나.&n그러니 선장! 짐의 곁으로 오라! 그대가 곁에&n있는 것이 짐의 최고의 휴식이니!

1001405747.english: Actually, I’d like to play in the water too… but I’ve never properly learned how to swim, so I’m worried about making a fool of myself. Huh? You don’t have to swim? … … Th-then, why don’t we play in the water together?
1001405747.korean: 사실 나도 물놀이하고 싶다… 하지만 수영을&n제대로 배운 적이 없어서 창피한 꼴을 보일까&n봐 걱정이 된다. 응? 꼭 수영할 필요는 없다고?&n……그, 그러면 같이 물놀이 하지 않겠나?​

1001405748.english: Warning. Contact during shaved ice preparation poses a risk of frostbite.
1001405748.korean: 경고. 빙수 제조 중 접촉은 동상의 위험이&n있습니다.​

1001405749.english: Do you... do you want to become shark bait!

1001405750.english: Ha, don't do this when I'm in the middle of a busy time!
1001405750.korean: 하, 한창 바쁠 때 이러지 마라!​

1001405751.english: Abnormal situation detected. Due to elevated heart rate&nand body temperature, shaved ice production&nis impossible. While this abnormal state persists…&nAdministrator… please carry the act through to the end.
1001405751.korean: 이상 상황 발생. 심박수와 체온의 상승에 따라&n빙수 제조가 불가능해집니다. 이상 상황이&n지속되는 동안… 관리자님께선… 행위를 끝까지&n해주시길 바랍니다.​

1001405752.english: Ah, I am truly a sinful woman. To think a new victim has&nfallen for my beauty. It can't be helped.&nI shall reap the sins I've sown.&nIf you touch and run away, I won't let it slide, you know?
1001405752.korean: 아아, 짐은 참으로 죄가 많은 여자로다. 짐의&n아름다움에 취한 새로운 희생양이 생겨나다니.&n어쩔 수 없구나. 짐이 뿌린 죄악은 짐이&n거두도록 하겠다. 만지고 도망가는 거면 가만&n안 둘 거야?

1001405753.english: Ah, no matter how much I knead, it won't come out!&n……Not yet…
1001405753.korean: 아, 아무리 주물러도 아, 안 나온다!&n……아직은…​

1001405754.english: According to the Queen of Maine's suggestion, the shaved ice price&nis set differently depending on the customer. Administrator…&ndepending on the number of shaved ice… from hugs…&nto special courses… please check the menu for details.
1001405754.korean: 퀸 오브 메인의 제안에 따라 빙수 가격은 손님&n에 따라 다르게 책정되었습니다. 관리자님은…&n빙수 숫자에 따라… 포옹부터… 특별 코스까지…&n자세한 것은 메뉴판을 봐주시길…​

1001405755.english: If I play the role of vampire Princess, then I am the vampire Princess.&nIf I play the role of Pirates Princess, then I am the Pirates Princess.&nNo matter what role I take, what doesn't change…&nis that I am the one who loves you… Hehehe.
1001405755.korean: 뱀파이어 프린세스 역을 맡으면 뱀파이어&n프린세스로, 파이러츠 프린세스 역을 맡으면&n파이러츠 프린세스로. 어떤 역을 맡아도 내가&n나라는 것은 변하지 않는다. 어떤 역을 맡아도…&n그대를 사랑하는… 나다… 후후후.​

1001405756.english: To help the Commander suffering in the heat, I started selling drinks.&nIn the end, I think it was the right thing to do. Thanks to that,&nthe members need me and call for me.&nAnd… now that I know the Commander's heart,&nthere could be nothing happier.
1001405756.korean: 더위에 괴로워하는 사령관을 위해 음료를&n팔기 시작했다. 결과적으로는 잘한 일이라&n생각한다. 덕분에 대원들이 나를 필요로 하고&n나를 부른다. 그리고…사령관의 마음을 알게&n됐으니 이보다 행복한 건 없을 것이다.

1001405757.english: ...Are you going to keep asking how old I am? It doesn't bother me anymore. That's part of the reason you fell for me, isn't it, Commander? Isn't that right?
1001405757.korean: ...자꾸 몇 살이냐고 물어볼 거야? 이젠 아무렇&n지도 않네요. 그 점까지 포함해서 사령관이&n나한테 반한 거잖아? 안 그래?​

1001405758.english: Every time I recalled the fake memories of my family, it was painful… But now I'm fine. I have Orca comrades, friends… and I have you.
1001405758.korean: 가족들에 대한 가짜 기억을 떠올릴 때마다&n괴로웠어요… 하지만 지금은 괜찮아요. 오르카&n의 동료, 친구들이 있고… 당신이 있으니까요.​

1001405759.english: The reason classics have lasted until now is because they're like answers that work in any situation. For example… expressions like I love you, that classic line. What do you think? It still works now, doesn't it?
1001405759.korean: 클래식이 왜 지금까지 이어졌냐면 어떤 상황&n에서든 통하는 답 같은 거라 그래. 예를 들어…&nI love you 같은 고전적인 표현 있잖아. 어때?&n지금도 먹히지?​

1001405760.english: I can feel your heart… Can you feel mine? A hint—it's the same as yours. Hehe, I've told you too much.
1001405760.korean: 당신의 마음이 느껴지네요… 당신은 저의 마음&n이 느껴지시나요? ​힌트를 드리자면… 당신의&n마음과 같아요. 후후, 너무 많은 것을 알려&n드렸네요.

1001405761.english: Someday, I want to ride a bike and travel leisurely. With you on the back, going around the world. Even if nothing special happens, wouldn't that still be romantic enough?
1001405761.korean: 언젠가 바이크를 타고 느긋이 여행가고 싶네.&n뒤에 사령관을 태우고 세계를 일주하는 거야.&n특별한 일이 일어나진 않아도 충분히 로맨틱&n하지 않아?​

1001405762.english: I was afraid of failure, afraid of becoming useless. But now I'm okay, because I know you'll believe in me. That's why… I won't disappoint you.
1001405762.korean: 실패가 두려웠고, 쓸모가 없어지는 것이 두려&n웠어요. 하지만 이제는 괜찮아요. 당신이 저를&n믿어주실 것을 알고 있으니까요. 그렇기에&n당신을 실망시키지 않겠어요.​

1001405763.english: ...Are you going to keep asking how old I am? It doesn't bother me anymore. That's part of the reason you fell for me, isn't it, Commander? Isn't that right?
1001405763.korean: ...자꾸 몇 살이냐고 물어볼 거야? 이젠 아무렇&n지도 않네요. 그 점까지 포함해서 사령관이&n나한테 반한 거잖아? 안 그래?​

1001405764.english: Every time I recalled the fake memories of my family, it was painful… But now I'm fine. I have Orca comrades, friends… and I have you.
1001405764.korean: 가족들에 대한 가짜 기억을 떠올릴 때마다&n괴로웠어요… 하지만 지금은 괜찮아요. 오르카&n의 동료, 친구들이 있고… 당신이 있으니까요.​

1001405765.english: The reason classics have lasted until now is because they're like answers that work in any situation. For example… expressions like I love you, that classic line. What do you think? It still works now, doesn't it?
1001405765.korean: 클래식이 왜 지금까지 이어졌냐면 어떤 상황&n에서든 통하는 답 같은 거라 그래. 예를 들어…&nI love you 같은 고전적인 표현 있잖아. 어때?&n지금도 먹히지?​

1001405766.english: I can feel your heart… Can you feel mine? A hint—it's the same as yours. Hehe, I've told you too much.
1001405766.korean: 당신의 마음이 느껴지네요… 당신은 저의 마음&n이 느껴지시나요? ​힌트를 드리자면… 당신의&n마음과 같아요. 후후, 너무 많은 것을 알려&n드렸네요.

1001405767.english: Someday, I want to ride a bike and travel leisurely. With you on the back, going around the world. Even if nothing special happens, wouldn't that still be romantic enough?
1001405767.korean: 언젠가 바이크를 타고 느긋이 여행가고 싶네.&n뒤에 사령관을 태우고 세계를 일주하는 거야.&n특별한 일이 일어나진 않아도 충분히 로맨틱&n하지 않아?​

1001405768.english: I was afraid of failure, afraid of becoming useless. But now I'm okay, because I know you'll believe in me. That's why… I won't disappoint you.
1001405768.korean: 실패가 두려웠고, 쓸모가 없어지는 것이 두려&n웠어요. 하지만 이제는 괜찮아요. 당신이 저를&n믿어주실 것을 알고 있으니까요. 그렇기에&n당신을 실망시키지 않겠어요.​

1001405769.english: That's not a handle, but you're doing it on purpose, aren't you? … Doesn't matter, the engine's started. I can't control myself anymore, so be ready, Commander?
1001405769.korean: 거긴 손잡이가 아니래도 일부러 그러네? …&n몰라, 시동 걸렸어. 나도 이제 주체 못하니까&n각오해, 사령관?​

1001405770.english: When you're by my side, the pain lessens, and every time your touch reaches me, I feel happiness. So… stay by my side… keep touching me.
1001405770.korean: 당신이 곁에 있으면 고통이 줄어들고, 당신의&n손길이 닿을 때마다 행복해져요. 그러니…&n계속 제 곁에서… 저를 만져주세요.​

1001405771.english: That's not a handle, but you're doing it on purpose, aren't you? … Doesn't matter, the engine's started. I can't control myself anymore, so be ready, Commander?
1001405771.korean: 거긴 손잡이가 아니래도 일부러 그러네? …&n몰라, 시동 걸렸어. 나도 이제 주체 못하니까&n각오해, 사령관?​

1001405772.english: When you're by my side, the pain lessens, and every time your touch reaches me, I feel happiness. So… stay by my side… keep touching me.
1001405772.korean: 당신이 곁에 있으면 고통이 줄어들고, 당신의&n손길이 닿을 때마다 행복해져요. 그러니…&n계속 제 곁에서… 저를 만져주세요.​

1001405773.english: I managed to find a tube I liked, but I spent a long time thinking about it because I couldn't find a swimsuit I liked. After all, it is a vacation for everyone to be on together... and above all, it is a summer vacation with the Commander.
1001405773.korean: 마음에 드는 튜브는 구했는데 마음에 드는&n수영복이 없어서 한참을 고민했습니다.&n아무래도 모두가 함께하는 휴가이다 보니…&n무엇보다 사령관님과 함께하는&n여름휴가니까요.

1001405774.english: Candy floors, endlessly rising chocolate fountains... there aren't any, but sweet drinks and cold shaved ice are wonderful too! Alright! I will include drinks and shaved ice in my Chocoland!
1001405774.korean: 사탕으로 된 바닥, 무한히 솟아나는 초코&n분수…는 없지만 달콤한 음료수와 차가운&n빙수도 훌륭하군! 좋다! 나의 초코랜드에&n음료수와 빙수도 포함시키도록 하겠다!

1001405775.english: What… is wrong? Oh, you mean Tiger? Tiger is in his room. Tiger prefers cool places to hot ones. It's hot inside a water park, after all, isn't it?
1001405775.korean: 왜…그러세요? 아. 타이거 말인가요?&n타이거는 방 안에 있어요. 타이거는&n더운 곳보다 시원한 곳을 좋아하더라구요.&n워터파크 내부는 아무래도 덥잖아요?

1001405776.english: Wow! I was so surprised and glad to see you. The mermaid girls I parted ways with a long time ago are here. Princess Mel, Empy, and Sia. You look much happier than when I last saw you. Honey, you're such a nice person, aren't you?
1001405776.korean: 와! 엄청 놀랐고 반가웠어. 옛날에 헤어진&n머메이드 애들이 여기 있어서. 멜 공주님,&n엠피, 시아. 마지막으로 봤을 때보다 훨씬&n즐거워 보이고. 허니, 엄청 좋은 사람이구나?

1001405777.english: Is there anything you want from me? If so, feel free to tell me. I can do anything for you, Honey. Huh? What I want? Hmm… a lot! So much! Even if I spent a lifetime with you, it wouldn't be enough. So let's stay together forever, okay?
1001405777.korean: 나한테 바라는 거 있어? 있으면 얼마든지&n말해줘. 허니를 위해서라면 나 무엇이든지&n할 수 있어. 응? 내가 바라는 거? 음… 많아!&n엄청! 평생동안 해도 부족할 거야.&n그러니 평생 같이 있자?

1001405778.english: I wanted to get Magical MoMo's autograph on the Magical Magical MoMo tube, but I can't find it. What? You said you gave Magical MoMo a different order? Um... in that case, may I get your autograph, Commander? Um... not on the tube, but on my swimsuit...
1001405778.korean: 매지컬 모모 튜브에 모모의 싸인을 받고&n싶었는데 보이지가 않네요. 네? 모모에게&n다른 명령을 내리셨다고요? 그…그렇다면&n사령관님의 싸인을 받아도 될까요?&n저…튜브가 아니라 제 수영복에…

1001405779.english: Are you enjoying yourself, Admiral? If you are not enjoying yourself, others cannot properly enjoy themselves either. Surely, a ruler must set an example for their subordinates to follow. So come over here. Let's ride the flume ride over there!
1001405779.korean: 즐기고 있나, 제독? 그대가 즐기지 못하면&n다른 이들도 제대로 즐기지 못한다. 군림하는&n자가 본을 보여야 부하들이 그 뒤를 따르지&n않겠나. 그러니 이리로 오도록. 저기 있는&n후룸라이더를 타보자!

1001405780.english: Everyone else was wearing swimsuits, so I mustered up the courage to try one on, but it feels just as hot. Ah! Um... I know. I know it's hot because the weather is hot... Ah... Th-strangely, the swimsuit makes me feel even hotter.
1001405780.korean: 다들 수영복을 입길래 용기내서 입어봤는데&n더운 건 똑같은 거 같아요. 아! 저…저도&n알아요. 날씨가 더워서 더운 거라는거… &n아… 이, 이상하게 수영복이 더 덥네요.

1001405781.english: Hey, do you like dramas? Old dramas. I really love them. Back in the day, I found some old dramas in an old archive and watched them just to kill time. But this one is totally my style! If you have time, let's watch it together. You'll like it, Honey.
1001405781.korean: 있지, 드라마 좋아해? 옛날 드라마. 나는&n엄청 좋아해. 옛날에 오래 된 문헌보관소에서&n옛날드라마를 발견해서 심심풀이로 봤거든?&n그런데 이게 완전 취적! 시간되면 같이 보자.&n허니도 좋아할 거야.

1001405782.english: Born as a bioroid and living a turbulent life going through various hardships, meeting you makes me feel like my entire life existed just to meet you. Thank you for making my life beautiful. Still, I feel shy saying this line, too. Hehehe.
1001405782.korean: 바이오로이드로 태어나 여러 고난을 거치는&n파란만장한 삶을 살다가 허니를 만나니&n내 모든 삶이 허니를 만나기 위해 존재한&n것처럼 느껴져. 고마워, 내 삶을 아름답게&n만들어줘서. 그래도 이 대사 역시 부끄럽네.&n에헤헤.

1001405783.english: Commander. Did you think I wouldn't notice if you approached quietly from behind? What are you… Whoa! That's cold! You’ve done it… I’m going all out, so be prepared.
1001405783.korean: 사령관님. 뒤에서 조용히 접근하시면 모를&n줄 아셨습니까? 뭐 하시는… 우왓! 차가워!&n저지르셨군요… 전력으로 할 테니&n각오하세요.

1001405784.english: Right now, I'm enjoying the summer at a commercially built water park, but someday I want to experience the vast ocean on a real southern island. Huh? You were in Guam a long time ago? … … That's unfair.
1001405784.korean: 지금은 만들어진 워터파크에서 여름을&n즐기고 있지만 언젠가는 진짜 남국의&n섬에서 광활한 바다를 느끼고 싶다.&n응? 옛날에 괌에 있었다고? ……치사하다.

1001405785.english: Beach volleyball? It's fun. Would you like to try it too, Commander? Yes. You can play with just the two of you, or form a team. What? You're asking how many people make it the most fun? Probably… playing beach volleyball just the two of us, Commander, would be the most fun.
1001405785.korean: 비치발리볼이요? 재밌어요. 사령관님도&n같이 해보실래요? 네~. 둘이서 할 수도 있고,&n팀을 짜서 할 수도 있어요. 네? 몇 명이서&n하는 게 제일 재밌냐고요? 아마도… &n사령관님과 단둘이 하는 비치 발리볼이&n제일 재미있을 거예요.

1001405786.english: You think I'm going too far ahead during battles? Are you worried about me? I'm glad. But don't worry. I'm doing it because I'm confident. Besides, the further I go, the safer the others get, right?
1001405786.korean: 전투 때 너무 앞서 나가는 거 같다고?&n걱정해주는 거야? 기뻐. 하지만 걱정 마.&n나도 자신 있으니까 그러는 거니까. 그리고&n내가 앞서 나갈수록 다른 애들이&n안전해지잖아?

1001405787.english: Princess Mel… no, Queen Mel. Ampie, Sia. And all the other friends. Me and Honey. I earnestly hope that all of our story can have a happy ending, not a sad one. And that it might turn into a bed scene instead of a bad ending.
1001405787.korean: 멜 공주님… 아니, 멜 여왕님. 엠피, 시아.&n그리고 다른 모든 친구들. 나와 허니.&n우리 모두의 이야기가 새드 엔딩이 아닌&n해피 엔딩이 될 수 있도록 나는 간절히&n바라고 있어. 그리고 Bad ending이 아닌&nBed Scene이 되기도.

1001405788.english: Why do you keep staring at me...? Ah! Since you like Magical MoMo too, Commander, I see you want to try riding this? It might be a little cramped, but it is perfectly fine for two people to ride. You can come closer if you wish, Commander.
1001405788.korean: 왜 계속 저를 쳐다보시는 거죠…? 아! &n사령관님도 모모를 좋아하시니까, 이걸&n타보고 싶으신 거군요? 조금 좁을지 몰라도&n충분히 두 명이 탈 수 있습니다.&n더 가까이 와도 괜찮습니다. 사령관님.

1001405789.english: Hahaha! How is it, Admiral? The taste of my water gun? It's the ultimate weapon created with the support of T-9 Gremlin and Fortune. Huh? W-wait. Aren't you getting too close, Admiral? … Admiral? Y-hand-to-hand combat is cheating!
1001405789.korean: 꺄하하하하! 어떤가, 제독? 나의 물총 맛이?&n그렘린과 포츈의 지원을 받아 만든 궁극의&n무기지. 응? 자, 잠깐. 너무 가까운 거&n아닌가, 제독? …제독? 유, 육탄전은&n반칙이다!

1001405790.english: Commander. By any chance… have you seen the towel? The towel I hung up after wiping my sweat is gone. What? You used it, Commander? Ugh… I’m so sorry. I should have kept a closer look at it… S-surely you didn’t smell it, did you?
1001405790.korean: 사령관님. 혹시… 수건 못보셨나요? 땀을&n닦고 걸어 둔 수건이 없어졌어요. 네?&n사령관님이 쓰셨다고요? 으으..죄송해요.&n제가 잘 간수 했어야 했는데…&n서,설마 냄새를 맡으신 건 아니죠?

1001405791.english: I just met up with someone named Orangeade and chatted with them. They were really funny. They said they've read a ton of anime, and even have the source material for the original manga of a drama I watched, so we decided to read the manga and watch the drama together later. Want to come along?
1001405791.korean: 방금 전에 오렌지에이드라는 애랑 만나서&n대화했어. 걔 엄청 재밌더라. 만화를 엄청&n많이 봤다고 하던데, 내가 본 드라마 원작&n만화 자료도 있다고 해서 나중에 같이&n만화보고 드라마도 보기로 했어. 같이 갈래?

1001405792.english: Is there anything you want from me? If so, feel free to tell me. I can do anything for you, Honey. Huh? What I want? Hmm… a lot! So much! Even if I spent a lifetime with you, it wouldn't be enough. So let's stay together forever, okay?
1001405792.korean: 나한테 바라는 거 있어? 있으면 얼마든지&n말해줘. 허니를 위해서라면 나 무엇이든지&n할 수 있어. 응? 내가 바라는 거? 음… 많아!&n엄청! 평생동안 해도 부족할 거야.&n그러니 평생 같이 있자?

1001405793.english: You mean this ice cream? Yes. It's delicious. I'm sure… Mnemosyne was selling it over there… but the line is too long. Um… it’s what I was eating… but… if… you don’t mind, would you like a bite?
1001405793.korean: 이 아이스크림 말입니까? 네. 맛있습니다.&n분명… 저 쪽에서 므네모시네가 판매하고&n있었는데… 줄이 너무 길군요. 음… 제가&n먹던 거지만… 괜..괜찮으시다면,&n한 입 드셔 보시겠습니까?

1001405794.english: If the fairy tale I discovered while roaming the seas alone had been one telling the story of this place rather than the Chocolate Queen's tale, I would have tried to found Aqua Land. But it doesn't matter either way. Both aim for the same goal.
1001405794.korean: 만약 내가 홀로 바다를 누빌 때 발견한 동화가&n초코 여왕의 동화가 아니라 이곳의 이야기를&n담은 동화였다면 나는 아쿠아 랜드를 건국하려&n했겠지. 하지만 어느 쪽이든 상관없다. &n둘 다 지향하는 바가 같으니.

1001405795.english: You seem more defenseless than usual... Is that okay? Is that so? If the Commander says it's fine, then there shouldn't be any problems. More importantly... I, I really am defenseless...
1001405795.korean: 평소보다는 무방비한 차림인 거 같은데…&n괜찮을까요? 그런가요? 사령관님께서&n괜찮다고 하신다면 문제 없는 거겠죠.&n그보다 저… 지,진짜 무방비 상태인데…

1001405796.english: Hehe~ Where are you looking? Are you just going to watch? If Honey wants it… I could let you do something even better than just watching, you know? Huh? You were looking at my equipment? You want to try it? Fine! I'll teach you step by step.
1001405796.korean: 흐흥~ 어딜 보는 거야? 보기만 할 거야?&n허니가 바란다면… 보는 것보다… 더 좋은 거&n하게 해줄 수도 있는데? 응? 내 장비 보고&n있었다고? 타보고 싶다고? 좋아! 내가&n하나하나 가르쳐 줄게.

1001405797.english: Born as a bioroid and living a turbulent life going through various hardships, meeting you makes me feel like my entire life existed just to meet you. Thank you for making my life beautiful. Still, I feel shy saying this line, too. Hehehe.
1001405797.korean: 바이오로이드로 태어나 여러 고난을 거치는&n파란만장한 삶을 살다가 허니를 만나니&n내 모든 삶이 허니를 만나기 위해 존재한&n것처럼 느껴져. 고마워, 내 삶을 아름답게&n만들어줘서. 그래도 이 대사 역시 부끄럽네.&n에헤헤.

1001405798.english: For today, forget everything and enjoy a relaxing break. Although you will have to return to your daily routine after laughing and having fun to your heart's content, please let me know anytime if you miss Aqua Land. I will fly over at full speed with you, Commander. It won't be as lively as it is now since it will just be the two of us, but there will still be a different kind of fun to be at a water park just the two of us.
1001405798.korean: 오늘만큼은 모든 걸 잊고 여유롭게 휴식을&n즐기세요. 그렇게 실컷 웃고 즐긴 후에 다시&n일상으로 돌아가야겠지만, 아쿠아 랜드가&n그립다면 언제든지 저에게 말해주세요.&n사령관님을 모시고 전속력으로 날아올&n테니까요. 그때는 단 둘뿐이라 지금처럼&n시끌벅적한 분위기는 아니겠지만, 그래도&n단둘이 줄기는 워터파크도 또 다른 재미가&n있을거에요.

1001405799.english: Can you see, Admiral? Everyone is laughing and having fun. It is a sight made possible because of you. The founding philosophy of Chocoland is a nation where everyone is happy. Those by your side have already found their own Chocoland. Then, if I make the Admiral mine, their Chocoland will be mine too, won't it?
1001405799.korean: 보이나, 제독? 모두가 웃고 즐기는 모습이.&n그대가 있기에 가능한 모습이다. 초코랜드&n의 건국이념은 모두가 행복한 나라다.&n그대의 곁에 있는 이들은 이미 자신만의&n초코랜드를 찾았군. 그러면 제독을&n내 것으로 만들 면 그들의 초코랜드도&n내 것 이겠지?

1001405800.english: I’ve spent quite a lot of time with you, Commander, but this is the first time we’ve gone on a summer vacation together. Of course, it’s not a vacation just the two of us... Oh, no. It’s not that I dislike coming with everyone. Even though we’re all here, you’re always by my side, Commander.
1001405800.korean: 사령관님과 꽤 많은 시간을 보냈지만,&n이렇게 같이 여름휴가를 떠난 건 처음이네요.&n물론, 단둘이 떠나는 여름휴가는 아니지만…&n아, 아니에요. 다 같이 와서 싫은 건 아니에요.&n다 같이 온 여름 휴가지만 항상 제 옆에는&n사령관님이 계시잖아요.

1001405801.english: Do you have time? If you do, let's go on a date. We don't have any concrete plans, but... anything I do with you is fun. Whether we just go for a walk, or just sit still. Or even just talking like this. Yeah! It really is fun!
1001405801.korean: 시간 있어? 시간 있으면 데이트하자.&n구체적인 계획은 없지만… 허니랑 있으면&n뭘 해도 즐거울 거야. 그냥 산책을 해도,&n가만히 앉아만 있어도. 아니면 이렇게 대화만&n해도 말이야. 응! 역시 즐거워!

1001405802.english: Princess Mel… no, Queen Mel. Ampie, Sia. And all the other friends. Me and Honey. I earnestly hope that all of our story can have a happy ending, not a sad one. And that it might turn into a bed scene instead of a bad ending.
1001405802.korean: 멜 공주님… 아니, 멜 여왕님. 엠피, 시아.&n그리고 다른 모든 친구들. 나와 허니.&n우리 모두의 이야기가 새드 엔딩이 아닌&n해피 엔딩이 될 수 있도록 나는 간절히&n바라고 있어. 그리고 Bad ending이 아닌&nBed Scene이 되기도.

1001405803.english: Did you… do that on purpose?

1001405804.english: Hmm... Usually, I'd hesitate because it feels like I'm being treated like a kid... but... well... it's fine today! Just for today, I'm going to play without any inhibitions!
1001405804.korean: 으음… 다른 때라면 어린애 취급을 하는 거&n같아서 꺼리겠지만… 뭐... 오늘은 괜찮다!&n오늘 만큼은 나도 거리낌 없이 놀 것이다!

1001405805.english: You touched me suddenly... so I was surprised.

1001405806.english: Whoa!? Already? Hehe, so Honey falls in love easily just like me?

1001405807.english: You can't hold it in anymore, can you? I... I don't have to... No, I just can't stand it anymore. Let's go! Honey! Let's stay together all day today! No, for a few days.
1001405807.korean: 더 이상 참을 수 없게 된 거지? 안… 참아도&n되는데… 아니, 이제 내가 못 참겠어. 가자!&n허니! 오늘은 하루 종일 같이 있자!&n아니, 며칠 동안.

1001405808.english: Did this swimsuit make the Commander more proactive? Or are you more proactive because it's me wearing this swimsuit? Actually, either way is fine. To be more precise, I prefer a proactive Commander.
1001405808.korean: 혹시 이 수영복이 사령관님을 적극적이게&n만든 건가요? 아니면 이 수영복을 입은&n것이 저이기 때문에 그렇게 적극적이게&n되신 건가요?  사실 어느 쪽이든 상관없어요.&n좀 더 정확하게 말하면 적극적인 사령관님이&n더 좋으니까요.

1001405809.english: Running around as much as we want, eating our fill, and snuggling in the admiral's arms to act spoiled — could anything be happier than this? Stay by my side until I wake… I want you to be there.
1001405809.korean: 마음껏 뛰놀고, 배불리 먹고, 제독의 품에&n안겨 어리광을 부리니 이보다 행복할 수&n있겠는가? 내가 깰 때까지… 옆에 있어주길&n바란다.

1001405810.english: Ah… no, not there ah… no… it's okay…

1001405811.english: Um… honey? Are you satisfied with this? If honey wishes… I can do… anything?
1001405811.korean: 저기… 허니? 이걸로 만족해?&n나는 허니가 바라면… 그 무엇이든지…&n해줄 수 있는데?

1001405812.english: You can't hold back any longer, right? You don't… have to hold back… No, I can't hold back now. Let's go! Honey! Let's be together all day today! No, for days.
1001405812.korean: 더 이상 참을 수 없게 된 거지? 안… 참아도&n되는데… 아니, 이제 내가 못 참겠어. 가자!&n허니! 오늘은 하루 종일 같이 있자!&n아니, 며칠 동안.

1001405813.english: It's everyone's first summer vacation in a while, so everyone's looking happy. Of course I'm happy too. It's not so much that I'm happy to be at the waterpark... I'm happy to be able to make another memory with the Commander. Huh? You want to make more memories from now on? Yes! Commander. As long as I'm with you, even the far reaches of space don't matter.
1001405813.korean: 오랜만에 여름휴가라서 모두 즐거운&n표정이군요. 물론 저도 즐겁습니다. 딱히..&n워터파크에 와서 즐겁다기 보다는…&n사령관님과 또 다른 추억을 만들 수 있어서&n즐겁습니다. 네? 앞으로 더 많은 추억을&n만들자고요? 네! 사령관님. 사령관님과&n함께라면 저 먼 우주라도 상관없어요.

1001405814.english: Did you have a good time, my lord? I did. I wish this joyful time could last forever. But this Choco Land is a midsummer's dream. The true Choco Land must be elsewhere. Now! Let's strive to found the true Choco Land!
1001405814.korean: 즐거운 시간을 보냈나, 낭군? 나는 즐거웠다.&n이 즐거운 시간이 영원하길 바랄 정도로.&n하지만 이 초코랜드는 한여름의 꿈. 진정한&n초코랜드는 다른 곳에 있겠지. 자! 진정한&n초코랜드의 건국을 위해 힘써보자!

1001405815.english: When I'm by the Commander's side my heart calms and I keep smiling. Tiger would probably feel the same when with me, right? Huh? You want me to think only of the Commander right now? Of course. I'm the Commander's. So don't leave me alone, Commander.
1001405815.korean: 사령관님 곁에 있으면 마음이 안정되고&n자꾸 미소가 지어져요. 아마 타이거도&n저와 있으면 같은 기분이겠죠? 네?&n지금은 사령관님만 생각해달라고요?&n당연하죠. 전 사령관님 거니까요.&n그러니 절 혼자 두지 마세요 사령관님.

1001405816.english: Why do I like honey? Because it's my taste. Just kidding~ If I tried to give reasons I could talk for days, but that's uncool, right? Love doesn't need a reason. Before I knew it, I was already in love.
1001405816.korean: 내가 허니를 좋아하는 이유? 내 취향이니까.&n농~담. 이유를 말하고자 하면 몇날며칠동안&n말할 수 있지만 그건 멋 없잖아? 좋아하는데&n이유가 어딨어? 정신 차리니 이미 사랑에&n빠졌는걸.

1001405817.english: I take supreme joy in serving the Savior. Not only because I am an inquisitor of the order… but as a person… a woman…
1001405817.korean: 저는 구원자님을 섬기는 것에 지고의 기쁨을&n느낍니다. 교단의 심문관이라서뿐만 아니라…&n한 사람의… 여자로서…​

1001405818.english: Huh? What, when did you come back? Since when did you learn expressions of affection like this? ...But hey, you know what? I'm more of an expert at this, sis.
1001405818.korean: 응? 뭐야, 언제 뒤로 돌아왔어. 어느새 이런&n애정표현을 배워왔대? ...근데 있잖아,&n그거 알아? 이런 거, 누나가 더 전문인데?

1001405819.english: As a representative of the angels, I serve them. But as one who has received a ring from the Savior… I have no intention of yielding where the Savior is concerned.
1001405819.korean: 저는 천사님들의 대리인으로서 그분들을&n모시는 입장입니다. 하지만 구원자님께&n반지를 받은 자로서… 구원자님에 대해서는&n결코 양보할 생각이 없습니다.​

1001405820.english: "Acting like an older sister for once? Hehe~ What are you talking about? I was so much like an older sister just today! I was quietly watching over you until the Commander woke up! How about that—doesn't that sound like something an older sister would do?"
1001405820.korean: 가끔은 누나답게? 후후~ 무슨 말씀? 오늘만&n해도 얼마나 누나다웠는데! 사령관이 잠에서&n깰 때까지 가만히 지켜보고 있었다구! 어때,&n누나답지?

1001405821.english: There are many things that make me happy. Leisurely reading a book, shopping to my heart's content, preaching the gospel of light, hearing words of thanks from the angels. But more than anything, what pleases me is… being by the Savior's side.
1001405821.korean: 저를 행복하게 하는 것은 많습니다. 느긋하게&n책을 읽는 것, 마음껏 쇼핑을 하는 것, 빛의&n복음을 전하는 것, 천사님들께 감사의 인사를&n듣는 것. 하지만 그 무엇보다도 절 기쁘게&n하는 것은… 구원자님의 곁에 있는 것입니다.​

1001405822.english: Everyone has hard times. But when the commander is having a hard time, it's difficult to tell anyone, right? When that happens, come to me. I can listen to the commander's worries as well.
1001405822.korean: 다들 힘들 때가 있지. 하지만 사령관은&n힘들 때, 누구한테도 말하기 곤란하잖아?&n그럴 땐 나한테 와. 사령관의 고민 정도는&n나도 들어줄 수 있으니까.

1001405823.english: I take supreme joy in serving the Savior. Not only because I am an inquisitor of the order… but as a person… a woman…
1001405823.korean: 저는 구원자님을 섬기는 것에 지고의 기쁨을&n느낍니다. 교단의 심문관이라서뿐만 아니라…&n한 사람의… 여자로서…​

1001405824.english: Huh? What, when did you come back? Since when did you learn expressions of affection like this? ...But hey, you know what? I'm more of an expert at this, sis.
1001405824.korean: 응? 뭐야, 언제 뒤로 돌아왔어. 어느새 이런&n애정표현을 배워왔대? ...근데 있잖아,&n그거 알아? 이런 거, 누나가 더 전문인데?

1001405825.english: As a representative of the angels, I serve them. But as one who has received a ring from the Savior… I have no intention of yielding where the Savior is concerned.
1001405825.korean: 저는 천사님들의 대리인으로서 그분들을&n모시는 입장입니다. 하지만 구원자님께&n반지를 받은 자로서… 구원자님에 대해서는&n결코 양보할 생각이 없습니다.​

1001405826.english: "Acting like an older sister for once? Hehe~ What do you mean? I was so much like an older sister just today! I was quietly watching over you until the Commander woke up! How about that—doesn't that sound like something an older sister would do?"
1001405826.korean: 가끔은 누나답게? 후후~ 무슨 말씀? 오늘만&n해도 얼마나 누나다웠는데! 사령관이 잠에서&n깰 때까지 가만히 지켜보고 있었다구! 어때,&n누나답지?

1001405827.english: There are many things that make me happy. Leisurely reading a book, shopping to my heart's content, preaching the gospel of light, hearing words of thanks from the angels. But more than anything, what pleases me is… being by the Savior's side.
1001405827.korean: 저를 행복하게 하는 것은 많습니다. 느긋하게&n책을 읽는 것, 마음껏 쇼핑을 하는 것, 빛의&n복음을 전하는 것, 천사님들께 감사의 인사를&n듣는 것. 하지만 그 무엇보다도 절 기쁘게&n하는 것은… 구원자님의 곁에 있는 것입니다.​

1001405828.english: Everyone has hard times. But when the commander is having a hard time, it's difficult to tell anyone, right? When that happens, come to me. I can listen to the commander's worries as well.
1001405828.korean: 다들 힘들 때가 있지. 하지만 사령관은&n힘들 때, 누구한테도 말하기 곤란하잖아?&n그럴 땐 나한테 와. 사령관의 고민 정도는&n나도 들어줄 수 있으니까.

1001405829.english: You want to test my faith, don't you? It pains me to think I might not have shown my belief properly. So… I will show you my faith again, the right way.
1001405829.korean: 저의 신앙심을 확인하고 싶으신 거군요. 저의&n믿음을 제대로 보여드리지 못했나 싶어 절로&n한탄이 나옵니다. 그러니… 다시 제대로 저의&n믿음을 보여드리겠어요.​

1001405830.english: Already so skilled before I realized it… I guess as your older sister, I can't handle the commander anymore. But… this isn't the end, right? The night is still long…
1001405830.korean: 어느새 이렇게 능숙해져선... 이제 누나로는&n사령관을 못 당해내겠네. 그래도... 이걸로 끝,&n아니지? 아직 밤은 기니까...

1001405831.english: You want to test my faith, don't you? It pains me to think I might not have shown my belief properly. So… I will show you my faith again, the right way.
1001405831.korean: 저의 신앙심을 확인하고 싶으신 거군요. 저의&n믿음을 제대로 보여드리지 못했나 싶어 절로&n한탄이 나옵니다. 그러니… 다시 제대로 저의&n믿음을 보여드리겠어요.​

1001405832.english: Already so skilled before I realized it… I guess as your older sister, I can't handle the commander anymore. But… this isn't the end, right? The night is still long…
1001405832.korean: 어느새 이렇게 능숙해져선... 이제 누나로는&n사령관을 못 당해내겠네. 그래도... 이걸로 끝,&n아니지? 아직 밤은 기니까...

1001405833.english: On such a joyful day, wouldn't it be nice to let loose with a big bang?
1001405833.korean: 이렇게 즐거운 날에는 성대하게 한 발&n터뜨려 주는 것도 괜찮지 않아?

1001405834.english: Is the boss's preference uniforms? Or swimwear? Actually, I look good in anything, but it's better to wear what the boss wants, right? What? My preference? Hmm... should I tell the truth? For now, I'll just say swimwear. Why? Well... it's easy to take off.
1001405834.korean: 보스의 취향은 제복이야? 아님 수영복이야?&n사실 난 뭘 입어도 잘 어울리지만, 그래도&n보스가 원하는 걸 입는 게 좋잖아. 뭐?&n내 취향? 음... 이걸 사실대로 말해야 하나?&n일단은 수영복이라고 해둘게. 왜냐고?&n그야… 벗기 편하잖아.

1001405835.english: They said bombs are banned in Aqua Land because it's dangerous. But bombs and I are one and the same. So I secretly hid a few. Just pretend you didn't see this much.
1001405835.korean: 위험하다고 아쿠아 랜드에는 폭탄 반입&n금지래잖아. 나랑 폭탄은 일심동체인데&n말이야. 그래서 몰래 몇 개만 숨겨왔지.&n이 정도는 못 본 척 해달라고.

1001405836.english: Don't worry, Boss, security won't be an issue even if I enjoy my vacation. Well... everyone knows I'm the most competent, but still, our guys are trustworthy. Of course, I'm the only one you trust the most.
1001405836.korean: 내가 휴가를 즐겨도 치안은 문제없으니까&n걱정하지 마 보스.  뭐…내가 제일 유능한 건&n다들 알고 있는 사실이지만, 그래도 우리&n애들 믿을 만하거든. 물론, 보스가 제일 믿는&n건 나밖에 없지만.

1001405837.english: Hey, Commander. Have you seen the A-15 Salamander by any chance? He ran off with my bounty money, grinning like an idiot. He said he was planning to use it to pay back what he borrowed from T-4 Kheshig.
1001405837.korean: 야. 사령관. 혹시 샐러맨더 못 봤어?&n걔가 실실 웃는 얼굴로 내 상금 들고 튀었단&n말이야. 그걸로 케시크한테 빌린 거 갚으려&n했다고,

1001405838.english: What are you doing, Boss? I brought beer to drink with you... What? I bought this legitimately from a legal place. To think you thought of me that way... Do you mean I need some time to correct myself?
1001405838.korean: 뭐하고 있어 보스? 보스와 마시려고 맥주를&n가지고 왔는데… 뭐? 이건 합법적인 곳에서&n정당하게 사 온 술이라고. 보스가 날 그렇게&n생각하고 있었다니… 설마 교정의 시간이&n필요한 거야?

1001405839.english: Commander. Want me to show you something good? What? It's not a bomb! Here. Here. Ice cream. What? Did you mean something spicy? Then that's a relief. The wooden stick is the safety pin, after all. Enjoy it to your heart's content!
1001405839.korean: 사령관. 내가 좋은 거 보여줄까? 뭐?&n폭탄 아니라고! 자. 여기. 아이스크림. 뭐야.&n혹시 화끈한 걸 원한 거였어? 그럼 다행이네.&n나무 막대가 안전핀이니까. 취향껏 즐겨!

1001405840.english: Slacking off? The boss must think I'm always just goofing off. I'm taking care of this on my own because the boss won't let me take time off. So, since we're here, why don't you take care of something else for me?
1001405840.korean: 농땡이? 보스는 맨날 내가 농땡이만 치는&n줄 아나 봐. 이게 다 보스가 휴가를 안&n챙겨주니까 내가 알아서 챙기고 있는 거잖아.&n그러니까 이왕 만난 김에 다른 걸 챙겨주는&n건 어때?

1001405841.english: Everyone likes nighttime fireworks because they say they're pretty. Then would they like it if bombs were set off at night? What's dangerous about it? It's just for watching. Well, if you insist, I'll think about it.
1001405841.korean: 다들 밤에 하는 불꽃놀이는 예쁘다면서&n좋아하잖아. 그럼 밤에 폭탄을 터뜨려도&n좋아할까? 뭐가 위험해? 구경만 하는 건데?&n뭐. 네가 그렇게까지 얘기한다면야.&n생각해 볼게.

1001405842.english: No matter how much I look around, I think my swimsuit is the prettiest. What do you think, Boss? I was just asking for your opinion, but if you approach me like that... what should I do? Should I just lock you up in my own prison?
1001405842.korean: 아무리 둘러봐도 내 수영복이 제일 예쁜 것&n같은데 보스 생각은 어때? 난 보스의 생각을&n물어본 건데 그렇게 다가오면… 어쩔까나?&n나만의 감옥에 확 가둬버릴까?

1001405843.english: This swimsuit? Even if you say it's weird, I'm not taking it off. I wore it because I like it. I knew it. No matter how I look at it, the Commander seems weird just like me! That's why I like it.
1001405843.korean: 이 수영복? 이상하다고 해도 안 벗을 거야.&n내 마음에 들어서 입은 거니까. 역시 그럴 줄&n알았어. 아무리 봐도 사령관도 나처럼 이상한&n거 같단 말이야! 그래서 마음에 들어.

1001405844.english: Haa... this is a big problem. Now, the only one who can satisfy me is the Boss. Of course, you feel the same way, right? Then, instead of just confirming our feelings like this, shall we move on to the next step? There is no need to force ourselves to suppress our desires.
1001405844.korean: 하아~큰일인 걸 이젠 날 만족시켜줄 수 있는&n건 보스 밖에 없어. 물론, 보스도 나와 같은&n생각인 거지? 그럼 이렇게 마음만 확인하지&n말고 다음 단계로 넘어갈까? 억지로 서로의&n욕망을 참을 필요는 없잖아.

1001405845.english: If you play with fire like that, we might all... go *BANG!*
1001405845.korean: 그렇게 불장난하면,&n다 같이… 펑! 하는 수가 있어.

1001405846.english: Stop right there! Where did you learn that bad habit of stealing, Boss? This won't do. I'm going to have to teach you a lesson.
1001405846.korean: 동작 그만! 이 나쁜 손버릇은 어디서&n배운거야 보스? 안되겠군. 내가 제대로&n알려줘야 겠어.

1001405847.english: Oh! It seems you've finally made up your mind. How about it? Shall I give you a more thrilling time?
1001405847.korean: 오! 이제야 확실하게 마음을 굳힌 거 같은데.&n어때? 내가 좀 더 화끈한 시간을 만들어&n줄까?

1001405848.english: The moment all that correction shines through. Well... it's still far from matching my taste... In that sense, shall we go to the correction room together? I'll show you what I want directly.
1001405848.korean: 그동안의 교정이 빛을 발하는 순간이군.&n뭐…아직 내 취향에 맞추기는 멀었지만…&n그런 의미로 우리 같이 교정의 방으로&n가볼까? 내가 원하는 게 뭔지 직접 알려줄게.

1001405849.english: I’ve prepared a little gift from my heart for my husband—where do you think I hid it? Since he’s just as quirky as I am, I’m sure he’ll be able to find it, right?
1001405849.korean: 남편을 향한 내 마음의 선물을 준비했는데,&n어디 숨겼을 거 같아? 남편도 나처럼 이상한&n사람이니까 잘 찾을 수 있겠지?

1001405850.english: Now that we've learned each other's secret tastes, fate forces us to become one. I'm the only one who can make the boss's secret fantasies come true. So let's remind each other every single day. Promise!
1001405850.korean: 서로의 비밀스러운 취향을 알아버린 이상&n우린 하나가 될 수 밖에 없는 운명이야.&n보스의 은밀한 환상을 현실로 만들어 줄 수&n있는 건 나 밖에 없으니까. 그러니까 우리…&n매일 매일을 서로에게 기억시켜주자. 약속!

1001405851.english: Come to think of it, Commander, you're an endangered species too…&nIt's okay. I'm here. I'll protect you, Commander.
1001405851.korean: 그러고보니 사령관님도 멸종위기동물이시죠…&n괜찮아요. 제가 있잖아요. 제가 사령관님을&n보호해드릴게요.

1001405852.english: I wondered a lot whether my feelings toward the Commander were formed or entirely my own. Then I reached a conclusion. Whatever. Either way, liking the Commander is the same, right? I like you, Commander.
1001405852.korean: 사령관을 향한 내 마음이 만들어진 건지, &n온전히 내 건지 고민 많이 했어. 그러다 결론을&n내렸어. 알게 뭐야. 어느 쪽이든 사령관을&n좋아하는 건 똑같잖아? 좋아해, 사령관.

1001405853.english: Ah, these aren't real ears, but audio radars.&nThey're detachable. Commander, would you like to try them?&nHere… cute…!
1001405853.korean: 아, 이건 진짜 귀가 아니라 음향 레이더에요.&n탈착 가능한데 사령관님도 한 번 써 보시겠어요?&n어디... 귀여워...!

1001405854.english: Being with you, Commander, feels really comfortable.&nMuch more than taking a forest bath in a dense forest…&nYou'll stay with me from now on, right?
1001405854.korean: 사령관이랑 같이 있으니까 진짜 편하다.&n울창한 숲에서 산림욕하고 있는 것보다 훨씬 더…&n앞으로도 쭈욱 같이 있어줄 거지?

1001405855.english: Can you lend me your hand for a moment? …Like this…&nWhen I put your hand on my cheek, I feel safe.&nWarm, cozy… I hope this moment lasts forever.
1001405855.korean: 잠깐만 손을 빌려주실 수 있나요? …이렇게…&n사령관님 손을 볼에 대고 있으면 안심돼서요.&n따뜻하고, 포근하고... 이 순간이 영원하길 바래요.

1001405856.english: Commander, would you like some Elven milk? Or should I massage your shoulders? How about a lap pillow? It's okay.&nI just want to do something for you, even just one thing.
1001405856.korean: 사령관, 엘븐 밀크 먹을래? 아니면 내가 어깨&n주물러줄까? 무릎베개는 어때? 괜찮아.&n사령관한테 하나라도 뭔가를 해주고 싶어서 그래.

1001405857.english: Come to think of it, Commander, you're an endangered species too…&nIt's okay. I'm here. I'll protect you, Commander.
1001405857.korean: 그러고보니 사령관님도 멸종위기동물이시죠…&n괜찮아요. 제가 있잖아요. 제가 사령관님을&n보호해드릴게요.

1001405858.english: I wondered a lot whether my feelings toward the Commander were formed or entirely my own. Then I reached a conclusion. Whatever. Either way, liking the Commander is the same, right? I like you, Commander.
1001405858.korean: 사령관을 향한 내 마음이 만들어진 건지, &n온전히 내 건지 고민 많이 했어. 그러다 결론을&n내렸어. 알게 뭐야. 어느 쪽이든 사령관을&n좋아하는 건 똑같잖아? 좋아해, 사령관.

1001405859.english: Ah, these aren't real ears, but audio radars.&nThey're detachable. Commander, would you like to try them?&nHere… cute…!
1001405859.korean: 아, 이건 진짜 귀가 아니라 음향 레이더에요.&n탈착 가능한데 사령관님도 한 번 써 보시겠어요?&n어디... 귀여워...!

1001405860.english: Being with you, Commander, feels really comfortable.&nMuch more than taking a forest bath in a dense forest…&nYou'll stay with me from now on, right?
1001405860.korean: 사령관이랑 같이 있으니까 진짜 편하다.&n울창한 숲에서 산림욕하고 있는 것보다 훨씬 더…&n앞으로도 쭈욱 같이 있어줄 거지?

1001405861.english: Can you lend me your hand for a moment? …Like this…&nWhen I put your hand on my cheek, I feel safe.&nWarm, cozy… I hope this moment lasts forever.
1001405861.korean: 잠깐만 손을 빌려주실 수 있나요? …이렇게…&n사령관님 손을 볼에 대고 있으면 안심돼서요.&n따뜻하고, 포근하고... 이 순간이 영원하길 바래요.

1001405862.english: Commander, would you like some Elven milk? Or should I massage your shoulders? How about a lap pillow? It's okay.&nI just want to do something for you, even just one thing.
1001405862.korean: 사령관, 엘븐 밀크 먹을래? 아니면 내가 어깨&n주물러줄까? 무릎베개는 어때? 괜찮아.&n사령관한테 하나라도 뭔가를 해주고 싶어서 그래.

1001405863.english: At first I was scared… but after spending a long time with you, Commander, now I hope for it…&nYou feel the same way, right? …I'm happy.
1001405863.korean: 처음엔 두려웠었는데... 사령관님과 함께 오랜&n시간을 보내고 나니 지금은 바라고 있어요…&n저와 같은 생각이신 거죠? ...기뻐요.

1001405864.english: You're going to act like that? Fine! I'll accept it anytime!&nToday, I'm going to monopolize the Commander.
1001405864.korean: 그렇게 나오시겠다? 좋아! 얼마든지 받아줄게!&n오늘은 내가 사령관을 독점할 거야.

1001405865.english: At first I was scared… but after spending a long time with you, Commander, now I hope for it…&nYou feel the same way, right? …I'm happy.
1001405865.korean: 처음엔 두려웠었는데... 사령관님과 함께 오랜&n시간을 보내고 나니 지금은 바라고 있어요…&n저와 같은 생각이신 거죠? ...기뻐요.

1001405866.english: You're going to act like that? Fine! I'll accept it anytime!&nToday, I'm going to monopolize the Commander.
1001405866.korean: 그렇게 나오시겠다? 좋아! 얼마든지 받아줄게!&n오늘은 내가 사령관을 독점할 거야.

1001405867.english: I've been waiting for a chance to wear a swimsuit, and finally, it's my turn. How is it, Commander? It's hard to find a body like this on Doombringer... Ah! There's Djinnia...
1001405867.korean: 수영복을 입을 기회만 노리고 있었는데&n드디어 저한테도 기회가 왔네요.&n어때요 사령관님? 둠브링어에서 이런 몸매를&n찾기 힘들 텐데… 아! 지니야가 있구나…

1001405868.english: Everyone says it's cold outside the water park, but maybe because I came from Antarctica, it was hot for me. So I really enjoy playing in the water at the park. The kids said they liked playing in the water for the first time in a while, too.
1001405868.korean: 다들 워터파크 밖은 춥다고 하는데&n나는 남극에서 와서 그런지 덥더라구.&n그래서 워터파크에서 물놀이를 하면 좋아.&n애기들도 오랜만에 물에서 노니까&n좋다고 하더라구.

1001405869.english: Ah! Welcome. I was taking a short break after playing with the others. They're all such nice people. Hehe, then I guess I should become a friend worthy of nice people too, right?
1001405869.korean: 아! 어서와. 다른 애들이랑 놀다가 잠시&n쉬고 있는 중이었어. 전부 좋은 애들이더라.&n헤헤, 그러면 나도 좋은 애들에게 어울리는&n친구가 되어야겠지?

1001405870.english: We are still in the soft opening phase, but running the shop is incredibly difficult. In particular, we have so many leftover ingredients that we have to revise all the order sheets... Why isn't this healthy ice cream selling?
1001405870.korean: 아직 가오픈 중이지만, 가게를 운영하는 것은&n무척 힘이 듭니다. 특히 재료가 너무 많이&n남아 발주서를 모두 수정해야 하는데…&n왜 달지도 않고 건강한 아이스크림이&n안 팔릴까요?

1001405871.english: B-11 Night Angel specializes in dieting, but honestly, it isn't much help. Why? You know it, Commander. How could it be of any help when fat is being lost even in areas where it shouldn't be?
1001405871.korean: 다이어트는 나이트 앤젤이 전문인데&n사실 큰 도움은 못되요. 이유요? 사령관님도&n아시잖아요. 빠지면 안 되는 부위도&n살이 빠지는데 무슨 도움이 되겠어요.

1001405872.english: Yeah! Why? Why? Ah! How do I look? Slimmer than you thought, right? Everyone seemed a bit surprised when I took off my combat uniform... I'm not as fat as you think, Commander.
1001405872.korean: 응! 왜? 왜? 아! 어때? 생각보다 날씬하지?&n다들 전투복을 벗으니까 좀 놀란 것 같던데…&n나 사령관 생각만큼 뚱뚱하지 않다구.

1001405873.english: I'm good at all sports in general, but I'm especially confident in swimming. Honestly, it would be ridiculous if a member of Mermaid couldn't swim, wouldn't it? Come to think of it, I heard there's someone on Horizon who's good at swimming too...
1001405873.korean: 난 스포츠는 전반적으로 다 잘하지만 수영은&n특히나 자신 있어. 사실 머메이드에 소속된&n애가 수영을 못하면 그것도 우습잖아?&n그러고보니 호라이즌에도 수영 잘 하는 애가&n있다고 하던데…

1001405874.english: Since I wore an apron for hygiene, it seems many people don't realize I'm wearing a swimsuit. I didn't exactly wear it to show off, but... surely this isn't the reason business isn't going well!
1001405874.korean: 위생을 위해 앞치마를 착용했더니 제가&n수영복 입은 걸 모르는 분들이 많은 것&n같습니다. 딱히 수영복을 자랑하기 위해 입은&n건 아니지만… 설마 장사가 잘 안되는&n이유가!

1001405875.english: This time, I realized just how difficult the battle with oneself is. It is like the desperate struggle for survival of a single flower blooming amidst hardship and adversity. Putting it this way makes it sound like I’ve gained some profound insight, but actually, these are all feelings I experienced while dieting.
1001405875.korean: 이번에 자기 자신과의 싸움이 얼마나 힘든지&n깨달았아요. 그것은 마치 고난과 역경 속에서&n피어나는 꽃 한송이의 처절한 생존과도 같은&n것. 이렇게 말하니 제가 무슨 깨달음이라도&n얻은 것 같은데, 사실 이거 다,&n제가 다이어트하면서 느낀 감정이에요.

1001405876.english: It was so hot inside the water park that I couldn't walk around in my combat uniform. So I put on a swimsuit, but Saetti came up to me out of the blue and asked me to help with beach volleyball practice. You have no idea how awkward that was. But... it was fun. My little one liked it too.
1001405876.korean: 워터파크 안은 너무 더워서 전투복을 입고&n다닐 수가 없더라구. 그래서 수영복을&n입었는데 다짜고짜 세띠가 와서&n비치발리볼 연습 도와 달라구 해서 얼마나&n난감했는지 몰라. 근데… 재미는 있더라.&n우리 애기도 좋아하구.

1001405877.english: I used to think that having the ocean meant I didn't need a swimming pool, but that changed my mind. Swimming pools have their own unique charm. Of course… anywhere is fine as long as Honey is here, hehe.
1001405877.korean: 옛날에는 바다가 있으니 수영장은&n필요 없다고 생각했는데 이번에 생각이&n바뀌었어. 수영장에는 수영장만의 매력이&n있더라. 물론… 허니가 있다면 어디든 좋지만&n말이야, 헤헤.

1001405878.english: Frigga is selling ice cream to differentiate herself from her older sister, but everyone keeps asking about baby bottles instead. There are no nursing babies in Orca, so why would they need baby bottles? Do you happen to know the reason, Master?
1001405878.korean: 프리가 언니와 차별성을 두기 위해&n아이스크림도 팔고 있는데 다들&n아이스크림보다는 젖병을 물어보더군요.&n오르카에는 젖먹이 아이도 없는데 왜 젖병이&n필요할까요? 혹시 주인님은 그 이유를&n아시나요?

1001405879.english: My silly younger sibling teased me, calling me fat. Commander, my type is a body type like mine... Surely... you haven't suddenly changed your preference to flat skin, have you?
1001405879.korean: 바보 같은 동생이 저보고 뚱뚱하다고&n놀리더군요. 사령관님의 취향은 저 같은&n몸매인데… 설마… 갑자기 평평한 걸&n좋아하는 취향으로 바뀌신 건 아니죠?

1001405880.english: I dressed my little ones in swimsuits this time, what do you think? Aren't they super cute? They seem to like them too... Huh? You mean I'm cuter? Actually, that's exactly what I wanted to hear!
1001405880.korean: 이번에 우리 애기들도 수영복을 입혀봤는데&n어때? 너무 귀엽지 않아? 우리 애기들도&n좋아하는 것 같아서…응? 내가 더 귀엽다구?&n사실 그 말 듣고 싶어서 꺼낸 이야기야!

1001405881.english: Ugh... my chest feels sticky... Is it because it's hot in here? The ice cream is melting so fast. Huh? What's wrong? Are you hot too, Honey? Should I get some ice cream?
1001405881.korean: 으으… 가슴이 끈적거려… 여기 더워서&n그런가 아이스크림이 너무 빨리 녹아. 응?&n왜 그래? 허니도 더워? 아이스크림 가져올까?

1001405882.english: Customers ask me a lot of questions about the milk I sell. Many of them ask if I milked it myself. Of course, it is milk I milked myself, but... you have the exact same expression, Master. It is milk that I personally milked from the dairy cows on the farm.
1001405882.korean: 손님들이 제가 파는 우유에 대해서 질문을&n많이 합니다. 직접 짠 거냐고 많이&n물어보시더군요. 물론 직접 짠 우유기는&n하지만… 주인님도 똑같은 표정이시군요.&n제가 직접 농장에 있는 젖소에게서 짠&n우유입니다.

1001405883.english: Ah, Commander! If you're tired, please lie down here next to me. The tube is soft, so it will be good for resting. What? You're saying you've seen this tube somewhere before? What? You're asking if this damp stuff is oil? Ah, no, this is my sweat... Ah, no, it really is oil.
1001405883.korean: 아, 사령관님! 피곤하시면 여기 제 옆에&n누우세요. 튜브가 푹신해서 쉬기 좋을&n거예요. 네? 이 튜브 어디서 많이 봤다고요?&n네? 이 축축한 건 오일이냐고요?&n아, 아니에요 이건 제 땀….&n아, 아니 오일 맞아요.

1001405884.english: You're asking who's cuter among our babies? Commander. You shouldn't ask things like that. Our babies would be offended if they heard it. So be careful. And… from now on, please only tell me I'm cute!
1001405884.korean: 우리 애기들 중에 누가 더 귀엽냐구?&n사령관. 그런 건 물어보는 거 아니야.&n우리 애기들이 들으면 기분 나빠할 거라구.&n그러니까 조심해.&n그리고… 앞으로는 나만 귀엽다고 말해줘!

1001405885.english: Sit here. Alright! Here's a question. A girl who likes Honey came wearing a swimsuit. What should you say in this situation? Hehe. You say it's pretty… Thank you. It was worth choosing something I thought Honey would like.
1001405885.korean: 여기 앉아보세요. 자! 여기서 문제.&n허니를 좋아하는 여자애가 수영복을 입고&n왔습니다. 이럴 때 해야 하는 말은? 헤헤.&n예쁘다니… 고마워. 허니가 좋아할 것&n같은 것으로 고른 보람이 있어.

1001405886.english: Master. Even though it is your vacation, is it really alright for you to stay by my side all the time? I cannot do that. I must check your schedule. So, your schedule for today... it looks like you are with me all day long. You must stick to your set schedule. Master.
1001405886.korean: 주인님. 아무리 휴가 기간이지만, 계속&n제 옆에만 있어도 되겠습니까? 안되겠습니다.&n주인님의 일정표를 확인해야겠습니다.&n그러니까 오늘 주인님 일정이… 하루 종일&n저와 함께 있기 군요. 정해진 일정은 꼭&n지키셔야 합니다. 주인님

1001405887.english: What is the difference between a swimsuit and underwear? Hmm... Is it the difference between whether or not you can show it to others? I can show others even in just my underwear... Of course, I can show even more than that to the Commander.
1001405887.korean: 수영복과 속옷의 차이가 뭘까요?&n음…남들에게 보여줄 수 있냐 없냐의&n차이일까요? 저는 속옷 차림이라도 남들에게&n보여줄 수 있는데… 물론, 사령관님에게는&n더 한 것도 보여줄 수 있어요.

1001405888.english: Commander. You know what? I think I'm sick. When I don't see you, I feel so sad, depressed, and I have no energy at all... Commander, I really am sick, right? I wasn't even like this when I parted ways with the penguins. It hurts so much when I don't see you. So don't go anywhere! You have to always stay by my side! Got it?
1001405888.korean: 사령관. 나 있잖아. 아픈 것 같아.&n사령관이 안 보이면 막 섭섭하구, 우울하구,&n몸에 힘도 안나구… 사령관 나 이거 아픈 거&n맞지? 펭귄들과 헤어질 때도 안 그랬는데&n사령관이 안 보이면 나 너무 아프단 말이야.&n그러니까 어디 가지 마!&n항상 내 옆에 있어줘야 해! 알았지?

1001405889.english: What shall we play now? Swimming? Water play? Water rides? Or maybe something to grab from a street vendor? Watching dramas is fine, and taking a nap is fine too, so just tell me! Whatever it is, it will be fun as long as I'm with Honey!
1001405889.korean: 이제 뭐하고 놀까? 수영? 물놀이? 기구?&n아니면 노점에서 뭘 사 먹을까?&n드라마도 좋고, 낮잠도 좋으니까 말만 해!&n무엇이든지 허니와 함께라면 즐거울 테니까!

1001405890.english: Ah, Master. I was just writing down the buyers' information in my notebook. This way, I can find out what they like and what their requirements are. Your information is not in the notebook. Because I already belong to you.
1001405890.korean: 아! 주인님. 지금 구매자들의 정보를 노트에&n적고 있었습니다. 이렇게 하면 구매자들이&n무엇을 좋아하고, 어떤 요구 사항들이&n있었는지 알 수 있으니까요.&n주인님의 정보는 노트에 없습니다.&n전 이미 주인님 거니까요.

1001405891.english: What? Is something wrong? Anyway, this swimsuit is really constricting my chest, maybe because it's a bit small. I feel like I wouldn't even notice if someone touched me.
1001405891.korean: 네? 무슨 일 있나요? 그보다 이 수영복,&n좀 작아서 그런지 가슴 압박이 심하네요.&n누가 만져도 모를 것 같아요.

1001405892.english: Commander, I'm not cold right now. I don't need a massage.
1001405892.korean: 사령관 나 지금 춥지 않은데?&n마사지는 필요 없다구.

1001405893.english: Huh? Are you wiping up the melted ice cream? Thanks.
1001405893.korean: 어? 아이스크림 녹은 거 닦아주는 거야?&n고마워.

1001405894.english: I think I know what you want, but I won't tell you.
1001405894.korean: 뭘 원하시는지 알 것 같지만,&n말하지 않겠습니다.

1001405895.english: Could it be… did you really think I didn't know?&nI lied because I thought you might be embarrassed…&nAh! I surrender. I surrender. I lost, Commander.
1001405895.korean: 설마… 진짜 제가 모른다고 생각하셨어요?&n무안하실까 봐 거짓말을 했더니…&n아! 항복. 항복. 제가 졌어요 사령관님.

1001405896.english: Hmm… so it's the Commander who's cold, not me?&nCome here, Commander. I'll keep you warm.
1001405896.korean: 흐음… 내가 아니라 사령관이 추운거구나?&n이리와 사령관 내가 따뜻하게 해줄 게.

1001405897.english: The ice cream is sticky.&nThis ice cream is delicious… isn't it a shame to waste it?
1001405897.korean: 아이스크림 때문에 끈적끈적하네. &n이 아이스크림 맛있던데… 아깝지 않아?

1001405898.english: Don't do it like that. Try pulling it downwards.&nSee? I was right. I told you it wouldn't come out.
1001405898.korean: 그렇게 하지 말고 밑으로 당기듯이 해보세요.&n거봐요. 제 말이 맞죠. 전 안 나온다니까요.

1001405899.english: For the Master, I learned one by one through effort&nthat nothing is impossible with effort. That gave me confidence in myself.&nThank you, Master. Without you, the current me wouldn't exist.
1001405899.korean: 서방님을 위해 하나씩 노력해가면서 노력으로&n안 되는 것은 없다는 걸 깨달았어요. 그렇게 저&n제 자신에게 자신감도 생겼고요.&n고마워요 서방님. 서방님이 없었다면&n아마 지금의 저도 없었을거에요.

1001405900.english: By caring for endangered animals while being alone,&nI realized how sad it is to be left alone.&nYou probably feel sad too, Commander…&nIt's okay, Commander. Trust only me. I'll do my best&nfor the reproduction of your species.
1001405900.korean: 멸종 위기 동물들을 보살피면서 혼자 남아 있다는&n것이 얼마나 슬픈 일인지 알게 되었어.&n말은 안 하지만, 사령관도 슬플 텐데…&n괜찮아 사령관. 나만 믿어. 내가 사령관의&n종족 번식을 위해 최선을 다해 노력할게.

1001405901.english: I've played in the pool, worn a swimsuit…&nconfessed to someone I like…&neverything I saw in dramas has come true one by one,&nand I'm happy. It's all thanks to Honey. Thank you! I love you!
1001405901.korean: 수영장에서 놀아봤고, 수영복도 입어봤고,…&n좋아하는 사람에게 고백도 해봤고…&n드라마에서 봤던 것들이 하나하나 이루어져서&n즐거워. 전부 허니 덕분이야. 고마워! 좋아해!

1001405902.english: I heard from Sister Frigga that married life requires a lot of funds.&nSo I also do business to support Master,&nbut only one thing goes as planned.&nWhat is it? Coming home like this and snuggling with Master.
1001405902.korean: 결혼 생활에는 많은 자금이 필요하다고&n프리가 언니에게 들었어요. 그래서 저도&n주인님에게 보탬이 되기 위해 장사를 하고&n있지만, 계획대로 되는 건 하나밖에 없네요.&n그게 뭐냐고요? 이렇게 집에 돌아와&n 주인님에게 안기는 거요.

1001405903.english: You have to play even on your days off, or your body will stiffen.&nIf you just lie still, you'll end up more tired.&nWhat are you doing~ Let's go have fun, Commander! There's so much fun stuff!
1001405903.korean: 휴일에도 쉬지 않고 놀아줘야 몸이 안 굳지.&n가만히 누워있으면 오히려 더 피곤하다니까?&n뭐해~ 놀러 가자, 사령관님! 재밌는 거 많아!​

1001405904.english: I don't use any special shampoo or anything…&nYou like my hair that much?&nIt's not that I don't understand… I also…&nLike being in the Commander's arms.&nHa~ Commander's scent~
1001405904.korean: 따로 쓰는 특별한 샴푸 같은 건 없는데... &n그렇게 내 머리카락이 좋아? &n이해 못하는 거 아냐, 나도 이렇게... &n사령관님 품에 안기면 좋거든.&n하~ 사령관님 냄새~

1001405905.english: There's only one reason I play tricks!&nYou get to see all kinds of reactions.&nThe look on the Commander's face when surprised,&nThe joyful smile…&nBeing able to watch up close makes me so happy.
1001405905.korean: 장난치는 이유는 딱 하나지!&n상대의 다양한 반응을 볼 수 있잖아.&n사령관님이 깜짝 놀라는 표정도,&n즐겁게 웃는 표정도...&n가장 가까이서 지켜볼 수 있다는 게 너무 행복해.

1001405906.english: You have to play even on your days off, or your body will stiffen.&nIf you just lie still, you'll end up more tired.&nWhat are you doing~ Let's go have fun, Commander! There's so much fun stuff!
1001405906.korean: 휴일에도 쉬지 않고 놀아줘야 몸이 안 굳지.&n가만히 누워있으면 오히려 더 피곤하다니까?&n뭐해~ 놀러 가자, 사령관님! 재밌는 거 많아!​

1001405907.english: I don't use any special shampoo or anything…&nYou like my hair that much?&nIt's not that I don't understand… I also…&nLike being in the Commander's arms.&nHa~ Commander's scent~
1001405907.korean: 따로 쓰는 특별한 샴푸 같은 건 없는데... &n그렇게 내 머리카락이 좋아? &n이해 못하는 거 아냐, 나도 이렇게... &n사령관님 품에 안기면 좋거든.&n하~ 사령관님 냄새~

1001405908.english: There's only one reason I play tricks!&nYou get to see all kinds of reactions.&nThe look on the Commander's face when surprised,&nThe joyful smile…&nBeing able to watch up close makes me so happy.
1001405908.korean: 장난치는 이유는 딱 하나지!&n상대의 다양한 반응을 볼 수 있잖아.&n사령관님이 깜짝 놀라는 표정도,&n즐겁게 웃는 표정도...&n가장 가까이서 지켜볼 수 있다는 게 너무 행복해.

1001405909.english: I wasn't usually like this…&nBut being with the Commander, I guess it rubbed off on me.&nWill you take responsibility, Commander?
1001405909.korean: 원래 나, 이정도까진 아니었는데…&n사령관님이랑 같이 있다 보니, 옮아버렸나봐.&n책임져, 사령관님?​

1001405910.english: I wasn't usually like this…&nBut being with the Commander, I guess it rubbed off on me.&nWill you take responsibility, Commander?
1001405910.korean: 원래 나, 이정도까진 아니었는데…&n사령관님이랑 같이 있다 보니, 옮아버렸나봐.&n책임져, 사령관님?​

1001405911.english: Why did I choose a hammer as my weapon? It's simple. A hammer is the only weapon that allows for both offense and defense safely. After all, bladed weapons aren't as safe for defense compared to a shield. It is the most suitable weapon for me, as I fight to protect.
1001405911.korean: 해머를 무기로 선택한 이유? 간단해.&n해머는 공격과 방어를 모두 안전하게&n할 수 있는 유일한 무기잖아. 아무래도 &n날이 있는 무기는 방패에 비해 방어가 &n안전하지 않으니까. 지키기 위해 싸우는 &n나에게는 가장 적합한 무기지.

1001405912.english: It might look heavy, but this hammer isn't actually that heavy. The thrusting mechanism assists when force is needed, so from the user's perspective, it's a light and comfortable weapon. Hmm... why don't you try lifting it yourself? Uh... it's not light enough to just throw in the air...
1001405912.korean: 보기에는 무거워 보여도 사실 이 해머 그렇게&n무겁지는 않아. 힘이 필요할 땐 분사 장치가&n도와주니 사용자의 입장에서는 가볍고 편한 무기지. &n음…그러지 말고 직접 들어보는 게 어때? &n어… 그렇게 공중에 던질 정도로 가벼운 건 아닌데…​

1001405913.english: I have never once doubted the path I am taking. Because everyone is leading me on the right path. So, Commander, please always stay by my side and watch over me so that I can protect everyone.
1001405913.korean: 단 한 번도 내가 가는 길을 의심해 본 적 없어.&n모두가 날 올바른 길로 이끌어주고 있으니까.&n그러니 지휘관. 내가 모두를 지킬 수 있게, &n항상 내 옆에서 날 지켜봐 줘. ​

1001405914.english: At first, I fought simply out of the conviction that I was protecting Earth from the Machine Empire. Even though there was no one around, I believed that what I was doing could protect someone's happiness. That is why I am happy when I see Orca's friends. They are the ones who give meaning to my actions.
1001405914.korean: 처음에는 단순히 기계 제국에게서&n지구를 지킨다는 신념으로 싸웠어.&n주변에 아무도 없지만, 그래도&n내가 하는 일이 누군가의 행복을 지켜줄 수&n있다고 믿으면서 말이야.&n그래서 오르카의 친우들을 보면 기뻐.&n그녀들은 내가 한 행동에 의미를 주는&n존재들이니까.​

1001405915.english: Commander, do you know what a three-leaf clover means? They say a four-leaf clover is luck, but a three-leaf clover is happiness. That's why I'm fighting for everyone's happiness. What? You're saying you'll protect my happiness? Thank you. Just that one word makes me happy.
1001405915.korean: 지휘관은 세잎 클로버의 뜻이 뭔지 알아?&n네잎 클로버는 행운이지만, 세잎 클로버는&n행복이래. 그러니까 나는 모두의 행복을&n위해서 싸우고 있는 거야.&n뭐? 내 행복은 지휘관이 지켜주겠다고?&n고마워 그 한마디로도 난 이미 행복해.

1001405916.english: Being with someone. And being able to lean on someone too… these are feelings I didn’t know before I knew you, Commander. It feels good. The scent coming from you, Commander… and even the smell of the air, which I usually wouldn’t even notice…
1001405916.korean: 누군가와 같이 있다는 거.&n그리고 나도 누군가에게 기댈 수 있다는 거…&n모두 지휘관을 알기 전에는 몰랐던 감정이야.&n좋다. 사령관에게서 나는 향기도..&n평소에는 신경도 안 쓰던 공기의 냄새도…

1001405917.english: Ack! I-I'm sorry. The commander must have made a mistake, but I shouted way too loudly.
1001405917.korean: 으앗! 미, 미안해. &n분명 지휘관이 실수 한 거였을 텐데&n내가 너무 크게 소리 쳐버렸네.​

1001405918.english: Right…&nIf this is necessary for everyone's happiness,&nthen I must endure it…
1001405918.korean: 그래…&n이것도 모두의 행복을 위해 필요하다면&n내가 감수해야지…​

1001405919.english: Before I knew you, I protected the Earth as a symbol of happiness and friendship. But after meeting you and getting to know you, I awakened to new feelings. That doesn't mean I will abandon what I've protected. To my friends, I am still a symbol of happiness and friendship, and to you, I will remain a symbol of love.
1001405919.korean: 당신을 알기 전에 나는 행복과 우정의&n상징으로 지구를 지켜왔어. 하지만, 당신을&n만나고, 당신을 알게되면서 나는 새로운&n감정에 눈을 뜨게 되었지. 그렇다고 내가&n지켜왔던 걸 버릴 생각은 없어. 친우들에게&n나는 아직도 행복과 우정의 상징이고&n당신에게는 사랑의 상징으로 남을 거니까.​

1001405920.english: You don't mind me calling you "you," do you? You're asking what happened? Actually, Orca's friends told me you'd hate it if I called you that. H-h-h... do you perhaps want to hear me call you "darling" or "honey"?
1001405920.korean: 혹시 내가 당신이라고 부르는 거&n기분 나쁘지는 않지? 무슨 일 있었냐고?​&n사실 오르카의 친우들이 그렇게 부르면&n당신이 싫어할 거라고 했거든.&n호…혹시 달링이나 여보 이런 말 듣고 싶어?

1001405921.english: Since I didn't really belong to any particular group, I was able to travel all over the place. And just in case, I jotted down every place I thought looked good. It might be difficult right now, but if we defeat all the enemies and the Earth becomes safe, won't we... go to the places I noted down... for our honeymoon?
1001405921.korean: 나는 딱히 소속이 없었기에 여기저기&n많은 곳을 돌아다닐 수 있었어. 그리고&n혹시나 하는 생각에 좋다고 생각한 곳은 &n모두 메모해 뒀지. 지,지금 당장은 힘들겠지만,&n만약 모든 적들을 처치하고&n지구가 안전해지면, 내,내가 메모한 곳으로…&n시, 신혼여행 가지 않을래?

1001405922.english: Sometimes, I used to imagine what it would be like if I were just an ordinary girl. I imagined meeting a good person, getting married, and building a happy family… But now that that imagination has become a reality, I think the reason I protect the Earth has become even clearer. I love you. Not just you, but this whole world where you exist.
1001405922.korean: 가끔은 나도 평범한 여자아이였으면&n어땠을까 하는 상상을 할 때가 있었어.&n좋은 사람을 만나 결혼도 하고 &n행복한 가정을 꾸리는 상상을…&n그런데 그 상상이 현실이 되니까 내가 지구를&n지키는 이유도 더 명확해진 것 같아. 사랑해.&n당신뿐만 아니라 당신이 있는 이 모든 세상을.​

1001405923.english: You don't mind me calling you "you," do you? You're asking what happened? Actually, Orca's friends told me you'd hate it if I called you that. H-h-h... do you perhaps want to hear me call you "darling" or "honey"?
1001405923.korean: 혹시 내가 당신이라고 부르는 거&n기분 나쁘지는 않지? 무슨 일 있었냐고?​&n사실 오르카의 친우들이 그렇게 부르면&n당신이 싫어할 거라고 했거든.&n호…혹시 달링이나 여보 이런 말 듣고 싶어?

1001405924.english: Since I didn't really belong to any particular group, I was able to travel all over the place. And just in case, I jotted down every place I thought looked good. It might be difficult right now, but if we defeat all the enemies and the Earth becomes safe, won't we... go to the places I noted down... for our honeymoon?
1001405924.korean: 나는 딱히 소속이 없었기에 여기저기&n많은 곳을 돌아다닐 수 있었어. 그리고&n혹시나 하는 생각에 좋다고 생각한 곳은 &n모두 메모해 뒀지. 지,지금 당장은 힘들겠지만,&n만약 모든 적들을 처치하고&n지구가 안전해지면, 내,내가 메모한 곳으로…&n시, 신혼여행 가지 않을래?

1001405925.english: Sometimes, I used to imagine what it would be like if I were just an ordinary girl. I imagined meeting a good person, getting married, and building a happy family… But now that that imagination has become a reality, I think the reason I protect the Earth has become even clearer. I love you. Not just you, but this whole world where you exist.
1001405925.korean: 가끔은 나도 평범한 여자아이였으면&n어땠을까 하는 상상을 할 때가 있었어.&n좋은 사람을 만나 결혼도 하고 &n행복한 가정을 꾸리는 상상을…&n그런데 그 상상이 현실이 되니까 내가 지구를&n지키는 이유도 더 명확해진 것 같아. 사랑해.&n당신뿐만 아니라 당신이 있는 이 모든 세상을.​

1001405926.english: Sometimes I really mistake it for a newborn baby. Even if it's for everyone's happiness, ow! It hurts. Touch me gently!
1001405926.korean: 가끔은 내가 갓난 아이가 있나 착각한다니까.&n아무리 모두의 행복을 위해서라지만,&n아! 아프잖아. 살살 만져!​

1001405927.english: Sometimes I feel like I have a newborn child. No matter how much it's for everyone's happiness…&nAh! That hurts. Be gentle!
1001405927.korean: 가끔은 내가 갓난 아이가 있나 착각한다니까.&n아무리 모두의 행복을 위해서라지만,&n아! 아프잖아. 살살 만져!​

1001405928.english: Ugh. Mr. Feather said it was Horde-only time and I could just go in... Ah, no, it's not that I dislike you, Commander... it's just that I'm embarrassed...
1001405928.korean: 으으. 페더 씨가 호드만 쓰는 시간이라고&n들어가면 된다고 했는데… &n아, 아뇨, 사령관님이 싫은 게 아니라… &n부끄러워서요…

1001405929.english: The other members of the Horde were here just moments ago, but they all suddenly left. And then the Commander came in. … … No way!?
1001405929.korean: 방금 전까지 호드의 다른 분들이 계셨는데&n갑자기 다 나가셨어요.&n그리고 사령관님이 들어오셨죠. ……설마!?

1001405930.english: Hot springs have various benefits. The saying "tangchi" (tang therapy) exists for a reason. This hot spring is good for skin care, fatigue recovery, and… uh, boosting stamina!?
1001405930.korean: 온천에는 여러가지 효과가 있어요.&n탕치라는 말이 괜히 있는게 아니에요.&n이 온천은 피부미용, 피로회복 그리고…&n저, 정력증강!?

1001405931.english: I heard this was the women's bath... I was really flustered when the Commander suddenly walked in. Even now... What? You mean there's no gender separation? Ah... I suppose so... But still, walking in so suddenly!?
1001405931.korean: 여기 여탕이라고 들었는데…&n사령관님께서 갑자기 들어오셔서&n엄청 당황했어요. &n지금도… 네? 남녀구분이 없다구요? &n아… 그렇겠네요… &n그래도 갑자기 들어오시는 건!?

1001405932.english: Um, um, excuse me... Commander. Aren't you feeling a little dizzy? Aren't you feeling lightheaded? Wouldn't it be better if you left? I can only leave if you do...
1001405932.korean: 저, 저, 저기… 사령관님. &n살짝 어지럽지 않으세요?&n현기증 나지 않으세요?&n나, 나가시는 것이 좋지 않으신가요?&n사령관님께서 나가셔야&n저도 나갈 수 있어서…

1001405933.english: I... I have the Horde's symbol tattooed on my body... but... I haven't shown it to you yet, have I? I'll show it to you first... Commander.
1001405933.korean: 제, 제 몸에 호드의 문양을 새겼는데…&n아직… 안 보여드렸죠?&n제일 먼저… 사령관님께 보여 드릴게요.

1001405934.english: It, it's a mistake, right!? It really is a mistake, isn't it!?

1001405935.english: What if someone comes…&nUgh! I'm prepared too…&nNo matter who comes… don't stop.
1001405935.korean: 누가 오면 어쩌시려고…&n으읏! 저, 저도 각오했으니…&n누가 들어와도… 멈추지 말아주세요.

1001405936.english: Let them come in here.&nThis hot spring is good for your health.&nSo relax here,&nBoost your immunity…&nHehe, I'll even give you a massage…&nAnd let's live happily together for a long time.
1001405936.korean: 이리로 들어오도록 하세요.&n이 온천은 건강에 좋다고 해요.&n그러니 여기서 피로를 푸시고,&n면역력도 높이시고…&n헤헤, 제가 마사지도 해드리고…&n그리고 오래오래 같이 행복하게 살아요.

1001405937.english: There are sandwiches and fruit... Alright, the picnic lunch is ready! The tea set? Hehe, I packed that first. It’s the perfect day for a picnic. I wish every day were like today.
1001405937.korean: 샌드위치도 있고, 과일도 있고...&n좋아, 피크닉 도시락 준비 끝났어요!&n티 세트요? 헤헤, 가장 먼저 챙겼죠.&n피크닉을 나가기에 완벽한 날이네요.&n다른 날도 오늘 같았으면 좋겠어요.

1001405938.english: Drinking black tea at picnics was a tradition of the aristocracy. So, please don't think it strange that I'm bringing a tea set. What? You're saying three is too much, even so?
1001405938.korean: 피크닉에서 홍차를 마시는 건&n귀족들의 전통이었어요. 그러니, 티 세트를&n챙기는 걸 이상하게 생각하지 말아 주세요.&n네? 아무리 그래도 세 개는 과하다고요?

1001405939.english: Commander, Commander! I’ve changed into a new outfit suitable for autumn. It’s a red like autumn leaves. How does it look? Does it suit me?
1001405939.korean: 사령관님, 사령관님! 가을에 맞게 새 옷으로&n갈아입어 봤어요. 단풍 같은 빨간색이에요.&n어때요, 잘 어울려요?

1001405940.english: Commander, which black tea do you like the most? I like Earl Grey the most. It is characterized by its orange scent from the addition of bergamot oil, and also... why, why are you looking at me with such a pleased expression?
1001405940.korean: 사령관님은 어떤 홍차를 가장 좋아하세요?&n저는 얼 그레이를 가장 좋아해요.&n베르가못 오일을 넣어서 오렌지 향이&n나는 것이 특징이고요, 그리고, 또... 왜,&n왜 그렇게 흐뭇한 표정으로 바라보고 계세요?

1001405941.english: Are you asking if we are skipping LRL and T-13 Alvis's etiquette training today? Yes, that is correct. When we rest, we definitely need to learn how to relax and unwind. And, and... I would like to spend some time with the Commander as well...
1001405941.korean: 오늘은 LRL과 알비스의 예절 교육을&n쉬는 거냐고요? 네, 맞아요. 쉴 때는 확실히&n긴장을 풀고 쉬는 법도 배워야 하니까요.&n그, 그리고... 저도 사령관님과 시간을&n보내고 싶으니까요...

1001405942.english: My favorite season? I like autumn the best because I can admire the beautifully colored leaves. However, if I can go on a picnic with you like this, Commander, the season might not matter...
1001405942.korean: 가장 좋아하는 계절이요? 저는 예쁘게 물든&n단풍을 구경할 수 있는 가을이 가장 좋아요.&n하지만, 이렇게 사령관님과 함께 피크닉을&n나갈 수 있다면, 계절은 상관이&n없을지도 모르겠네요...

1001405943.english: Oh no, my hair is getting all messed up!

1001405944.english: Wait a moment! Now that you've taken off your hat,&nIt's okay to pet me as much as you like. Hehe.
1001405944.korean: 잠깐만요! 자, 모자를 벗었으니까,&n마음껏 쓰다듬으셔도 괜찮아요. 헤헷.

1001405945.english: Isn't it strange? Even though the autumn wind blows…&nWhen I'm next to you,&nAll I feel is warm comfort.&nSo please… come a little closer.&nThe wind is chilly. Hehe.
1001405945.korean: 정말 이상하지요? 가을바람이 부는데도…&n아저씨 옆에 있으면&n따뜻한 온기만 느껴지거든요.&n그러니, 조금 더... 가까이 와 주세요.&n바람이 차니까요. 헤헤.

1001405946.english: Ah, this is tough, so tough. The kids downstairs keep causing trouble,&nthere's so much work, and upstairs keeps nagging…&nBut… it's fine. This position exists for hardships.&nAnd… the commander is here, right? Isn't that so?
1001405946.korean: 아아, 힘들다 힘들어. 밑에 애들은 사고 치고&n다니지, 일은 많지, 위에서는 계속 쪼아대지…&n하지만 뭐… 괜찮아. 힘들라고 있는 자리잖아.&n그리고… 사령관이 있잖아? 안 그래?

1001405947.english: Yes… I had a dream. To watch fireworks I love&nwith someone I love…&nNow it's not just a dream. It's already come true.
1001405947.korean: 있지… 나 꿈이 하나 있었어. 내가 좋아하는&n불꽃놀이를 내가 좋아하는 사람과 함께 보는 것…&n이제는 꿈이 아니야. 이미 이뤄졌으니까.

1001405948.english: I'm a non-commissioned officer, so I can't directly help the commander with work.&nBut I'll handle the kids.&nI'll keep things under control so the commander can be a little more at ease.&nThe ‘kids' I'm talking about… guess who? Hehe.
1001405948.korean: 나는 부사관이라 사령관의 업무를 직접&n도와주지는 못해. 하지만 애들 관리는 맡겨둬.&n사령관이 조금이라도 편해질 수 있게 내가&n단단히 잡아 놓을게. 여기서 말하는 애들이…&n누구게? 후후.

1001405949.english: Wow! Just now, the most amazing fireworks of my life exploded in my mind.&nSo, Commander… fireworks…&nOr should we continue the fireplay?
1001405949.korean: 와! 방금 내 생에 가장 멋진 불꽃이 머릿속에서&n터졌어. 그러니 사령관… 불꽃놀이…&n아니 불장난 계속 할까?

1001405950.english: It's not nectar, but I brought some good wine.&nIf work's done, how about quenching your throat for a bit?&nFor meeting you, I thank Artemis once again.
1001405950.korean: 넥타르는 아니지만 괜찮은 포도주를&n구해왔습니다. 업무가 끝났다면 잠깐 목이라도&n축이는 건 어떻습니까? 그대와의 만남에, &n아르테미스님께 다시 한 번 감사를.

1001405951.english: You seem… stern? Indeed, I admit it.&nI may have treated people I didn't know that way.&nBut you are different. From the start, I felt it was a destiny blessed by the gods.
1001405951.korean: 딱딱해 보인다...? 과연, 인정하죠.&n제가 잘 모르는 사람에겐 그리 대했을 수&n있었겠군요. 그대는 다르죠. 처음부터 신들이&n점지해 준 운명 같은 게 느껴졌으니까요.

1001405952.english: Once I thought glory could only be won on the battlefield.&nBut after meeting you, I realized that glory doesn't exist only on the battlefield.&nIt exists in everyday life too.
1001405952.korean: 한땐 영광은 전투에서 쟁취하는 것이라고&n생각했죠. 하지만 그대와 만나고 영광이&n전장에만 존재하는 것이 아니라는 것을&n알게 되었습니다.&n이렇게 일상에도 영광은 존재하는군요.

1001405953.english: Ugh…! If you thought I'd be taken again…&nA- And suddenly compliment me for being beautiful…&nYou know exactly what will happen to me. How cowardly…
1001405953.korean: 읏...! 제가 또 당할 거라 생각했다면... &n가, 갑자기 아름답다고 칭찬하시면... &n제가 어떻게 될지 알면서, 비겁합니다…

1001405954.english: Darling, do you like quiet people or lively people? You know, I'd like you to like the lively type a little more, Darling?
1001405954.korean: 달링은 얌전한 사람이 좋아, 아니면 활발한&n사람이 좋아? 있지, 나느은, 달링이 활발한&n쪽을 좀 더 좋아했으면 좋겠다?

1001405955.english: What do you think of this dress, Darling? You like it?… Phew, that’s a relief. It’s a dress made for you, Darling, so it would have been troublesome if you didn’t like it.
1001405955.korean: 달링은 이 드레스, 어떻게 생각해?&n마음에 든다고?… 휴, 다행이다.&n달링을 위한 옷인데, 달링 마음에&n안 들면 곤란했거든.

1001405956.english: You're fired, Producer! Because from now on, you're not a Producer anymore, you have to be my Darling. Surprised? Sorry, hehe.
1001405956.korean: 프로듀서는 해고야! 왜냐면,&n이제부터 프로듀서가 아니라,&n내 달링이 되어야 하니까.&n놀랐어? 미안, 히히.

1001405957.english: Don't be shy, it's okay to look a little more straight. It's an outfit meant to be shown to Darling.
1001405957.korean: 부끄러워하지 말고,&n좀 더 똑바로 바라봐도 괜찮아.&n달링에게 보여주기 위한 옷이니까.

1001405958.english: They say my voice has the power to move hearts. Shall we give it a try together? Ahem, so… I love you, darling… Uh, how about that? Did it move your heart a little?
1001405958.korean: 내 목소리에는 마음을 움직이는 힘이 있대.&n우리 같이 실험해볼까? 흠흠, 그러니까…&n사랑해, 달링… 어, 어때, 마음이 좀 움직였어?

1001405959.english: What should I do, Darling? A singer is supposed to share love equally with all fans, but I don't think I can do that right now. Because… right now, my heart is filled only with you, Darling. … Because you are your Erato.
1001405959.korean: 어쩌면 좋지, 달링? 가수는 모든 팬에게&n공평하게 사랑을 나눠줘야 하는데,&n지금은 그럴 수 없을 것 같아. 왜냐면…&n지금 내 마음속에는 오직 달링만 들어 있거든.&n…당신의 에라토니까.

1001405960.english: Oh come on, first, change into clothes you don't mind getting a little wrinkled... got it?
1001405960.korean: 아이 참, 일단, 좀 구겨져도 되는 옷으로&n갈아입고 나서… 알았지?

1001405961.english: I was already preparing a secret performance just for you, darling… our hearts connected.&nThen, shall we go to the stage together, darling?
1001405961.korean: 안 그래도, 달링만을 위한 비밀 공연을&n준비해뒀는데… 마음이 통했네.&n그럼, 우리 같이 공연장으로 갈까, 달링?

1001405962.english: Sometimes I want to hear a song you sing, darling. You're not good at singing?&nIt's fine. Because just hearing your voice makes me this happy… surely, no matter what song you sing, it will touch my heart.
1001405962.korean: 가끔은 달링이 불러주는 노래를&n들어보고 싶어. 노래는 잘 못 부른다고?&n괜찮아. 왜냐면, 달링의 목소리만 들어도&n이렇게 행복하니까… 분명, 어떤 노래를&n부르더라도 내 마음에 쏙 들 거야.

1001405963.english: D-Darling, do you like energetic people? Or quiet people? I-I... I'd like you to like quiet people a little more, Darling.
1001405963.korean: 다, 달링은 화, 활발한 사람이 좋으세요?&n아니면 얌전한 사람? 저, 저는… &n달링이 얌전한 사람을 좀 더 &n좋아했으면 좋겠어요.

1001405964.english: How is this dress…? Do you… like it? You like it? Th-that’s such a relief… I was worried you might not like it.
1001405964.korean: 이 드레스… 어떠신가요? 마음에… &n드시나요? 마음에 드신다고요?&n다, 다행이다아… &n혹시나 마음에 안 드시면&n어쩌나 걱정했어요.

1001405965.english: I'll stop calling you 'Producer'... What? Ah, no! It's not that I have a problem, it's just... um... I just want to call you 'Darling'... would that be okay...?
1001405965.korean: 프로듀서… 라고 부르는 건 그만 둘게요.&n네? 아, 아뇨! 아니에요!&n불만이 있는 게 아니라, 그… 저기…&n달링, 이라고 부르고 싶어서…&n안 될까요…?

1001405966.english: You ask if I'm embarrassed? I-I am embarrassed. But... since it's an outfit I'm wearing to show you, Darling... it's okay. Hehe.
1001405966.korean: 부끄럽지 않냐고요? 부, 부끄러워요.&n하지만… 달링에게 보여주기 위한&n옷이니까… 괜찮아요. 헤헤

1001405967.english: I never thought I would be able to play a lead role on a different stage than the one I was on back then. However, thanks to that experience... and my colleagues, I was able to gain the courage to take on the lead role on this new stage as well.
1001405967.korean: 그때의 무대 말고 또 다른 무대에서 제가&n주연이 될 수 있을 거라는 생각은 하지&n못했어요. 하지만 그 때의 경험… 그리고&n동료들이 있기에 새로운 무대에서도&n주연이 될 용기를 얻을 수 있었어요.

1001405968.english: Whenever I saw others in their wedding dresses, I composed a song that suited them. But on the other hand, I was envious of them. I wanted to wear a beautiful dress too. And now? A song that will last longer than my life keeps coming to mind.
1001405968.korean: 다른 분들의 웨딩드레스 모습을 볼 때마다&n그분께 어울리는 축가를 작곡했어요.&n하지만 한편으로는 그분들이 부러웠어요.&n저도 예쁜 드레스를 입고 싶었죠. 지금요?&n제 수명보다 긴 축가가 계속 떠오르네요.

1001405969.english: Um, darling... this outfit is precious... so please wait a moment...
1001405969.korean: 저기, 달링… 이 옷은 소중하니까…&n잠시만 기다려주세요…

1001405970.english: I read in some novel… a wedding… is… that…&nIt's to announce that you're going to do it… so&nthe wedding dress… is attire for doing that…&nI made up my mind from the moment I put this on. No, I was looking forward to it.
1001405970.korean: 어떤 소설에서 읽었는데… 결혼식은… 그…&n그것을… 하겠다고 알리는 거라고… 그러면&n웨딩드레스는… 그것을 하기 위한…&n복장이라는 의미잖아요? 이 옷을&n입을 때부터 각오했어요. 아니 기대했어요.

1001405971.english: Uh, what should I do… my head feels like it's…&nWhenever I see you, darling… all that comes to mind are romantic lyrics…&nI can only write love songs now…
1001405971.korean: 어, 어쩌지… 저 머리가 어떻게 된 것 같아요.&n그게, 달링을 보면… 머리 속에 로맨틱한&n가사밖에 떠오르지 않아서…&n사랑 노래밖에 쓸 수 없게 되어버렸어요…

1001405972.english: Do you mean this broken sword? It is a sword passed down through our family for generations. The blade is only half intact, but please do not worry. Even with this length, it poses no problem in cutting down your enemies, my lord.
1001405972.korean: 이 부러진 검 말씀이십니까? &n저희 가문에서 대대로 내려오는 검이옵니다. &n칼날은 절반밖에 없지만 걱정하지 마시옵소서.&n이 정도의 길이라도, 주공의 적을 베는 것에는&n문제가 없사옵니다.​

1001405973.english: I am simply grateful that both Sumire and Hatsuna have grown up so well. Even without their mother, they have both grown into respectable ninjas and beautiful young ladies. It is my deepest regret that I could not be by their side to look after them as they grew up.
1001405973.korean: 스미레와 하츠나, 두 아이 다 잘 자라줘서&n고마울 따름이옵니다. 이 어미가 없이도, &n둘 다 어엿한 닌자이자 꽃다운 아가씨로&n자라났지요. 아이들이 자랄 때 옆에서 챙겨주지&n못한 것이, 소첩의 크나큰 한이옵니다. ​

1001405974.english: Ah, Auntie...? My Lord, saying such things to a lady is a grave offense. No! It is not that I am concerned about your age, nor am I angry because you brought up an issue that was already bothering me. I'm telling you, it's not!
1001405974.korean: 아, 아줌…? 주공, 숙녀에게 그런 말을 하는 건&n아주 큰 실례가 되는 행동이옵니다.&n아뇨! 별로 나이에 신경을 쓰고 있다거나,&n안 그래도 신경 쓰이는 문제를 들춰서 화가&n나거나 한 건 아니옵니다. 아니라니까요?​

1001405975.english: If it were not for your help, my lord, my mother and I would have met a terrible end… Therefore, our lives, and the rest of our lives, belong entirely to you, my lord. Please use this unworthy Enrai as you please.
1001405975.korean: 주공의 도움이 아니었다면, 저희 모녀는 끔찍한&n결말을 맞이했을 터… 그러니, 저희의 목숨도,&n남은 삶도, 전부 주공의 것이옵니다.&n불초 엔라이를 원하는 대로 쓰시옵소서.​

1001405976.english: Zero and Kaen... they still have many shortcomings. It would be too much to entrust them with the important duties of accompanying your Lord. Therefore, for the time being, I will serve by your side in their place. Of course, attending to your bedchamber is also... Hehe.
1001405976.korean: 제로도, 카엔도… 아직 미숙한 부분이 많사옵니다.&n주공을 수행하는 중요한 일을 맡기기에는&n무리가 있지요. 그러니, 당분간은 두 아이 대신&n소첩이 곁에서 모시도록 하겠사옵니다.&n물론, 잠자리 시중 또한… 후훗.​

1001405977.english: You are truly a good man, Lord. So much so that I feel I have been deprived of my entire life for not meeting you, and so much so that I wish you were my husband. Haha, I was being too presumptuous. Please forget it.
1001405977.korean: 주공은 참으로 좋으신 분이옵니다.&n주공을 만나지 못했던 이제까지의 일생을 손해&n봤다고 느낄 정도로 주공께서 소첩의&n지아비였다면, 하고 바랄 정도로 말입니다.&n후후, 주책이 심했군요. 잊어주시옵소서.​

1001405978.english: If the Lord wishes it, it is the duty of a kunoichi to comply...

1001405979.english: Oh my, Master… choosing me instead of your daughters.&nHehe, in that case, I shall properly show you the night techniques of a kunoichi.&nNow, relax and leave your body to me…
1001405979.korean: 어머나, 주공… 딸들이 아니라 저를 선택하시다니&n후후, 그렇다면, 주공께 쿠노이치의 밤기술을&n제대로 보여드리겠사옵니다. &n자아, 힘을 빼고 소첩에게 몸을 맡기시지요…​

1001405980.english: Even as the mother of two children, if you love me like this…&nIt's the wife's duty to respond passionately.&nCome into my arms, my lord…&nBy the way, what do you think about a third child?
1001405980.korean: 두 아이의 어미임에도 이렇게 사랑해 주신다면… &n열렬히 답하는 것이 아내의 도리겠지요.&n제 품에 안기시지요, 낭군님… &n혹, 셋째 아이에 대해서 어떻게 생각하시옵니까?​

1001405981.english: The Murasaki family always has two daughters, Zero and Kaen. However, having a third child would not be a bad thing. As for the third child's name… well, how about you decide it, my dear?
1001405981.korean: 무라사키 가문에는 항상 제로와 카엔,&n두 딸이 태어납니다. 하지만 세 번째 아이가&n있는 것도, 나쁘지 않을 것 같사옵니다.&n셋째 아이의 이름은… &n글쎄요, 낭군님께서 정해주시는 것이 어떠신지요?​

1001405982.english: Hmm, what line should I use to seduce my husband... Let's see... I, Ouka, am a cherry blossom that bloomed solely for you, my husband... Ufufu, what a very romantic whisper of love... Oh, oh my, my husband? Uh, how long have you been listening?
1001405982.korean: 으음, 어떤 대사로 낭군님을 유혹해야 할까…&n어디 보자… 이 오우카, 낭군님만을 위해&n핀 벚꽃이옵니다… 우후후, 아주 낭만적인&n사랑의 밀어로군요… 어, 어머, 낭군님?&n어, 언제부터 듣고 계셨사옵니까?​

1001405983.english: Did you say that 'Nanggun' is a title used by young women...? Oh, I see. Thank you for letting me know, My Lord. What? No, I am not angry at all.
1001405983.korean: 낭군은 젊은 여성이 쓰는 호칭…&n이라고 하셨사옵니까? 호오, 그렇군요.&n알려주셔서 감사합니다, 주공.&n네? 아뇨, 소첩은 전혀 화가 나지 않았사옵니다.​

1001405984.english: Welcome, my husband. Would you like to embrace Enrai first? Or Ouka? Or me, your humble servant? You ask if they aren't all the same choice? There are slight differences. If you are curious, how about embracing all three of them?
1001405984.korean: 어서 오십시오, 낭군님. 엔라이부터&n안으시겠사옵니까? 아니면 오우카? 아니면&n소첩? 셋 다 같은 선택지 아니냐고요? 약간의&n차이점이 있사옵니다. 궁금하시다면,&n셋 다 안아보시는 것은… 어떠신지요?​

1001405985.english: Jo, it’s a bit embarrassing to be dressed like this... but for the Commander, I’ll make you a delicious and healthy dessert? Hahaha, now that I’ve said it, I feel a bit shy.
1001405985.korean: 조, 좀 부끄러운 차림새지만... 사령관을 위해,&n맛있고 건강한 디저트를 만들어줄게?&n아하하, 말하고 나니까 좀 민망하네.​

1001405986.english: You think my eyes look a little different? These are contact lenses, lenses with a heart pattern on them. But... when I look at the Commander, it feels like real hearts are forming in my eyes...
1001405986.korean: 눈동자가 좀 달라진 것 같다구?&n이건 렌즈야, 하트 무늬가 들어간 렌즈.&n그치만... 사령관을 볼 때 눈에 진짜 하트가&n생기는 것 같기두 하고...​

1001405987.english: Happy Halloween, Commander! How is it? Do you like this outfit? Huh? A skirt? Ah, ahhh... It's embarrassing, so stop looking down...
1001405987.korean: 해피 할로윈, 사령관! 어때, 이 옷 마음에 들어?&n어? 치마? 아, 아아앗…&n부끄러우니까 자꾸 아래쪽 쳐다보지 마아...​

1001405988.english: You're asking why I didn't wear a scary outfit for Halloween? Hahaha, no way. Right now, I'm a scary older sister who scolds you if you look away! Huh? You don't think I'm that scary? Then... Grrr~! Th-Even like this?
1001405988.korean: 할로윈인데 왜 무서운 옷을 안 입었냐고?&n아하하, 아니야, 지금 나는 한눈팔면 혼내는&n무서운 누나인걸? 어? 별로 무섭지 않다구?&n그럼... 크앙~! 이, 이래도? ​

1001405989.english: Huh? You mean the bread smells sweet like me? Well, that’s because I put a secret ingredient in the dough. You ask what the secret ingredient is? Th-that’s... well… it’s my love for the Commander. So, you have to eat it all without leaving any behind, okay? You really have to...?
1001405989.korean: 응? 빵에서 나처럼 달콤한 향기가 난다고?&n그야, 반죽에 비밀 재료를 넣었으니까 그렇지.&n비밀 재료가 뭐냐구? 그, 그건... 그러니까…&n사령관을 향한 내 사랑이야.&n그러니까, 남기지 말고 다 먹어야 해? 꼭이야...?​

1001405990.english: Commander, shall I tell you a secret...? You know, actually... I didn't originally prepare a skirt... You ask why I was so shy then? Well... it's because I only intended to show it to you, Commander... Do you want to go to your room and take a closer look?
1001405990.korean: 사령관, 내가 비밀 얘기 하나 해 줄까...?&n있지, 사실... 치마는 원래부터 준비 안 했어…&n그러면서 왜 그렇게 부끄러워 했냐구? 그거언…&n사령관한테만 보여줄 생각이었으니까 그렇지…&n방에 가서 자세히 볼래?​

1001405991.english: Commander? You shouldn't just touch me while I'm changing clothes...?
1001405991.korean: 사령관? 옷 갈아입는 도중에 막 만지면 안 돼...?​

1001405992.english: Agh, hey, if you keep doing this, it's going to be a problem…&nUm, so, th-then… want to go together to the changing room…?&nI'm not even wearing a skirt right now anyway...
1001405992.korean: 아이참, 자꾸 이러면 곤란하다니까…&n저기, 그, 그러며언… 같이 탈의실로 갈래…?&n어차피, 나 지금 치마 안 입고 있으니까...​

1001405993.english: Gotcha!&nRemember how I told you last time I'd stick right next to you?&nI meant it, so…&nI'm going to hold on tight and never let go…
1001405993.korean: 얍, 잡았다.&n저번에 내가 옆에 딱 붙어 있을 거라고 했던 거&n기억나? 그, 그러니까,&n안 떨어지게 꼭 잡고 있을 거야...​

1001405994.english: Here... there... it's torn a lot, but it's no problem... Huh? What's with that sly look in this kid's eyes?
1001405994.korean: 여기도… 저기도…&n뭐 많이 찢어졌지만 문젠 없어…&n어? 이 꼬맹이 그 음흉한 눈빛은 뭐지?​

1001405995.english: I’m not a hero, but I’m the guardian of humanity, the one who watches over and protects us—the Dark Sister! Ta-da! It’s me! How about that, Commander? It’s a line from a movie I saw yesterday. Do you like it?
1001405995.korean: 영웅은 아니지만, 인류의 수호자이자&n우릴 지켜주고 보호해주는, 어둠의 누나&n짜잔! 바로 나야! 어때? 사령관?&n어제 본 영화에서 본 대사인데 마음에 들어?​

1001405996.english: "You ask if I can fly with these wings? Of course, watch closely, Commander! Nothing is impossible for this big sister!"
1001405996.korean: 이 날개로도 날 수 있냐고?&n아무렴 잘 봐 사령관!&n이 누나에게는 불가능이란 없다는 걸!​
