1001405997.english: Our secret is just between the two of us, Commander. If you happen to tell anyone else... you're going to be in trouble! Got it!
1001405997.korean: 우리 비밀은 나와 사령관 둘만의 비밀이야,&n혹시나 다른 사람에게 발설한다면…&n혼 날줄 알아! 알았지!​

1001405998.english: Commander, isn't it tough? It's a good idea to cast off some of the burden rather than carrying it all. Now, let's just take off this one outfit first, hehe.
1001405998.korean: 사령관 힘들지 않아?&n너무 많은 짐을 안고 가는 것보다 어느정도&n벗어 던지는 것도 좋은 방법이야&n자, 일단 이 옷 하나를 벗어 던지고 후훗.

1001405999.english: It's late at night and I'm bored, so... Commander, do you like playing with fire?... No! I mean fireworks, fireworks. Did you perhaps have something else in mind? Well, shall we have some time alone?
1001405999.korean: 깊은 밤 심심하기도 하고 저기…&n사령관은 불장난 좋아해?...&n아니! 불꽃놀이 말이야, 불꽃놀이&n혹시, 다른 생각한 거야?&n뭐 둘만의 시간을 가져볼까?​

1001406000.english: There aren't even any clothes left to tear!
1001406000.korean: 더 이상 찢어질 옷도 남아 있질 않다고!​

1001406001.english: Our little commander, is it time to play with big sis?&nCome here, and I'll show you the adult world…
1001406001.korean: 우리 꼬맹이, 사령관&n누나랑 놀 시간이 됐나? 이리로 와,&n누나가 지금부터 어른의 세계를 알려줄게. ​

1001406002.english: Well, look who it is.&nIsn't this the little commander I made a contract with?&nMy little one, big sis wants to give you a very special present.&nYou'll accept it, won't you?
1001406002.korean: 이게 누구야?&n나랑 계약을 나눈 꼬맹이 사령관 아니야?&n우리 꼬맹이, 누나가 좋은 선물을 주려는데?&n받아줄꺼지?​

1001406003.english: How is it? You worked really hard preparing this. But everyone helped. My magical girl friends, the Demon Lord's army officers, and everyone else. For me, for them, and for the boss, I will sing the best song for you.
1001406003.korean: 어떠세요? 준비하느라 고생 많이 했어요.&n하지만 모두가 도와줬어요.&n마법 소녀 친구들도, 마왕군 간부분들도&n그리고 다른 모든 분들도. 저를 위해서,&n그분들을 위해서, 그리고 사장님을 위해서&n최고의 노래를 들려 드릴게요.

1001406004.english: C-A concept? Ugh... Space... Great Demon King. Since Goltarion XIII has become a being greater than the Great Demon King, that is what he has to do... Does it... suit him? Hehehe.
1001406004.korean: 커, 컨셉요? 아으… 우주… 대마왕요.&n골타리온이 대마왕보다 더 위대한 존재가&n되었으니 그렇게 해야한다고…&n어울…리나요? 에헤헤.​

1001406005.english: This outfit is like a new battle uniform for me as a singer. There were other clothes available, but there is a reason I chose this one. It has to be comfortable to move in, look stylish, and… the boss will like it. What do you think?
1001406005.korean: 이 옷이 가수인 저에게는&n새로운 전투복이네요.&n이 옷외에도 다른 옷들도 있었지만&n이 옷을 고른 이유가 있어요.&n움직이기 편할 것, 멋질 것, 그리고…&n사장님께서 좋아할 것. 어떠신가요?​

1001406006.english: I didn't borrow the power of the horns. It would have been easier if I had the power of the horns, but I wanted to sing my song with my own will, with my own heart, for the people I wanted to share it with.
1001406006.korean: 뿔의 힘은 빌리지 않았어요.&n뿔의 힘이 있었다면 더 쉬웠겠지만,&n제 노래를, 저의 의지로, 저의 마음을 담아,&n들려주고 싶은 사람을 위해 부르고&n싶었으니까요.​

1001406007.english: Are you listening, Boss? Is there a song you'd like to hear? If you want, I'll sing any song for you. I could sing forever for you!
1001406007.korean: 잘 듣고 계신가요, 사장님? 듣고 싶은 노래가&n있으신가요? 사장님께서 원하신다면&n어떤 노래든 불러드릴게요.&n사장님을 위해서라면&n영원히 노래 부를 수 있어요!​

1001406008.english: I realized that no matter how bright a star is, you cannot reach it just by looking at it. Whether it is a song... or the boss... have you reached it now? If not... I will do my best until I do!
1001406008.korean: 아무리 빛나는 별이라도 보기만 해서는&n닿을 수 없다는 걸 알게 되었어요.&n그게 노래든… 사장님이든…&n이제는 닿았나요? 닿지 않았다면…&n닿을 때까지 힘낼게요!​

1001406009.english: W-wait a minute! It's not that I don't want to, but! The song! Can't we sing first? I practiced so much just to let the boss hear it!
1001406009.korean: 자, 잠깐만요! 시, 싫은 건 아니지만! 노래!&n노래부터 부르면 안 될까요?&n사장님께 들려드리기 위해 엄청 연습했는데!?​

1001406010.english: Was my song not enough to satisfy you?&nThen please wait until this song is over.&nNot on stage… but in bed…&nI will sing a new song for you.
1001406010.korean: 저의 노래만으로는 만족하지 못하셨나요?&n그러면 지금의 노래가&n끝나길 기다려주세요.&n무대가 아닌… 침대에서…&n새로운 노래를… 불러드릴게요.​

1001406011.english: I am quite greedy. As soon as my wish — to dance and sing on stage and to be loved by the producer — was granted, a new wish arose.&nI want more people to hear my song, and… to be loved by you even more.
1001406011.korean: 저는 욕심쟁이네요. 무대에서 춤추고 노래를&n부르고 싶다는 소원, 사장님께 사랑을 받고&n싶다는 소원이 이루어지자 마자&n새로운 소원이 생기는 걸 보면요.&n더 많은 사람들에게 제 노래를 들려주고 &n싶고… 당신에게 더 사랑받고 싶어요.​

1001406012.english: You think my way of speaking has changed? It hasn't changed much, but I'm glad you noticed. I have put on the armor of my soul. To become myself, not an actor. To become a shield serving everyone from the lowest place.
1001406012.korean: 말투가 바뀐 거 같다고?&n크게 바뀐 건 아닌데 알아차려줘서 기쁘군.&n내 영혼의 갑옷을 갈아입었다네.&n배우가 아닌 내가 되기 위해서.&n가장 낮은 곳에서 모든 이를&n섬기는 방패가 되기 위해서.​

1001406013.english: The path ahead will be filled with thorns. However, the existence of adversity is no reason for us to refrain from accomplishing our task. And do not worry. I will stand before everyone and be the first to face that adversity.
1001406013.korean: 우리가 나아갈 길은 가시밭으로 가득하겠지.&n허나 역경의 존재가 우리가 과업을 이룩하지&n말아야 하는 이유가 되지 못한다네.&n그리고 걱정 말게나. 내가 모두의 앞에 서서&n가장 먼저 그 역경을 맞이할 터이니.​

1001406014.english: To remember the past, to live in the present, and to move forward toward the future. It may sound cliché and all too obvious… but for a long time, I was unable to do so. However, not anymore. It is thanks to meeting you, my Lord. Thank you, my Lord.
1001406014.korean: 과거를 기억하고, 현재를 살아가며,&n미래를 향해 나아간다. 진부하고 너무나도&n당연한 말이지만… 오랫동안 나는 그러지&n못했다네. 허나 이제는 아니라네.&n주군을 만난 덕분이지. 고맙네, 주군.​

1001406015.english: I want to show my true self to my Lord—not a false one, but my real self, not the actor Prester Prester Johanna. Not me, Prester Prester Johanna, entirely.
1001406015.korean: 다른 이에게도 마찬가지지만&n특히나 주군에게는 거짓된 모습이 아닌&n진짜 내 모습을 보여주고 싶다네.&n배우 프레스터 요안나가 아닌.&n온전히 나 프레스터 요안나를.​

1001406016.english: My Lord. Shall we train together? It would be a good workout, and we could also prepare for any potential dangers. We could also monitor the training progress of myself and the others. And… no, actually, I just wanted to spend time with you, My Lord.
1001406016.korean: 주군. 함께 훈련을 하지 않겠나?&n운동도 될 것이고, 혹시 모를 위험에&n대비할 수도 있을 거라네. 나와 다른 이들의&n훈련도도 살필 수 있겠지. 그리고… 아니, 사실&n주군과 함께 시간을 보내고 싶을 뿐이었네.​

1001406017.english: I have so much I wish to say to my lord. There is counsel welling up from my heart, jokes born of friendship, and praises filled with respect. And… there are also… whispers… overflowing with affection.
1001406017.korean: 주군께 하고 싶은 말이 참으로 많다네.&n충심에서 우러나오는 간언도 있고, 우정으로&n이루어진 농담도 있고, 존경이 가득한 찬사도&n있다네. 그리고… 애정이 묻어나오는…&n밀어도 있다네.​

1001406018.english: My lord's resolve is firm, so how could I refuse?
1001406018.korean: 주군의 의지가 확고하니&n내가 어떻게 거절할 수 있겠나.​

1001406019.english: My lord looks at me like this; I am beyond happy.&nI, too, desire you… If we both desire one another, what more needs saying?
1001406019.korean: 주군이 나를 이렇게 바라니&n기쁘기 그지 없군. &n나 또한 주군을 바라는 바이니… 서로가&n서로를 원하는데 무슨 말이 더 필요한가?​

1001406020.english: Once I came to know my lord, I no longer doubted him. Having cast off my delusions, my body now moves as I will. Of course, it wasn’t just delusions that I cast off. What do you think? Don't you want to see?
1001406020.korean: 주군을 알게 되면서 나는 더 이상 주군을&n의심하지 않게 되었다네. 미혹을 벗어던지니&n육체 또한 나의 의지대로 움직이게&n되었다네. 물론 벗어던진 건 미혹만이&n아니지만 말일세. 어떤가? 보고 싶지 않나?​

1001406021.english: A mask...? Ah, this is a device that changes my personality. The doctors said it has suggestions placed on it to transform me into a personality more suited for combat. By any chance, did you come to dislike me because of this?
1001406021.korean: 마스크요...? 아, 이건 제 인격을 변화시키는&n장치에요. 박사님들께서는 보다 전투에&n적합한 인격으로 변화시켜주는 암시가 걸려&n있다고 하셨어요. &n혹시, 이것 때문에 제가 싫어지셨나요?​

1001406022.english: The members of the Bermuda team wouldn't dislike me, would they? I really don't. Because, well... the people on the Bermuda team are like older sisters to me. It was so lonely living alone...
1001406022.korean: 버뮤다 팀의 팀원분들이 저를 싫어하지는&n않으시겠죠? 그러지 않았으면 좋겠어요.&n왜냐면, 그게... 버뮤다 팀에 계신 분들은&n제 언니 같은 분들이니까요.&n혼자 지내는 건 너무 외로웠거든요...​

1001406023.english: My name is Hela. I was given the same name as the Queen of Hell. Of course, I am not actually the Queen of Hell... but I suppose I do the same thing. After all, I intend to show your enemies hell.
1001406023.korean: 내 이름은 헬라. 지옥의 여왕과 같은 이름을&n받았지. 물론, 실제로 내가 지옥의 여왕이라는&n건 아니지만... 하는 일은 같겠구나.&n그대의 적에게 지옥을 보여줄 생각이니까.​

1001406024.english: Lately, I've been studying a lot by looking up various things. I lack general knowledge, you see... You might end up disliking me because of my lack of common sense, so... I'll try my best to make sure that doesn't happen.
1001406024.korean: 요즘은 이것저것 찾아보면서 많이 공부하고&n있어요. 저는 일반 상식이 부족하거든요…&n인간님이 혹시나 상식이 부족한&n저를 싫어하게 되실지도 모르니까…&n그런 일이 일어나지 않게 노력할게요.​

1001406025.english: This outfit? I just put together some clothes that were left at the lab. They are a bit old, but I think they are still wearable. What? You're asking if I'm embarrassed? Th-this, is this perhaps an embarrassing outfit?
1001406025.korean: 이 옷이요? 연구소에 남아있던 옷들을 적당히&n조합해 봤어요. 좀 오래 된 옷이긴 해도,&n아직 그럭저럭 입을 만 한 것 같아요.&n네? 부끄럽지 않냐고요?&n이, 이거, 혹시 부끄러운 옷인가요?​

1001406026.english: The reason I call you "Human" is... well... I was taught that Bioroids are supposed to love and respect humans, you know? I don't know about others, but I thought it would be okay to love you, Commander... Do not ask any more...
1001406026.korean: 왜 사령관님을 인간님이라고 부르냐면요,&n그게... 전 바이오로이드는 인간을 사랑하고&n존경해야 한다고 배웠거든요? 다른 사람은&n모르겠지만, 사령관님이라면 사랑해도&n괜찮을 것 같아서... 더는 묻지 말거라...​

1001406027.english: Ah... please, please don't hit me...

1001406028.english: Hehe… Human, you know… um… well…&nIt's embarrassing to say directly… ugh.&nHehe, yeah. Won't you spend the night with me?
1001406028.korean: 헤헤... 인간님, 있잖아요, 저기... 그러니까... &n직접 말씀드리긴 부끄러운데…에잇. &n후후, 그래. 나와 같이 밤을 보내지 않겠느냐?​

1001406029.english: Before, I was too shy to speak properly without a mask…&nBut now, I think I can even without it.&nPlease hold me tight, human. Until tomorrow morning.
1001406029.korean: 전에는 부끄러워서 마스크가 없으면 제대로&n말을 못 했지만... 이제는 마스크가 없어도&n말할 수 있을 것 같아요. 꼭 안아주세요,&n인간님. 내일 아침까지.​

1001406030.english: Is the title "Human-nim" too stiff now? What do you prefer? Honey? Darling? You? Honey? Oppa? Ugh, no. I think "Human-nim" is the best. Th-that is... I'm just too embarrassed to use a different title now...
1001406030.korean: 인간님, 이라는 호칭은 이제 너무&n딱딱할까요? 뭐가 좋으세요? 여보? 자기?&n그대? 허니? 오빠? 으, 아니다. 역시 인간님이&n제일 나을 것 같아요. 그, 그게, 이제 와서&n다른 호칭을 쓰긴 너무 부끄러워서...​

1001406031.english: Well, I’ve been studying this and that diligently to build up my general knowledge. Oh, shall I tell you what I’m studying these days? It is, how to become a mother. How about it? Would you like to try practicing together?
1001406031.korean: 저, 그동안 상식을 갖추기 위해 이것저것&n열심히 공부했어요. 참, 요즘 공부하는 게&n뭔지 알려드릴까요?&n그건, 바로 어머니가 되는 법이다.&n어떠냐, 같이 실습을 해 보겠느냐?​

1001406032.english: Tell me. Do you like me, or do you prefer the maskless version? I will try my best to accommodate your preference. What? You like both? You're so greedy, Human. But, that's fine. We are both yours.
1001406032.korean: 말해보아라. 그대는 내가 좋은가,&n아니면 마스크를 벗은 쪽이 더 좋은가?&n그대의 취향에 최대한 맞춰보도록 하겠다.&n네? 둘 다 좋다구요? 인간님은&n욕심쟁이시네요. 하지만, &n좋아요. 저희 둘 다 인간님의 것이에요.​

1001406033.english: I wandered the wasteland for a long time. So, I had to spend a long time alone and lonely... So, so, will you make me a family so I won't be lonely anymore?
1001406033.korean: 전 황무지에서 한참을 떠돌아 다녔어요.&n그래서, 혼자 외롭게 오랜 시간을 보내야만&n했구요... 그러니까, 더 이상 외롭지 않게…&n가족을 만들어 주실래요?​

1001406034.english: A dance must always be accompanied by fitting music. This is a song that your mother composed herself for Your Majesty, out of her love for you. What do you think?
1001406034.korean: 춤에는 반드시 어울리는 음악이 함께해야&n하는 법. 이 어미가 폐하를 생각하는&n마음으로, 폐하를 위해 직접 만든 노래입니다.&n어떠십니까?​

1001406035.english: Has something bad happened to you? Your Majesty, I am by your side to please you, so please call me anytime.
1001406035.korean: 안 좋은 일이라도 있으셨나요? 폐하를 기쁘게&n하기 위해 옆에 이 어미가 있는 것이니,&n언제든지 저를 불러주세요.​

1001406036.english: The atmosphere has changed a lot, but... do not worry. Even if the clothes I wear have changed, my heart for Your Majesty will not change, even after ten thousand years.
1001406036.korean: 분위기가 많이 바뀌었지만... 걱정하지 마세요.&n몸에 걸친 옷이 바뀌었더라도,&n폐하를 생각하는 마음은 만년이 지나더라도&n바뀌지 않을 것입니다.​

1001406037.english: This is a dance I performed thinking only of Your Majesty… How was it? Did you feel Your Majesty’s dignified presence within the dance? Do you mean no? Then, I have no choice but to keep dancing until you do…
1001406037.korean: 폐하만을 생각하며 춘 춤입니다… 어떠십니까,&n춤 안에서 늠름한 폐하의 모습이&n느껴지셨습니까? 아니란 말입니까?&n그럼, 느껴지실 때까지 춤을 추는 수밖에...​

1001406038.english: Even if you face hardships and fears, do not worry. This mother, and her love, will always be by Your Majesty's side.
1001406038.korean: 힘들고 두려운 일이 있더라도,&n걱정하지 마세요. 이 어미가, 또 이 어미의&n사랑이 항상 폐하의 곁에 있을 테니까.​

1001406039.english: Now... take my hand, Your Majesty. I will be your dance partner for the long nights until you become accustomed to dancing. No, even if this night ends, and a thousand nights pass, I will continue... be with you forever.
1001406039.korean: 자... 손을 잡으시지요, 폐하. 폐하께서 춤에&n익숙해지실 때까지 긴 밤 동안 폐하의&n춤 상대가 되어드리겠습니다. 아니, 설령&n이 밤이 끝나고, 천 번의 밤이 지나더라도,&n계속... 영원토록 함께하겠습니다.​

1001406040.english: Your Majesty, please wait a moment until the dance is over.
1001406040.korean: 폐하, 춤이 끝날 때까지 잠시만 기다리세요.​

1001406041.english: Hehe, don't resist, come dance with me.&nAs I said… throughout the long night,&nI'll be your partner in dance, Your Majesty.
1001406041.korean: 후후, 그러지 말고, 이리와 같이 추시죠.&n말씀 드렸듯이... 긴 밤 동안 폐하의 춤 상대가&n되어드릴 터이니.​

1001406042.english: I know the dance of marriage…&nShall I teach it to you tonight in your chamber, Your Majesty?
1001406042.korean: 제가 부부의 춤을 알고 있는데…&n오늘밤 폐하의 방에서 알려드릴까요?​

1001406043.english: Since it is a musical with my Master, I practiced the songs really hard. In particular, the last song is one that Black Lilith composed herself with the help of Ms. Muse. Would you like to listen?
1001406043.korean: 주인님과 함께 하는 뮤지컬이니까, 노래도&n열심히 연습했어요. 특히 마지막 곡은&n리리스가 뮤즈 씨의 도움을 받아서 직접&n만든 노래랍니다. 들어보실래요?​

1001406044.english: If I am the Empress, then you are the Empress's Master. Hehe, to think that I am playing a role that elevates your name just by doing nothing... I never expected to take on such a cool role.
1001406044.korean: 제가 여제라면, 주인님은 여제의 주인님이&n되는 거네요. 후후, 가만히 있어도 주인님의&n이름을 드높이는 역할이라니... &n이렇게나 멋진 배역을 맡게 될 줄은 몰랐어요.​

1001406045.english: Kneel before your Empress! Hehe, how was it, Master? Did you like my performance? I practiced hard to show you a new side of myself.
1001406045.korean: 너의 여제 앞에 무릎 꿇어라! 후후, 어떤가요,&n주인님? 제 연기는 마음에 드셨나요? 새로운&n모습을 보여드리려고 열심히 연습했답니다.​

1001406046.english: This whip? Don't worry too much. It's just for show, so you won't get hurt if you get hit by it. If you'd like to verify it, Master, you might as well try it on me just this once...
1001406046.korean: 이 채찍이요? 너무 걱정하지 마세요.&n멋내기용 장식일 뿐이니까, 맞는다고&n다치지는 않을 거예요. 주인님께서&n확인해보기를 원하신다면,&n제게 한 번쯤 실험해보셔도 괜찮답니다...​

1001406047.english: “Oh Romeo, Romeo, why are you Romeo?” Hehe, don’t worry, Master. Unlike Juliet, Black Lilith will always remain by your side.
1001406047.korean: “오 로미오, 로미오, 왜 당신은 로미오인가요?”&n후후, 걱정하지 마세요, 주인님. 리리스는&n줄리엣과는 다르게, 언제나 주인님의&n곁에 남아있을 거예요. ​

1001406048.english: Master is the sun, Black Lilith is the moon. No, I don't quite like that line. Because Master and Black Lilith... aren't far apart like the sun and the moon... they will be together forever and ever and ever and ever.
1001406048.korean: 주인님은 태양, 리리스는 달.&n아니, 이 대사는 조금 마음에 안 드네요. &n왜냐면, 주인님과 리리스는... 태양과 달처럼&n멀리 떨어져 있는게 아니라…&n계속 계속 계속 계속 함께 있을 테니까요.​

1001406049.english: Hehe, do you like Black Black Lilith in this form? Please wait just a little longer. Until the curtain falls...
1001406049.korean: 후후, 이 모습의 리리스가 마음에 드시나요?&n조금만 기다려주세요. 막이 내릴 때까지...​

1001406050.english: Oh dear, Master…&nDid you really like the bad Black Lilith that much?&nHehe, then sit for a while upon the throne.&nThe rest… Black Lilith will take care of…
1001406050.korean: 아이 참, 주인님도…&n나쁜 리리스가 그렇게 마음에 드셨나요?&n후후, 그럼 잠시 옥좌 위에 앉아 보세요.&n나머지는, 리리스가 다 알아서 할게요...​

1001406051.english: Empress Black Lilith's throne is made for two.&nThere's always a place left for you, Master.&nBut… wouldn't it be better if it became a seat for three?&nShall we work on that together?
1001406051.korean: 여제 리리스의 옥좌는 2인용이에요.&n주인님을 위한 자리는 언제나&n남아있으니까요. 그런데... 3인용이 되면,&n더 좋을 것 같은데... 같이 노력해볼까요?​

1001406052.english: I learned the mindset of a shrine maiden from my masters. There were some things I found a bit puzzling, but perhaps that is due to my lack of learning. Still, I do not understand Master Shirayuri's teaching that I must secretly visit my master's room at night.
1001406052.korean: 스승님들께 무녀의 마음가짐을 배웠습니다.&n조금 의아한 점이 있기는 했지만 이는 저의&n배움이 부족하기 때문이겠지요. 그래도 밤에&n몰래 주인님의 방을 찾아야한다는&n시라유리 스승의 가르침은 이해가 안 됩니다.

1001406053.english: They say it is the duty of a shaman to defeat evil spirits, but I have never seen such a thing. Evil spirits are merely creations of people's fears… Eek! N-please don't scare me.
1001406053.korean: 악령을 무찌르는 것이 무녀의 임무라고&n하는데 저는 아직까지 악령이라고 하는 것을&n본 적이 없습니다.&n악령은 어디까지나 사람들의 두려움이&n만들어 낸… 히익! 노, 놀래키지 말아주세요.

1001406054.english: A shamaness is a being who connects the gods with their believers. I, too, hope to become such a being. To be honest, I wore this attire because I believe I am closer to the gods than others. It is because I wanted to grow closer to my Master…
1001406054.korean: 무녀라 함은 신과 신자들 사이에서 둘을&n연결해주는 존재입니다. 저 또한 그런 존재가&n되길 바랍니다. 사실 다른 이들보다 좀 더&n신에 가깝다고 생각하여 이 옷을 입었습니다.&n주인님과 좀더 가까워지고 싶어서…

1001406055.english: Since I swore my loyalty to you, Master, there has not been a single moment when I was not yours. Since you desire me, how could I refuse? I will gladly serve you.
1001406055.korean: 저는 주인님께 충성을 맹세한 이후 한시도&n주인님의 것이 아닌 적이 없었습니다.&n주인님께서 저를 바라시니 어찌 거부할 수&n있을까요? 기꺼이 주인님을 위해&n종사하겠습니다.

1001406056.english: Strictly speaking, I'm closer to a wolf, but others say I'm like a puppy. I can't quite understand... What? You mean I'm cute because I'm like a puppy? Come to think of it, wolves and dogs are the same species. W-Woof? Sorry.
1001406056.korean: 저는 따지자면 늑대에 가까운데 다른 이들은&n저를 강아지 같다고 하더군요.&n납득이 안… 네? 강아지 같아서 귀엽다고요?&n생각해보면 늑대와 개는 종이 같지요.&n머… 멍멍? 죄송합니다.

1001406057.english: Serving someone is familiar to me. However, it is rare for what I have to do and what I want to do to align. I am happy every day because the person I want to serve and the person I must serve is my Master.
1001406057.korean: 누군가를 섬기는 것은 익숙합니다.&n하지만 해야하는 것과 하고 싶은 것이&n일치하는 것은 흔하지 않은 일입니다.&n제가 모시고 싶은 분, 제가 모셔야하는 분이&n주인님이라 매일이 행복해요.

1001406058.english: I, I, gladly. To my Master. I, I will dedicate myself.
1001406058.korean: 기, 기, 기꺼이. 주인님께.&n저를 보, 봉헌 하겠습니다.

1001406059.english: Old tales say that to appease the wrath of the gods&na shrine maiden must be offered.&nI am so happy to be the one&nto soothe my master's wrath.
1001406059.korean: 옛 이야기에 신의 노여움을 가라 앉히기&n위해서는 무녀를 바쳐야 한다고 했지요.&n주인님의 노여움을 가라 앉히는 것이&n저라서 무척 기뻐요.

1001406060.english: I humbly wish.&nMay a day like this be the same as yesterday.&nMay tomorrow be the same as today.&nMay I be with you until the end of this world…
1001406060.korean: 삼가 바라노니.&n이와 같은 오늘이 어제와 같기를.&n내일이 오늘 같기를.&n이 세상의 끝까지 당신과 함께할 수 있기를…

1001406061.english: A soft, fluffy bed, scented candles to help you sleep, a pillow tailored to your body, the elimination of noise sources that disturb your sleep, and… I heard it’s cold today… Ah! I can just give you a hug.
1001406061.korean: 푹신푹신한 침대, 잠이 잘 오는 향초,&n주인님의 몸에 맞춘 베개, 잠을 방해하는&n소음원 제거, 그리고… 오늘 춥다고 하던데…&n아! 제가 안아드리면 되겠네요.

1001406062.english: Deconstructor Azaz made this bed for me. If I press this button here... um... what was it again? Well, I don't think it matters. At most, someone's room will just get flooded.
1001406062.korean: 아자즈가 이 침대를 만들어줬어요.&n여기에 있는 이 버튼을 누르면&n음... 뭐였더라 뭐, 중요한 건 아니겠죠.&n기껏해야 누구의 방이 침수되고 말겠죠.

1001406063.english: You would be surprised to know how well Draculina sings. I started learning to sing from Draculina, but I got so engrossed in it that I just listened to her sing all day long.
1001406063.korean: 드라큐리나가 얼마나 노래를 잘 부르는지&n아시면 깜짝 놀라실 거예요. 드라큐리나에게&n노래를 배우다가 거기에 빠져들어서&n하루 종일 노래를 듣기만 했어요.

1001406064.english: I've learned how to seduce you, Master. First, you warm up in a hot bath, and while you do, I'll prepare a feast. After that, I'll... Steel Line Online, which you like... What? You're saying that's not it?
1001406064.korean: 주인님을 유혹하는 방법을 배웠어요.&n우선 주인님께서 따뜻한 목욕물에서 몸을&n데우시고, 그러는 동안에 제가 진수성찬을&n차릴게요. 그 다음에는 주인님이 좋아하시는&n스틸라인 온라인을… 네? 이게 아니라고요?

1001406065.english: I researched the clothing styles men liked in the past and compiled some materials. I made some clothes based on that data... what do you think? I hope you like them.
1001406065.korean: 과거의 남성들이 좋아하는 복장들을&n조사하고 자료를 만들었어요.&n자료에 맞춰서 옷을 만들었는데…&n어떠신가요? 좋아해주셨으면 좋겠어요.

1001406066.english: Are you sleepy? Then please lie down with your head on my lap. I will sing you a lullaby. I will always be by your side, Master, whenever you open your eyes. Even if you do not open your eyes, I will always be by your side.
1001406066.korean: 졸리신가요? 그러면 제 무릎을 베고&n누워주세요. 자장가를 불러 드릴게요.&n주인님께서 언제 눈을 떠도 언제나&n제가 곁에 있을게요. 눈을 뜨지 않으셔도&n언제나 제가 곁에 있을게요.

1001406067.english: Oh my? To think I can make you happy... What can I do to make you even happier, Master?
1001406067.korean: 어머? 저로 행복해지시다니… &n제가 어떻게 하면 주인님께서&n더 행복하실까요?

1001406068.english: Oh dear. I must make my master happy.&nBecause I become happy thanks to my master, master?&nWill you be happy together with me?
1001406068.korean: 큰일 났네요. 제가 주인님을 행복하게&n해드려야 하는데. 제가 주인님 덕분에&n행복해지다니 주인님?&n함께 행복해지시겠어요?

1001406069.english: When I am by my master's side I am so happy that&nI forget everything. My position, our enemies&nand even death. Perhaps this is the eternity&nof being with my master? Let's be together.&nEven after this world ends, forever.
1001406069.korean: 주인님의 곁에 있으면 너무 행복해서&n모든 것을 잊게 돼요. 저의 입장, 우리의 적&n그리고 죽음까지. 아마 이게 주인님과&n함께 하는 영원이겠죠? 함께해요.&n이 세상이 끝난 후에도 영원히.

1001406070.english: I don't usually use scissors this big when cutting clothes. But don't worry. Even if I use big scissors, my skills are perfect! There won't be any problems with the work at all!
1001406070.korean: 원래 옷을 재단할 때 이렇게 큰 가위를&n쓰진 않았어. 하지만, 걱정하지 마.&n큰 가위를 쓰더라도, 내 실력은 완벽하니까!&n작업에는 전혀 문제가 없을 거야!

1001406071.english: Artists get inspiration from various places. In my case, I tend to come up with ideas while writing. Talonfeather and Muse, in particular, really like my writing.
1001406071.korean: 예술가들은 다양한 곳에서 인스피레이션을&n얻어. 내 경우에는, 글을 쓰면서 아이디어를&n떠올리는 편이지. 특히 탈론페더 씨나&n뮤즈 씨가 내 글을 엄청 좋아하더라고.

1001406072.english: I have one principle. It is to always think positively, no matter how tough things get! Because no matter how hard it is, we will eventually be able to overcome it! Isn't that cool?
1001406072.korean: 내게는 한 가지 원칙이 있어. 그건 바로,&n힘든 일이 있어도, 항상 긍정적으로&n생각하라는 것! 아무리 힘든 일이 있다고&n해도, 결국 우린 이겨낼 수 있을 테니까!&n어때, 좀 멋있지?

1001406073.english: You haven't heard my name? That's ridiculous! I may not be quite on Audrey Dreamweaver's level, but I'm a really famous designer! You know that nursery rhyme? Tinker, Taylor, Soldier, Sailor. I'm saying I'm famous enough to have my name in a nursery rhyme! Huh? You're not that Taylor?
1001406073.korean: 내 이름을 못 들어봤다고? 말도 안 돼!&n오드리만큼은 아니지만, 난 정말 유명한&n디자이너라고! 이런 동요도 있잖아?&n팅커, 테일러, 솔져, 세일러. 동요에도&n내 이름이 나올 정도로 유명하단 말씀!&n응? 그 테일러가 아니라고?

1001406074.english: If Audrey Dreamweaver was in charge of high fashion, I mainly designed ready-to-wear. So I know people's tastes very well. Of course, I’ve figured out your taste too, Mr. It’s all about sexy and pretty clothes! Right?
1001406074.korean: 오드리가 하이 패션을 담당했다면,&n난 주로 기성복을 디자인했어.&n그래서 사람들의 취향에 대해서도 아~주&n잘 알고 있어. 물론, 미스터의 취향도 파악이&n끝났고. 그건 바로 야시시하고 예쁜 옷! 맞지?

1001406075.english: Lately, before I know it, I find myself scribbling menswear designs. I have a mountain of clothes to work on. It's all your fault, Mr. I'm a ready-to-wear designer, but I fell so deeply for you that I ended up becoming your exclusive designer. So... take responsibility. For my feelings.
1001406075.korean: 요즘 정신을 차려보면 자꾸 남성복 디자인을&n끄적이고 있어. 작업할 옷이 산더미인데.&n이게 다 미스터 때문이야. 나는 기성복&n디자이너인데, 미스터한테 푹 빠져서 그만&n전속 디자이너가 되어버렸잖아.&n그러니까... 책임져. 내 마음을.

1001406076.english: Mr.? It's dangerous if you distract me while I'm working.
1001406076.korean: 미스터?&n작업하는 중에 신경 쓰이게 하면 위험해.

1001406077.english: Master? It looks like I've run out of design material.&nWhich part should I reveal to look prettier?&nWon't you come to my room and give me some ideas?
1001406077.korean: 미스터? 아무래도 나,&n디자인 소재가 전부 떨어진 것 같은데&n어느 부위를 드러내야 더 예쁜지,&n내 방에 와서 아이디어 좀 주지 않을래?

1001406078.english: Master, how about we try on a couple look together?&nYou don't have any good ideas? Of course I do!&nFor example, the clothes we were born with...
1001406078.korean: 미스터, 우리 커플룩 한 번 맞춰보지 않을래?&n뭐 좋은 생각 없냐고? 물론 있지!&n예를 들면, 태어날 때 입고 있던 옷이라던가...

1001406079.english: Shall I tell you a secret? Actually, this outfit… I cut it up here and there to suit your taste, Mr. I did a little research beforehand. I’ve been hiding it until now because I was too embarrassed to talk about it… but well, there shouldn't be any secrets between a married couple.
1001406079.korean: 비밀 얘기 하나 해 줄까? 사실, 이 옷은…&n미스터의 취향에 맞게 여기저기 싹둑싹둑&n잘라낸 옷이야. 만나기 전에 미리&n사전 조사 좀 했지. 말하기 부끄러워서&n여태까지 숨기고 있었지만... 뭐,&n부부 사이에는 비밀이 없어야 하니까.

1001406080.english: Happy birthday~ Happy birthday~ Huh? You're asking whose birthday it is? It's not that. I was just singing a birthday song while designing clothes for our baby. Even if not now, one will come someday. Right, honey?
1001406080.korean: 생일 축하합니다~ 생일 축하합니다~&n응? 누구 생일이냐고? 그런 게 아니라,&n우리 아가한테 입힐 옷을 디자인하면서&n생일 축하 노래를 부르고 있던 것 뿐이야.&n지금은 아니라도, 언젠가는 생길 테니까.&n그렇지, 여보?

1001406081.english: Ah, Audrey Dreamweaver sent the pattern. Throwing work at me when I'm so busy—she really is a mean sister... Actually, even though I said that, it feels like a dream to be able to work with the sisters again. It's all thanks to you, Mr. Thank you.
1001406081.korean: 아, 오드리가 옷본을 보냈네. 바쁜데&n또 일감을 던져주다니, 나쁜 동생이라니까…&n사실, 말은 이렇게 했지만, 다시 자매들과&n함께 작업을 할 수 있다는 게 꿈만 같아.&n이게 다 미스터 덕분이야. 고마워, 미스터.

1001406082.english: You want me to say something wifely? Hmm, what should I say... Ah, right. How about this? Welcome, honey~ I've been waiting for you. Huh? You ask why I'm looking down to greet you? Well, I guess... Hehe.
1001406082.korean: 아내다운 멘트를 해 달라고?&n으음, 뭐가 있을까... 아, 그래. 이건 어때?&n어서 오세요, 여보~ 기다리고 있었어요.&n응? 왜 아래를 보고 인사하냐고?&n그야, 뭐... 후후.

1001406083.english: Hahaha, We are Orca's special top-secret agent, Pirate... W-wait, NG! NG! Let Us try again! We got too absorbed in the last role...
1001406083.korean: 후후후, 짐은 오르카의 스페셜 탑 시크릿&n에이전트 파이러ㅊ… 자, 잠깐, NG! NG!&n다시 할게! 지난 배역에 너무 몰입해서…

1001406084.english: I consulted extensively with Agency 080 to ensure Our mission could be carried out smoothly. Is it really okay for them to act like that? Seriously? The one wearing nothing but a coat over her bare body, the one who talks strangely, the one trying to drag someone into the lab out of the blue... It’s definitely fine for them to behave like that, right?
1001406084.korean: 짐의 임무를 수월하게 수행하기 위해서&n080 기관에 많은 자문을 받았지. 쟤네들&n저래도 괜찮아? 진짜? 맨몸에 외투만 걸치는&n애, 말하는 게 이상한 애, 다짜고짜 연구실로&n끌고 가려는 애… 저래도 괜찮은 거 맞지?

1001406085.english: A true professional must have principles even when accepting a commission. No commissions from villains, no gambling, no doing anything that isn't cool, and no harm to men or children. Huh? I did say that right, didn't I?
1001406085.korean: 의뢰를 수락하는 것도 원칙이 있어야 진정한&n프로이니라. 악당의 의뢰는 받지 않을 것,&n도박은 하지 않을 것, 멋지지 않으면&n하지 않을 것, 남자와 아이는 해치지 않을 것.&n응? 제대로 말한 게 맞다만?

1001406086.english: You ask if I'm good at shooting? I'm not exactly the best, but... why are you asking? Huh? Because of this gun? You ask why I carry a gun? Why are you asking the obvious? Because it looks cool!
1001406086.korean: 총을 잘 쏘냐고? 잘 쏘는 편은 아니다만…&n그건 왜 묻느냐? 응? 이 총 때문에? 왜 총을&n가지고 다니냐고? 무슨 당연한 것을 묻느냐?&n멋있으니까!

1001406087.english: Hahaha. All the training necessary for infiltration is complete. Before taking on the full-scale mission, shall we try a light practice run first...? I’ll secretly leave a gift in that kid’s room... I’m already looking forward to it.
1001406087.korean: 후후후. 잠입에 필요한 훈련이 전부 끝났다.&n본격적인 임무를 맡기 전에 먼저 가벼운&n실전을 치뤄볼까… 그 아이의 방에…&n몰래 선물을 두고 오겠다.&n벌써 기대가 되는구나.

1001406088.english: It's impossible to entrust a mission to a special top agent like Us with just one or two cans of tuna. I doubt you can afford it. The price for this mission is… just a tight hug. Hehe.
1001406088.korean: 짐과 같은 스페셜 탑 에이전트에게 임무를&n의뢰를 하려면 참치캔 한두 개로는&n불가능하지. 그대가 이를 지불할 수 있을지&n의구심이 드는구나. 이번 의뢰의 대가는…&n꼬옥 안아주면 돼. 헤헤.

1001406089.english: Hmph... Hehe... Th-this is also Our mission... Stop touching!
1001406089.korean: 훗… 후훗… 이, 이것도 짐의 임무…&n그만 만져!

1001406090.english: Of course a butterfly would be captivated by a beautiful flower filled with sweet honey. However… the flower being captivated by the butterfly is strange. Still, we must continue the mission… let us proceed.
1001406090.korean: 아름답고 달콤한 꿀을 머금은 꽃에 나비가&n홀리는 것은 당연하겠지. 그러나… 꽃 또한&n나비에게 홀렸으니 이상한 일이다.&n그래도 임무를 계속 해야하니…&n이어서 하도록 하자.

1001406091.english: If you ask whether Our seduction of you is public or private, it is of course public. But Our fondness for you is… purely private. Is distinction between public and private necessary now that We are trying to seduce you? Right now We just want to whisper love.
1001406091.korean: 짐이 그대를 유혹한 게 공적인가 사적인가&n묻는다면 당연히 공적이지.&n하지만 짐이 그대를 좋아하는 것은…&n지극히 사적이다. 지금 와서 그대를&n유혹하는 것에 공사 구분이 필요할까?&n지금은 단지 사랑을 속삭이고 싶다.

1001406092.english: Lord Lougarou challenged me to a race, and as you know, Lord Lougarou is incredibly fast, isn't he? But then… there happened to be a car, you see? So I borrowed it for a moment? However… there was a bit of a minor accident? So right now I'm paying it back with my body.
1001406092.korean: 루가루 공이 경주를 하자고 했는데 알다시피&n루가루 공이 여간 빠른 게 아니잖아요?&n그런데 차가 있네요? 그래서 잠시 빌렸네요?&n그런데… 조금 사소한 사고가 있었네요?&n그래서 지금 몸으로 갚고 있는 중이죠.

1001406093.english: I haven't forgotten that my role is to make the car stand out, you know? I am happy and it is only natural that you take an interest in me, though. What? You were already looking at the car? Where are you looking when you have me around?
1001406093.korean: 제 역할이 차를 돋보이게 하는 것임을&n잊지 않고 있답니다? 저에게 관심을&n가져주시는 것은 기쁘고 당연하지만요.&n네? 이미 차를 보고 계셨다고요?&n저를 두고 어딜 보고 계신 건가요?

1001406094.english: Attracting sponsors is also my role. Hmm... come to think of it, Your Majesty alone would be the most valuable sponsor compared to the others.
1001406094.korean: 스폰서를 끌어모으는 것도 저의 역할이죠.&n음… 생각해 보니 다른 스폰서보다&n폐하 한 분이 제일 가치 있겠네요.

1001406095.english: Do you wish to ride this car? Then please let me know His Majesty's information. After all, it is only natural for a Grid Girl to know information about her own team.
1001406095.korean: 이 차를 타고 싶으신가요?&n그러면 폐하의 정보를 저에게 알려주세요.&n같은 팀의 정보를 아는 것은 그리드 걸에게는&n당연한 일이니까요.

1001406096.english: Your Majesty, aren't you thirsty? Isn't the sun too stinging? Shall I wipe your sweat? These things are meant for drivers, but my driver is always Your Majesty, you know?
1001406096.korean: 폐하, 목은 안 마르신가요?&n햇볕은 너무 따갑지는 않나요?&n땀을 닦아드릴까요?&n드라이버를 위한 것들이지만&n저의 드라이버는 언제나 폐하랍니다?

1001406097.english: Normally, the photo time per person is short, but for Your Majesty, it is unlimited. Where shall we take the picture? Here? In the car? Or… on the bed?
1001406097.korean: 원래라면 한 사람당 포토 타임은 짧지만&n폐하라면 무제한이에요. 어디를 배경으로&n하고 찍을까요? 여기서? 차 안에서?&n아니면… 침대 위에서?

1001406098.english: Your Majesty, it is difficult for you to do this right now.

1001406099.english: Oh my, how did you know this is an advertising space for His Majesty? Hehe, it's a space for His Majesty, so please express yourself freely, my lord.
1001406099.korean: 어머, 폐하를 위한 광고 공간이라는 것을&n어떻게 아셨나요? 후후, 폐하를 위한&n공간이니 마음껏 폐하를 표현해주세요.&n마. 음. 껏.

1001406100.english: I humbly wish. May a day like this be the same as yesterday. May tomorrow be the same as today. May I be with you until the end of this world…
1001406100.korean: 삶이란 정해진 도로 위가 아니라 정해지지&n않은 비포장 도로를 달리는 경주와 같죠.&n이 끝이 어떻게 끝날지는 모르겠지만 폐하와&n함께라면 끝까지 함께 하겠어요.&n저 샬럿은 폐하만을 위한 그리드 걸이니까.

1001406101.english: Hehe, are you bothered by my hair? I grow it out like this to attract the kids' attention. Just like Santa's beard.
1001406101.korean: 후후, 제 머리가 신경 쓰이시나요?&n이런 식으로 머리를 길러서 아이들의&n관심을 끄는거죠. 산타의 수염처럼요.

1001406102.english: They say Santa gives presents to good children... but who will give a present to good Maria?
1001406102.korean: 착한 어린이들은 산타가 선물을 준다는데…&n착한 마리아에게는 누가 선물을 줄까요?

1001406103.english: Just because you haven't seen Santa doesn't mean he doesn't exist. If children believe in Santa, then Santa exists.
1001406103.korean: 산타를 못 봤다고 해서&n산타가 없는 건 아니에요.&n아이들이 산타를 믿으면&n산타는 존재하죠.

1001406104.english: Christmas may hold various meanings, but children don't really care about such things. They simply enjoy Christmas purely. So, you have no choice but to prepare for a joyful Christmas, do you?
1001406104.korean: 크리스마스에는 여러가지 의미가&n담겨있겠지만 아이들은 그런 것에 크게&n신경 쓰지 않아요. 순수하게 크리스마스를&n즐기죠. 그러니 즐거운 크리스마스를 &n준비할 수밖에 없잖아요?

1001406105.english: Master, would you be willing to play the role of Santa Claus to deliver presents to the children? Then I will take on the role of an elf or reindeer helping Santa. You can even ride around.
1001406105.korean: 주인님 아이들에게 선물을 나눠줄 산타역을&n맡아주실 수 있으신가요?&n그러면 저는 산타를 돕는 요정 혹은&n순록 역할을 맡을게요.&n타고 다니실 수도 있어요.

1001406106.english: The children may have many gifts they wish for, but no gift will be as precious as the time spent with you, Master. Not just the children... but me, too.
1001406106.korean: 아이들이 바라는 선물은 많겠지만 그 어떠한&n선물도 주인님과 함께하는 시간보다 &n소중하지 못할 거예요. 아이들뿐만 아니라...&n저에게도요.

1001406107.english: Okay, just a moment. The children… you know.

1001406108.english: All the children have fallen asleep. The children's time is over… now it's adults' time.&nWill you help so more children can celebrate Christmas?
1001406108.korean: 아이들이 전부 잠들었네요. 아이들의 시간이&n끝났으니… 이제 성인들의 시간이네요.&n더 많은 아이들이 크리스마스를&n맞이할 수 있게 도와주시겠어요?

1001406109.english: Master, what sport do you like? Baseball? Or soccer? Or rugby? Ah, forming a league would be nice.&nWhat do I mean? Hehe, what could it mean?
1001406109.korean: 주인님께선 어떤 스포츠를 좋아하시나요?&n야구? 아니면 축구? 그것도 아니면 럭비?&n아, 리그를 구성하는 것도 좋겠네요.&n무슨 말이냐고요? 후후, 무슨 의미일까요?

1001406110.english: I only have good memories of Christmas. The family sitting around eating delicious food, opening gift boxes, watching movies together… But… they were all fabricated, fake memories.
1001406110.korean: 크리스마스 때는 좋았던 기억밖에 없어요.&n가족이 둘러앉아 맛있는 음식을 먹고,&n선물 상자를 열고, 함께 영화를 보고…&n하지만… 전부 만들어진 가짜 기억이었죠.

1001406111.english: The happier a memory is, the greater the pain of realizing it is fake. It is fake, but... since it is a part of me, I cannot erase it.
1001406111.korean: 추억이 행복하면 행복할수록 그것이&n가짜라는 것을 깨달을 때의 고통은 커지죠.&n가짜이지만... 저의 일부이기에&n지워버릴 수도 없어요.

1001406112.english: I hate Christmas. Because whenever Christmas comes, I have happy memories and realize that those memories are fake. … … No. Let me correct myself. I hated Christmas.
1001406112.korean: 저는 크리스마스가 싫어요.&n크리스마스만 되면 행복했던 기억과&n그 기억이 가짜라는 사실을 깨닫게 되니까요.&n……아뇨. 정정할게요.&n저는 크리스마스가 싫었어요.

1001406113.english: When Neodym comes near me, I can feel that she is worried about me. So I try to be strong too. And… I feel the same way from you. Thank you. I will do my best.
1001406113.korean: 네오딤이 제 근처에 오면 그 애가&n저를 걱정하고 있다는 것이 느껴져요.&n그래서 저도 힘을 내려고 하죠. 그리고…&n당신에게서도 똑같은 마음이 느껴져요.&n고마워요. 힘낼게요.

1001406114.english: My pain disappears when you're by my side. I wonder why? Hehe, actually, I know. But I'm too shy to tell you. Not yet.
1001406114.korean: 당신이 곁에 있으면 고통이 사라져요.&n왜 그런 걸까요? 후후, 사실 알고 있어요.&n부끄러우니까, 알려드리지는 않을 거예요.&n아직은.

1001406115.english: Neodym, Ms. Echidna, Ms. Brynhildr, Miss Aurora, and Indomitable Marie have prepared a Christmas party. Um... if you don't mind, would you come along? We've even prepared a gift...
1001406115.korean: 네오딤, 에키드나 씨, 브륀힐드 씨,&n아우로라 양, 마리 님이 크리스마스 파티를&n준비했어요. 저기… 괜찮으시다면&n같이 가주시겠어요?&n선물도 준비 되어 있는데…

1001406116.english: Wait a minute. I still have another gift...

1001406117.english: Please. For me… make a real family, not a fake one.
1001406117.korean: 부탁해요. 저에게… 가짜 가족이 아닌...&n진짜 가족을 만들어주세요.

1001406118.english: It's Christmas. Even in this world, on Christmas everyone looks happy.&nMe? Hehe, because you're by my side.&nWhen you're next to me I'm happy at any time.
1001406118.korean: 크리스마스네요. 이런 세상이지만&n크리스마스가 되니 모두가 행복해보이네요.&n저 말인가요? 후후, 당신이 옆에 있잖아요.&n당신이 옆에 있으면 어느 때든 행복해요.

1001406119.english: Are you speaking of the Empress? … She is the one who made me possible. I do not wish to say anything more than this. For right now, you are the only one for me, Master.
1001406119.korean: 여제님 말씀이십니까?&n…저를 있게 해주신 분입니다.&n이 이상은 말하고 싶지 않습니다.&n지금의 저에게는 주인님 뿐이니 말입니다.

1001406120.english: There are many things in Orca that do not befit your dignity, Master. If you grant me the authority to rectify them, I will transform them all into appearances worthy of you.
1001406120.korean: 오르카에는 주인님의 위엄에 어울리지 않는&n것들이 많습니다. 저에게 그것들을 바로잡을&n권한을 주신다면 모조리 주인님께 어울리는&n모습으로 바꿔놓겠습니다.

1001406121.english: Ah, it is you, Master. I was organizing the cans piled up here. Stacking them up straight, matching the numbers, and making sure the labels were facing forward. Hehe, it looks good.
1001406121.korean: 아, 주인님이시군요. 여기 쌓인 통조림들을&n정리하고 있었습니다. 똑바로 숫자를 맞춰서&n쌓아올리고 상표도 정면으로 보이게&n말입니다. 후후, 보기 좋군요.

1001406122.english: I meet with the various captains of the Orca and search through ancient records, constantly contemplating what makes a great leader, so that I can be of even greater help to my Master than I am now.
1001406122.korean: 오르카의 여러 대장들과 만나고 옛 기록을&n찾으며 훌륭한 리더가 무엇인가 언제나&n고민하고 있습니다. 지금보다 더 주인님께&n도움이 될 수 있도록 말입니다.

1001406123.english: I spoke with Janghwa and CheonA. In the past, I would have beheaded them... but I could not do so knowing that Master would be sad. And... I think I understand their feelings as well.
1001406123.korean: 장화와 천아, 그 둘과 대화를 나눴습니다.&n옛날이라면 목을 베어버렸겠지만…&n주인님께서 슬퍼하실 것을 알기에 그러지&n못했습니다. 그리고… 저도 두 사람의&n마음을 알 것 같습니다.

1001406124.english: I am aware that there are many who adore you, Master. Considering your dignity, it is only natural. However, I do not approve of someone unworthy of your standing stepping forward so presumptuously. Huh? I’m not… jealous…
1001406124.korean: 주인님을 연모하는 이들이 많은 걸로 알고&n있습니다. 주인님의 위엄을 생각하면 당연한&n일이지요. 하지만 주인님께 걸맞지 않은 자가&n함부로 나서는 것은 탐탁지 않군요.&n예? 질투하는 거… 아닙니다…

1001406125.english: Ah... M-Master... I... even if I am lacking... I hope you won't be disappointed.
1001406125.korean: 앗… 주, 주인님… 저… 부, 부족하더라도…&n실망하지… 말아주셨으면 합니다.

1001406126.english: F-For my master… I… I've learned many things… I may be inexperienced… but… I will serve… wholeheartedly.
1001406126.korean: 주, 주인님을 위해… 여… 여러가지를&n배웠습니다… 미숙하겠지만…&n성심껏… 봉사하겠습니다.

1001406127.english: As a servant… or as a woman. After you gave me the ring, master, I couldn't quite find my bearings for a few days. But now, it's alright. No matter which role, my heart to serve you remains the same.
1001406127.korean: 신하로서의 나인가. 여자로서의 나인가.&n주인님께서 반지를 주신 후 며칠 동안 갈피를&n잡지 못했습니다. 하지만 지금은 괜찮습니다.&n어느 쪽이든 주인님을 위한다는&n마음은 똑같으니까요.

1001406128.english: Until now, I have tried everything to understand why so many people follow you, Master. However, I have stopped trying now. Because no matter what kind of person you are… my heart will not change.
1001406128.korean: 여태까지 왜 많은 이들이 주인님을 따르는지&n알기 위해 백방으로 노력했습니다.&n그러나 지금은 그 노력을 그만두었습니다.&n주인님께서 어떤 분이시든…&n저의 마음은 변치 않을 테니까요.

1001406129.english: I record everything you say, Master, and edit and organize it whenever I have time. I especially save the times you praised me separately so that when I go to sleep… Ah… I… I’m sorry! Please pretend you didn’t hear that!
1001406129.korean: 주인님의 말은 전부 녹음해두고 시간이&n날 때마다 편집하고 정리해두고 있습니다.&n특히나 저를 칭찬해주신 것들은&n따로 모아둬서 잘 때… 아… 죄… 죄송합니다!&n못 들은 것으로 해주십시오!

1001406130.english: You mean these ears? They say it's a side effect that occurred when filling in the blanks of the Invincible Dragon blueprint. It looks like they might have taken some parts of the Saman blueprint, but if you're wondering what I mean by saying they're ugly... huh? You mean they're cute...? Th-thank you.
1001406130.korean: 이 귀 말입니까? 무적의 용 설계도의&n빈 부분을 보충할 때 생긴&n부작용이라고 합니다. 아마 삼안 쪽 설계도&n일부를 가져온 거 같긴 한데 혹시 추하다면&n 예? 귀엽…다고요? 가, 감사합니다.

1001406131.english: Until now, I have tried everything to understand why so many people follow you, Master. However, I have stopped trying now. Because no matter what kind of person you are… my heart will not change.
1001406131.korean: 여태까지 왜 많은 이들이 주인님을 따르는지&n알기 위해 백방으로 노력했습니다.&n그러나 지금은 그 노력을 그만두었습니다.&n주인님께서 어떤 분이시든…&n저의 마음은 변치 않을 테니까요.

1001406132.english: I record everything you say, Master, and edit and organize it whenever I have time. I especially save the times you praised me separately so that when I go to sleep… Ah… I… I’m sorry! Please pretend you didn’t hear that!
1001406132.korean: 주인님의 말은 전부 녹음해두고 시간이&n날 때마다 편집하고 정리해두고 있습니다.&n특히나 저를 칭찬해주신 것들은&n따로 모아둬서 잘 때… 아… 죄… 죄송합니다!&n못 들은 것으로 해주십시오!

1001406133.english: You mean these ears? They say it's a side effect that occurred when filling in the blanks of the Invincible Dragon blueprint. It looks like they might have taken some parts of the Saman blueprint, but if you're wondering what I mean by saying they're ugly... huh? You mean they're cute...? Th-thank you.
1001406133.korean: 이 귀 말입니까? 무적의 용 설계도의&n빈 부분을 보충할 때 생긴&n부작용이라고 합니다. 아마 삼안 쪽 설계도&n일부를 가져온 거 같긴 한데 혹시 추하다면&n 예? 귀엽…다고요? 가, 감사합니다.

1001406134.english: Um... Master? May I... leave the voice recorder on... while we are making love? H-h-it doesn't really mean anything... It's just... later... when I miss you...
1001406134.korean: 저… 주인님? 운우지정을 나누는 동안에…&n노…녹음기를… 켜둬도… 될까요?&n크…큰 의미는 없습니다… 다, 단지…&n나중에… 주인님이 그리울 때…

1001406135.english: Um… Master? While we… share intimacy… c-can I… turn on the recorder…? I-It's not for anything… it's just… so that later… when I miss you…
1001406135.korean: 저… 주인님? 운우지정을 나누는 동안에…&n노…녹음기를… 켜둬도… 될까요?&n크…큰 의미는 없습니다… 다, 단지…&n나중에… 주인님이 그리울 때…

1001406136.english: With the Saint of the True Ancestors and the Dragon Slayer together, what could possibly dare stop us! Are you satisfied now? It's embarrassing, so please don't make me do it too often.
1001406136.korean: 진조의 성녀와 용살자가 함께 하는데,&n감히 무엇이 우리를 막을 수 있겠느냐!&n이제 만족하셨나요? 부끄러우니까,&n너무 자주 시키진 말아주세요.

1001406137.english: You ask what I do after work? Usually, I drink. Bars are too formal and uncomfortable, so I have beer and snacks in my room… Wait, please forget that.
1001406137.korean: 업무가 끝나면 뭘 하냐고요?&n주로 술을 마시죠.&n바는 너무 격식을 차려서 불편하니까,&n방에서 맥주랑 과자를…&n잠깐, 방금 그건 잊어주세요.

1001406138.english: LRL has been taking really good care of me lately. Last time, she brought cans of tuna to share, and I was so touched by how thoughtful she was that I absentmindedly ate two cans... What? What do you mean, stolen goods?
1001406138.korean: 최근 LRL이 절 많이 돌봐주고 있죠.&n저번에는 참치캔을 같이 먹자고 가져왔는데,&n언니를 챙기는 마음이 너무 기특해서,&n무심코 두 캔이나... 네? 장물이라니요?

1001406139.english: I feel like I'm going to die of embarrassment every time my little self looks at me and calls me the Saint of the True Ancestors. I’ve already graduated from that concept, you know. B-but come to think of it again, the name Saint of the True Ancestors actually seems kind of cool...
1001406139.korean: 작은 제가 절 보고 진조의 성녀라고 부를&n때마다 부끄러워 죽을 것 같아요.&n저는 이제 그 컨셉은 졸업했단 말이에요.&n그, 그렇지만 다시 생각해보면, 진조의&n성녀라는 이름은 꽤나 멋진 것 같기도 하고...

1001406140.english: You ask if I can see with my eyes covered? Hehe, of course... I can't. I was created blind from the start. I guess you could say I'm the product of Densetsu-style realism.
1001406140.korean: 눈을 가리고 앞을 볼 수 있냐고요?&n후후, 그야 물론... 못 본답니다.&n애초에 전 눈이 먼 상태로 만들어졌거든요.&n덴세츠식 리얼리티의 결과물인 셈이죠.

1001406141.english: Sometimes I wish I could see. I want to see the sunlight, the flowers, and the Commander's face... with my own eyes. Are you worried I might be disappointed? Hehe, there's no way. After all, the Commander is the coolest person in the world.
1001406141.korean: 가끔은 앞을 볼 수 있었으면 하고 바라요.&n햇빛을, 꽃을, 그리고 사령관의 얼굴을…&n제 눈으로 직접 보고 싶거든요. 실망할까봐&n걱정되시나요? 후후, 그럴 리 없어요.&n사령관은 세상에서 제일 멋진 사람이니까.

1001406142.english: Y-Dragon Slayer? Th-that kind of act... wouldn't there be a more appropriate time and place?
1001406142.korean: 요...용살자? 이이이런 행위는…&n보다 더 적절한 때와 장소가 있지 않을까요?

1001406143.english: I see… So this means… you need my cooperation to rebuild humanity. Huh? That's not what you meant? No, Commander. That's exactly what I meant. I've just decided so.
1001406143.korean: 이건... 그렇군요. 인류를 재건하기 위해서…&n제 협력이 필요하시다는 뜻이군요.&n네? 그 뜻이 아니라고요? 아뇨, 사령관.&n그 뜻이 맞아요. 방금 제가 그렇게 정했어요.

1001406144.english: Dragon Slayer! Something's wrong! There's not enough love power! At this rate, you won't be able to use your strength! …So please fill me up… with love.
1001406144.korean: 용살자! 큰일났어요! 사랑의 힘이 부족합니다!&n이대로라면 힘을 쓸 수 없어요!&n...그러니 저를 사랑으로 가득 채워주세요.

1001406145.english: The Princess of the True Ancestors was reborn as a saint through love. Then, through my marriage to you, will I evolve another step further? Will I become a Bride Princess this time? Hehe. Just kidding. There is no such variation.
1001406145.korean: 진조의 공주는 사랑을 통해 성녀의 모습으로&n거듭났습니다. 그렇다면, 당신과의 혼약을&n통해, 저는 또 한 단계 진화하게 될까요?&n이번에는 브라이드 프린세스가 되는 걸까요?&n후후. 농담이에요. 그런 바리에이션은 없어요.

1001406146.english: I was created by Densetsu and Bismarck. More precisely, by the engineers belonging to them, but… what keeps me alive… and what makes my heart beat is only your love.
1001406146.korean: 저를 만든 건 덴세츠와 비스마르크.&n보다 정확히는 그 소속의 기술자들이지만…&n저를 살아있게 하는 건... 그리고 제 심장이&n뛰게 하는 건, 오직 당신의 사랑 뿐이에요.

1001406147.english: I am the Blind Princess. As a noble and elegant Saint of the True Ancestors, I absolutely! Never! open a can of beer in broad daylight wearing shorts and a T-shirt. In other words, what you just saw was an optical illusion. ...Ah, just forget about it already!
1001406147.korean: 본녀는 블라인드 프린세스입니다.&n고귀하고 우아한 진조의 성녀로, 절! 대!&n대낮부터 반바지에 티셔츠 차림으로&n맥주캔을 까지 않습니다. &n즉, 방금 본 건 눈의 착각이란 말입니다.&n...아, 빨리 잊으시라구요!

1001406148.english: The Princess of the True Ancestors was reborn as a saint through love. Then, through my marriage to you, will I evolve another step further? Will I become a Bride Princess this time? Hehe. Just kidding. There is no such variation.
1001406148.korean: 진조의 공주는 사랑을 통해 성녀의 모습으로&n거듭났습니다. 그렇다면, 당신과의 혼약을&n통해, 저는 또 한 단계 진화하게 될까요?&n이번에는 브라이드 프린세스가 되는 걸까요?&n후후. 농담이에요. 그런 바리에이션은 없어요.

1001406149.english: I was created by Densetsu and Bismarck. More precisely, by the engineers belonging to them, but… what keeps me alive… and what makes my heart beat is only your love.
1001406149.korean: 저를 만든 건 덴세츠와 비스마르크.&n보다 정확히는 그 소속의 기술자들이지만…&n저를 살아있게 하는 건... 그리고 제 심장이&n뛰게 하는 건, 오직 당신의 사랑 뿐이에요.

1001406150.english: I am the Blind Princess. As a noble and elegant Saint of the True Ancestors, I absolutely! Never! open a can of beer in broad daylight wearing shorts and a T-shirt. In other words, what you just saw was an optical illusion. ...Ah, just forget about it already!
1001406150.korean: 본녀는 블라인드 프린세스입니다.&n고귀하고 우아한 진조의 성녀로, 절! 대!&n대낮부터 반바지에 티셔츠 차림으로&n맥주캔을 까지 않습니다. &n즉, 방금 본 건 눈의 착각이란 말입니다.&n...아, 빨리 잊으시라구요!

1001406151.english: So that even I, who cannot see the Commander, can always feel you. So that your warmth... your scent lingers within me. Please hold me tight.
1001406151.korean: 사령관의 모습이 보이지 않는 저도,&n언제나 당신을 느낄 수 있도록.&n당신의 온기가... 체취가 제게 남도록.&n꼭 안아주세요.

1001406152.english: Even when I can't see you, Commander, I want to always feel you. Your warmth… your scent… remain with me. Hold me tight.
1001406152.korean: 사령관의 모습이 보이지 않는 저도,&n언제나 당신을 느낄 수 있도록.&n당신의 온기가... 체취가 제게 남도록.&n꼭 안아주세요.

1001406153.english: - While seeing Benevolent Leanne and her party off and distributing supplies separately for the survivors arriving from England...
1001406153.korean: - 리앤 일행을 배웅하고, 영국에서 올 생존자들을 위해 물자를 따로 분배하던 도중...

1001406154.english: - I looked up at the sound of a knock.
1001406154.korean: - 똑똑 하고 들려오는 노크 소리에 고개를 들어올렸다.

1001406155.english: Maria of Redemption, who had tapped on my desk, smiled shyly when our eyes met.
1001406155.korean: - 내 책상을 두드린 마리아는, 나와 눈이 마주치자 배시시 미소를 지었다.

1001406157.english: Are you very busy? I knocked on the door, but I didn't hear an answer, so I just came in.
1001406157.korean: 많이 바쁘신가요? 문을 두드렸는데, 대답이 들려오지 않아서 그냥 들어왔어요.

1001406158.english: Would you like me to help you with some work?

1001406159.english: - And no matter how busy you are, it is only natural to make time for our team members.
1001406159.korean: - 그리고 아무리 바쁘더라도, 우리 대원들을 위해 시간을 내는 건 당연한 일이다.

1001406160.english: Hehe, I'm glad you said that.

1001406161.english: I have a favor to ask of you, Master.
1001406161.korean: 주인님께 하나 부탁드리고 싶은 게 있어서요.

1001406162.english: You're planning to host a Christmas party this time, right?

1001406163.english: Then, how about we host a welcome party for the survivors together?
1001406163.korean: 그럼, 그와 함께 생존자 분들을 위한 환영파티를 진행하는 건 어떨까요?

1001406164.english: Due to the schedule, it looks like Ms. Benevolent Leanne and her party will be returning during the week of Christmas.
1001406164.korean: 일정 상으로, 리앤 씨 일행이 크리스마스가 있는 주에 돌아오시게 될 것 같아서요.

1001406165.english: You must have had a very hard time being isolated in the UK all this time...
1001406165.korean: 그 동안 고립된 영국에서, 많이 고생하셨을 텐데...

1001406166.english: Since we are hosting a party anyway, I think it would make for a very meaningful event if we also arranged a space for the survivors.
1001406166.korean: 저희가 파티를 하는 김에, 생존자 분들을 위한 자리까지 마련하면 굉장히 뜻깊은 행사가 될 것 같아요.

1001406167.english: - I couldn't help but nod at those words. Certainly, throwing a party for the survivors would make them feel welcomed, rather than just handing out supplies.
1001406167.korean: - 나는 그 말에 고개를 끄덕일 수밖에 없었다. 확실히, 생존자들에게 그냥 물자를 나눠주는 것보다는 파티를 열어주는 편이 환영받는 느낌을 줄 수 있겠지.

1001406168.english: True to Maria of Redemption's caring nature, it was advice that pointed out the minute details.
1001406168.korean: - 남을 잘 돌보는 마리아답게, 세심한 부분을 잘 짚어준 조언이었다.

1001406170.english: But, since this is my first time doing something like this...

1001406173.english: Yes. I'll give it a try.

1001406175.english: Hmm... I wonder what kind of party it will be.

1001406176.english: I don't want to host a party with a fancy dinner.
1001406176.korean: 저는 화려한 만찬이 곁들어진 파티는 열고 싶지 않아요.

1001406177.english: Rather than that, on the Orca, where I can heal my weary mind and body by my master's side...
1001406177.korean: 그보다는, 오르카 호에서, 주인님 곁에서 지친 심신을 치유받을 수 있는...

1001406178.english: I hope it will be a warm party, like a fireplace in the middle of winter.
1001406178.korean: 한겨울의 벽난로처럼, 따뜻한 파티가 되었으면 해요.

1001406179.english: Of course, we also share gifts.

1001406180.english: It would be nice to have decorations that we prepared with care ourselves.
1001406180.korean: 저희가 직접 정성들여서 준비한 장식이 좋겠군요.

1001406182.english: Then, let's make a more detailed plan!
1001406182.korean: 그럼, 좀 더 자세히 계획을 세워 봐요!

1001406183.english: So Maria of Redemption and I started planning a party for the survivors.
1001406183.korean: - 그렇게 나와 마리아는 생존자들을 위한 파티 계획을 세우기 시작했다.

1001406184.english: - Of course, the material distribution plan that had been prepared in advance had to be canceled, but...
1001406184.korean: - 물론, 미리 만들어 놓았던 물자 분배 계획은 취소해야 했지만...

1001406185.english: Writing a new plan with Maria of Redemption was a really rewarding and enjoyable experience.
1001406185.korean: - 마리아와 함께 새로운 계획서를 작성하는 건 정말 보람차고 즐거운 일이었다.

1001406186.english: - ...Of course, that is separate from the fact that I like my work.
1001406186.korean: - ...물론, 내가 일을 좋아하는 것과는 별개로 말이다.

1001406187.english: Commander, where are you going in such a hurry?

1001406188.english: While I was frantically running around looking for a solution after receiving a report that we were short on wrapping paper for the soldiers' Christmas presents... Wraithy spoke to me.
1001406188.korean: - 대원들에게 줄 크리스마스 선물을 포장할 포장지가 모자라다는 보고를 받고 급하게 해결할 방법을 찾아 여기저기 뛰어다니던 도중... 레이시가 말을 걸어왔다.

1001406189.english: - Even if it is not a grand gift, the wrapping should be done with sincerity and care.
1001406189.korean: - 거창한 선물은 아니더라도, 포장은 마음을 담아 정성껏 해야 하는 법.

1001406190.english: - Since I worked hard preparing the gift, I should prepare some pretty wrapping paper to match.
1001406190.korean: - 열심히 선물을 준비했으니, 그에 맞게 예쁜 포장지를 준비해야겠지.

1001406191.english: - Since it was a gift for the combat unit members who had worked particularly hard carrying out the operation, I intended to prepare it with even more care.
1001406191.korean: - 작전을 수행하느라 특히 고생한 전투부대원들에게 줄 선물인 만큼, 더더욱 신경 써서 준비할 생각이었다.

1001406192.english: Ah, so these are the gifts you will be handing out at this Christmas party.
1001406192.korean: 아하, 이번 크리스마스 파티 때 나눠 주실 선물이군요.

1001406193.english: Hehe, don't worry. The rumor probably hasn't spread to Europe yet.
1001406193.korean: 후후, 걱정하지 마세요. 아직 유럽까지 소문이 퍼지지는 않았을 테니까요.

1001406194.english: Anyway, it seems like the Commander is having a really hard time...
1001406194.korean: 그나저나, 사령관님이 너무 고생하시는 것 같은데...

1001406195.english: Would you like us to help you?

1001406196.english: Yes. Since Neodym and Ms. Echidna happen to be patrolling near the old commercial district...
1001406196.korean: 네. 마침 네오딤과 에키드나 씨가 구 상업지구 근처를 순찰하고 있으니까...

1001406197.english: I think I'll be able to find the wrapping paper there.
1001406197.korean: 거기라면 포장지를 찾을 수 있을 거라고 생각해요.

1001406198.english: I'll go and look for wrapping paper with the two of you.
1001406198.korean: 제가 가서 두 사람과 함께 포장지를 찾아보도록 할게요.

1001406199.english: Even though Wraithy's condition has improved a lot, her physical condition before was so bad...
1001406199.korean: - 레이시의 상태가 많이 호전되기는 했어도, 그 전의 몸 상태가 워낙 안 좋았으니...

1001406200.english: - It is unavoidable to be worried.
1001406200.korean: - 걱정이 되는 건 어쩔 수 없는 노릇이다.

1001406201.english: Hehe, yes. I'll be careful... so the Commander doesn't have to worry.
1001406201.korean: 후훗, 네. 사령관님이 걱정하지 않게... 조심할게요.

1001406202.english: I'll be back with lots of wrapping paper, so are you looking forward to it?
1001406202.korean: 포장지를 잔뜩 들고 돌아올 테니, 기대하고 계세요?

1001406203.english: Fried onions are good, onions are good because they are delicious.
1001406203.korean: 기름에 튀긴 양파가 좋다네, 맛있으니까 양파가 좋다네.

1001406205.english: Really? I haven't tried it, so I don't know.

1001406206.english: Are you serious? You've been singing that song all this time, and you're saying you've never tried onion rings?
1001406206.korean: 진심이야? 여태 그 노래를 부르고 다녔으면서, 어니언 링을 한 번도 안 먹어봤다고?

1001406208.english: Haa... This is why the pursuit of pleasure is important.

1001406209.english: Now that I think about it, if it weren't for me, there would have been more than a few guys who would have missed out on this kind of fun, right?
1001406209.korean: 지금 보니까, 나 아녔으면 이런 즐거움을 모르고 넘어갔을 녀석들이 한둘이 아니잖아?

1001406210.english: The commander wasn't praising the gourmet gathering for nothing.
1001406210.korean: 사령관이 괜히 미식회를 만든 걸 칭찬한 게 아니네.

1001406211.english: You should come to the get-together sometime. I'll treat you to lots of delicious food.
1001406211.korean: 너도 나중에 한 번 모임에 와. 맛있는 걸 잔뜩 먹여줄 테니까.

1001406212.english: When do you eat onion rings?

1001406215.english: No. It's A-87 Banshee's turn to decide the menu this week.
1001406215.korean: 안 돼. 이번 주는 밴시가 메뉴를 정할 차례거든.

1001406217.english: So... what's on the menu this week?

1001406220.english: I heard it was a secret?

1001406221.english: I was curious just how amazing something was going to be, but I said I understood.
1001406221.korean: 대체 얼마나 대단한 걸 준비할지 궁금하긴 했지만, 알았다고 했지.

1001406222.english: It is quite fun to try and guess what the unknown entity might be.
1001406222.korean: 미지의 존재가 과연 무엇일지 추측해 보는 것도 꽤나 즐거운 일이니까.

1001406224.english: Right. I guess I should prepare another serving of onion rings. Hehe...
1001406224.korean: 그래. 어니언 링을 1인분 더 준비해야겠네. 후후...

1001406226.english: I've decided. For the next gourmet gathering activity after the onion rings, I'm going to have a Buche de Noel.
1001406226.korean: 결정했어. 어니언 링 다음 미식회 활동은 부쉬 드 노엘로 할래.

1001406228.english: What do you mean, suddenly? Look at the logs piled up over there.
1001406228.korean: 갑자기라니? 저기 쌓여 있는 통나무를 봐.

1001406229.english: It looks exactly like a Buche de Noel.

1001406230.english: I'm the type of person who doesn't feel satisfied until I eat whatever I've started craving. So, since it just crossed my mind, wouldn't I have to try it to really let it go?
1001406230.korean: 난 먹고 싶어진 건 먹어봐야 속이 시원해지는 성격이거든. 그러니, 생각난 김에 먹어봐야 직성이 풀리지 않겠어?

1001406233.english: Anyway, that's fascinating. How can a cake and a log be so similar?
1001406233.korean: 그나저나 신기하네. 케이크와 통나무가 어떻게 저렇게 비슷할 수가 있지?

1001406234.english: Hehe, well, the "bûche" in bûche de Noël means firewood in French.
1001406234.korean: 후후, 그야 부쉬 드 노엘의 부쉬가 프랑스어로 장작이라는 뜻이니까요.

1001406236.english: Hi, Neodym. Have you been patrolling the area well?
1001406236.korean: 안녕, 네오딤. 주위 순찰은 잘 하고 있었어?

1001406237.english: Yeah... nothing dangerous has happened so far.

1001406238.english: It's only natural since I'm with you.

1001406239.english: By the way, how do you know what Buche de Noël means?
1001406239.korean: 그나저나, 부쉬 드 노엘의 뜻은 어떻게 알아?

1001406240.english: I studied hard for this Christmas too.
1001406240.korean: 저도 이번 크리스마스를 위해 열심히 공부했거든요.

1001406241.english: I was planning to prepare a small gift for everyone who has worked hard for me, including the Commander, the technical staff, and even the younger members of the Bermuda Team.
1001406241.korean: 사령관님이나, 기술부 사람들... 그리고 버뮤다 팀의 동생들까지. 절 위해 힘써 주신 분들을 위해 작게나마 선물을 준비할 생각이었어요.

1001406242.english: I can't make anything amazing, but it would be a shame to have a party without a cake... so I was thinking of getting Aurora's help to make something.
1001406242.korean: 엄청난 건 할 수 없지만, 파티에 케이크가 빠지면 섭섭하니까... 아우로라 양의 도움을 받아서 뭔가 만들어 볼까, 생각하고 있었죠.

1001406243.english: If you're going to make it, please make it a Buche de Noël.
1001406243.korean: 만약 만들 거라면, 부쉬 드 노엘로 부탁해.

1001406244.english: Should I? After all, our combat troops are also in France...
1001406244.korean: 그럴까요? 마침 저희 전투부대원들이 계신 곳도 프랑스니까...

1001406245.english: If you make a French Christmas cake, it would make a meaningful gift.
1001406245.korean: 프랑스의 성탄절 케이크를 만든다면, 의미있는 선물이 되겠네요.

1001406246.english: It will make a delicious gift.

1001406247.english: Haha, of course that would be the case.

1001406248.english: But... Wraithy, what brings you all the way here?
1001406248.korean: 근데... 레이시 언니는, 여기까지 무슨 일이야?

1001406249.english: Ah, I forgot to tell you.

1001406250.english: The commander said they were short on gift wrapping paper, so I came out to find some.
1001406250.korean: 사령관님이 선물 포장지가 부족하다고 하셔서, 포장지를 찾아서 나왔어.

1001406251.english: It just so happens that this area used to have a lot of shops back in the day, doesn't it?
1001406251.korean: 마침 이 근처가 옛날에 상점이 많았던 곳이잖니?

1001406252.english: The three of us planned to look for wrapping paper while walking around the commercial district and chatting.
1001406252.korean: 셋이서 같이 얘기도 할 겸, 함께 상업지구를 돌아보면서 포장지를 찾으려고 했지.

1001406254.english: Well, I didn't have anything to do anyway...
1001406254.korean: 뭐, 나도 마침 할 일이 없었으니까...

1001406255.english: It would be interesting to take this opportunity to see what kind of pleasures people of the past enjoyed.
1001406255.korean: 이 참에 옛날 인간들은 어떤 쾌락을 즐기고 살았는지 구경하는 것도 재밌겠네.

1001406256.english: Wow... there are so many interesting things here and there.

1001406257.english: Yeah, right. What is this? There's some kind of button on the box.
1001406257.korean: 그러게. 이건 뭐지? 상자에 무슨 버튼이 달려있는데.

1001406258.english: I know, right? What could it be?

1001406259.english: You'll know if you press the button.

1001406260.english: ...Why does the Perrault doll come out of the box, press the button again, and go back in?
1001406260.korean: ...왜 상자 안에서 페로 인형이 나와서 다시 버튼을 누르고 들어가는 거지?

1001406261.english: What is the meaning of the act of pressing a button?
1001406261.korean: 버튼을 누르는 행위에 무슨 의미가 있는 건가?

1001406262.english: I've tried it a few more times, but I still don't understand the meaning at all...
1001406262.korean: 몇 번 다시 해 봐도, 전혀 의미를 모르겠는데...

1001406263.english: I don't know what it means, but... it's cute.

1001406264.english: Well... yeah. After all, there are all kinds of pleasures in the world.
1001406264.korean: 뭐... 그래. 세상에는 다양한 종류의 쾌락이 있으니까.

1001406265.english: Still, it's not my style. You can have it.
1001406265.korean: 그래도 내 취향은 아니야. 너 가져.

1001406267.english: It's nothing grand, but... well, yeah. Let's just call it a gift.
1001406267.korean: 그런 거창한 건 아니지만... 뭐, 그래. 선물이라고 하자.

1001406269.english: Hehe. It's nice to see the two of you getting along well.
1001406269.korean: 후후. 둘이 잘 지내는 걸 보니까 좋네요.

1001406270.english: Ah, here. I think this is a wrapping paper warehouse.
1001406270.korean: 아, 여기. 포장지 창고인 것 같아요.

1001406271.english: There's a ton of wrapping paper.

1001406272.english: There are lots of gift boxes, too.

1001406273.english: What color did you say you needed? Green?

1001406274.english: Well, since it's a gift for the Steel Line members...

1001406275.english: Hmm, I'm not sure. Let's just take everything.
1001406275.korean: 으음, 잘 모르겠네요. 그냥 전부 가져가죠.

1001406276.korean: 이 정도면 부족할 일은 없을 거에요.

1001406277.english: Yeah. I think there will be some left even if I give it to everyone.
1001406277.korean: 응. 모든 사람한테 다 줘도 남을 것 같아.

1001406278.english: ...More importantly, how are you going to move all of this?
1001406278.korean: ...그것보다, 이렇게 많은 걸 어떻게 옮길 건데?

1001406279.english: It would take a really long time to carry them one by one.
1001406279.korean: 하나하나 들고 나르려면 엄청 오래 걸릴 걸?

1001406280.english: Put it in a cabinet... and move the whole thing, wouldn't that work? Like this...
1001406280.korean: 캐비닛에 담아서... 통째로 옮기면 되지 않을까? 이렇게...

1001406281.english: Hmm, that makes sense. Well, since most of them are on this shelf anyway...
1001406281.korean: 흠, 일리가 있네. 그럼, 어차피 대부분 이 진열대에 놓여 있으니까...

1001406282.english: I guess I can just lift the whole thing and move it, right?

1001406283.english: Oh, wait! The wrapping paper on that shelf doesn't have a securing strap, so...
1001406283.korean: 앗, 잠깐만요! 그 진열대에 있는 포장지는, 고정하는 끈이 없어서...

1001406286.english: It could be blown away by the wind.

1001406290.english: Neodym, how many packaging sheets are left?

1001406291.english: I don't think just putting it in the cabinet will be enough...
1001406291.korean: 캐비닛에 담은 것만으로는 부족할 것 같은데...

1001406293.english: Do other stores not have wrapping paper?

1001406294.english: There probably aren't as many as here, right? Because this used to be the biggest store.
1001406294.korean: 여기만큼 많지는 않겠죠? 여기가 제일 큰 상점이었으니까.

1001406295.english: Ugh... what should I do about this?

1001406297.english: Shall we go look for it?

1001406298.english: How do you know how far that flew? Besides, even if you looked for it, it would be completely soaked.
1001406298.korean: 저게 어디까지 날아갔을 줄 알고? 게다가, 찾아봐야 다 젖었을 텐데.

1001406299.english: It looked like quite luxurious wrapping paper, so it probably wasn't wet.
1001406299.korean: 꽤 고급스러운 포장지처럼 보였으니까, 젖지는 않았을 거에요.

1001406301.english: If it were a plastic bag, it would have been convenient since I could just quickly gather it up with electricity even if it flew away...
1001406301.korean: 비닐 포장지였으면 날아가더라도 전기로 확 끌어모으면 되니까 편했을 텐데...

1001406302.english: It even had an anti-static coating, so that was difficult too.
1001406302.korean: 정전기 방지 코팅까지 되어 있어서, 그것도 힘들었죠.

1001406303.english: ...I didn't know being too high-end would be a problem.

1001406304.english: Then do we have to go out and find it ourselves?
1001406304.korean: 그럼 우리가 발로 뛰어서 찾아야 하나?

1001406307.english: It's going to take quite a while to pick all of that up.
1001406307.korean: 저걸 다 주우려면 시간이 꽤 걸리겠네.

1001406308.english: Well, still... since it flew away because of my mistake, I guess I should take responsibility.
1001406308.korean: 뭐, 그래도.... 내가 실수해서 날아간 거니까, 책임을 져야겠지.

1001406312.english: Let's do it together. Because we're friends.

1001406313.english: Yes. I will explain the situation to the Commander and return a bit slowly.
1001406313.korean: 네. 사령관님께 상황을 설명하고, 좀 천천히 복귀하죠.

1001406314.english: It’s a rare opportunity to spend time with my sisters, so it would be a shame if I returned too soon.
1001406314.korean: 모처럼 자매들과 함께 시간을 보내는 건데, 너무 빨리 복귀해도 섭섭하잖아요.

1001406315.english: Yeah, let's stay outside together a bit longer.

1001406316.english: ...If you say that, what does that make me, who was grumbling just moments ago?
1001406316.korean: ...그렇게 말하면 아까까지 투덜댄 내가 뭐가 돼?

1001406317.english: Hehe. I'll pretend I didn't hear that.

1001406318.english: Tch, fine. It’s good for me if you help.

1001406319.english: ...Wait, but how far on earth did this fly?

1001406324.english: You were thinking of asking how many times that sigh has been.
1001406324.korean: 저 한숨이 몇 번째냐고 물어볼 생각이었잖나.

1001406325.english: Wow, I told you, you know exactly what I said.

1001406326.english: Anyway... shouldn't we do something about this?
1001406326.korean: 아무튼... 이거 우리가 뭐라도 해야 하는 거 아니야?

1001406328.english: There probably isn't anything you can do.
1001406328.korean: 딱히 할 수 있는 일이 없을 텐데.

1001406329.english: Well, if you look only at the cause, that is true, but...
1001406329.korean: 뭐, 원인만 놓고 보면 그렇기는 한데...

1001406330.english: Like reassuring them with warm words.

1001406331.english: If it was a joke, it was quite funny.

1001406332.english: No, it's true that it's that kind of role for us, but still, it's just too sluggish!
1001406332.korean: 아니, 우리가 하긴 좀 그런 역할인 건 맞는데, 그래도 너무 축축 처지잖아!

1001406333.english: Isn't there any way to liven up the atmosphere?
1001406333.korean: 뭔가 좀 분위기를 띄울 수 있는 방법이라도 없어?

1001406335.english: Oh! I told you it was Buddy. So, what is that method?
1001406335.korean: 오! 역시 버디라니까. 그래서, 그 방법이 뭔데?

1001406336.english: Pray that the rescue team returns soon.

1001406337.english: Ugh, I can't stand it anymore.

1001406339.english: Huh? Oh, so you were the City Guards.

1001406341.english: I came to tell you not to worry too much.

1001406342.english: I understand you're worried about your younger sibling, but...

1001406343.english: We can't just sit around sighing, can we?

1001406344.english: Sometimes you need to trust your younger sibling.

1001406346.english: I'm sorry. I caused you worry.

1001406347.english: Sigh, you're right. I should trust Aias...
1001406347.korean: 하아, 그 말씀이 맞아요. 제가 아이아스를 믿어줘야 하는데...

1001406348.english: I know that, but I'm still really worried.
1001406348.korean: 알고는 있지만, 그래도 너무 걱정이 되네요.

1001406349.english: It's swarming with Iron Bugs, I wonder if they'll get hurt...
1001406349.korean: 철충이 득실거리는 곳인데, 어디 다치지는 않을지...

1001406350.english: With supplies likely scarce in the UK, I wonder if they are starving...
1001406350.korean: 영국에는 물자도 부족할 텐데, 굶고 있지는 않을지...

1001406351.english: I feel even more anxious because I can't get in touch with them.
1001406351.korean: 연락이 안 되니까 더 불안한 것 같아요.

1001406352.english: Well, the jamming problem is serious, isn't it...
1001406352.korean: 뭐, 방해 전파 문제가 심각하긴 하지...

1001406353.english: Still, one of our people went, so don't worry too much.
1001406353.korean: 그래도 우리 쪽 인원이 한 명 갔으니까, 너무 걱정하지 말라고.

1001406354.english: He is a very competent person.

1001406355.english: Right... If it's Benevolent Leanne, there shouldn't be any major problems.
1001406355.korean: 그렇죠... 리앤 씨라면 큰 문제는 없을 거에요.

1001406356.english: Besides, I remember Mr. Aias being quite meticulous and thorough when we worked together last time.
1001406356.korean: 게다가 아이아스 씨도 저번에 같이 일해봤을 때 꽤 꼼꼼하고 철저한 타입이었던 걸로 기억하거든.

1001406357.english: So, there won't be any major problems.
1001406357.korean: 그러니까 큰 문제가 생기지는 않을 거야.

1001406358.english: Let me tell you one more thing...

1001406359.english: Buddy! That was good covering fire.

1001406360.english: ...According to the City Guard's policy on searching for survivors, Superintendent Benevolent Leanne and her group will be back soon.
1001406360.korean: ...시티가드의 생존자 수색 방침에 따르면, 리앤 총경 일행은 곧 돌아올 거다.

1001406361.english: The principle is to first search the area around where the survivor was last found, and if no survivors are encountered, to return and plan the next search.
1001406361.korean: 일차적으로 생존자가 마지막으로 발견된 지역 주변을 수색한 다음, 생존자들과 마주치지 못한다면 돌아와서 다음 수색 계획을 짜는 것이 원칙이니까.

1001406362.english: Right. Even if they meet a survivor, they'll be back soon unless something bad happens...
1001406362.korean: 그래. 생존자를 만났다고 해도, 별 일이 없다면 곧 돌아올 테니까...

1001406363.english: No matter what happens, it means that if I wait just a little longer, I will be able to see my younger sibling again.
1001406363.korean: 어떻게 되던 간에 조금만 더 기다리면 동생을 다시 볼 수 있을 거란 얘기지.

1001406365.english: Thank you. Hearing your words certainly puts my mind at ease.
1001406365.korean: 감사합니다. 여러분 말을 들으니, 확실히 마음이 놓이네요.

1001406366.english: So, you won't sigh anymore, right?
1001406366.korean: 그럼 이제 한숨 안 쉴 거지?

1001406368.english: Well then, the patrol is over, so I'll head back now...

1001406369.english: Oh my? What could these things that fell from the sky be?

1001406370.english: Hmm... looks like gift wrapping paper?

1001406371.english: Did Santa drop it while passing by?

1001406372.english: ...No, it's the wrapping paper we missed.

1001406373.english: Phew... To think I flew all the way here, really...

1001406375.english: I understand your patrol area is quite far from here.
1001406375.korean: 너희 순찰 구역은 여기와 거리가 꽤 먼 걸로 알고 있는데?

1001406376.english: That's right. It's a bit far.

1001406377.english: However, the Commander said that they were short on gift wrapping paper, so...
1001406377.korean: 하지만, 사령관님이 선물 포장지가 부족하다고 하셔서...

1001406378.english: I was transporting a lot of wrapping paper I found in a nearby commercial district, but the wind ended up blowing it away.
1001406378.korean: 근처 상업 구역에서 찾은 포장지를 잔뜩 운반하고 있었는데, 포장지들이 그만 바람에 날아가 버렸거든요.

1001406379.english: Wow, if it's a commercial district, it's quite a distance...
1001406379.korean: 우와, 상업 구역이면 거리가 꽤 있는데...

1001406381.english: You'd win first place in a wrapping paper flying contest.

1001406384.english: I don't have one yet. Should I make one while I'm at it?
1001406384.korean: 아직은 없지. 이 참에 하나 만들까?

1001406385.english: ...Stop the nonsense and go pick up the wrapping paper. Managing lost items is part of the City Guard's job, after all.
1001406385.korean: ...쓸데없는 소리는 그만 하고, 포장지나 줍도록. 분실물 관리도 시티가드의 업무니까.

1001406386.english: So, is this all the missing packaging?

1001406387.english: For now, I think that's the case.

1001406388.english: Ugh, I can finally go back.

1001406389.english: Please hand it over to me a little bit. I can help carry a cabinet.
1001406389.korean: 저한테도 조금 넘겨주세요. 캐비닛 하나 정도는 제가 같이 들어 드릴게요.

1001406390.english: By the way, there is someone from the Bermuda team who participated in this rescue operation, right?
1001406390.korean: 그나저나, 버뮤다 팀에서도 이번 구출 작전에 참가한 사람이 있죠?

1001406391.english: Yes. Mr. AL Phantom and Ms. Brunhild went together.
1001406391.korean: 네. 팬텀 씨와 브륀힐드 씨가 함께 갔죠.

1001406392.english: I'm a little worried because there's no telling when he'll be back.
1001406392.korean: 언제 돌아올지 기약도 없는데 조금 걱정이 되네요.

1001406393.english: Ah, I just heard from the City Guards... that even if they don't find any survivors, they plan to return to the Orca at least once.
1001406393.korean: 아, 방금 시티가드 분들께 들었는데... 생존자를 만나지 못한다고 하더라도, 오르카 호로 한 번쯤 돌아올 계획이라고 하시더라고요.

1001406395.english: Still, since you went all the way to the UK and went through all that trouble, I hope the search results are good.
1001406395.korean: 그래도 이왕 영국까지 가서 고생하고 왔으니, 수색 결과가 좋았으면 좋겠어요.

1001406397.english: Ah, I see the Orca over there.

1001406398.english: But... Commander, your expression looks a bit unusual.
1001406398.korean: 그런데... 사령관님 표정이 어째 심상치 않은데요?

1001406401.english: It looks like something serious has happened.
1001406401.korean: 아무래도 심상치 않은 일이 터진 것 같군.

1001406405.english: - While preparing a gift... I remembered that the rescue team was supposed to return soon.
1001406405.korean: - 선물을 준비하던 도중... 구출팀이 곧 돌아오기로 했다는 사실이 떠올랐다.

1001406406.english: - Even if we don't find any survivors, it would be a good idea to prepare a gift in advance to comfort the rescue team, who must have suffered a lot in the UK.
1001406406.korean: - 설령 생존자를 만나지 못했다고 해도, 영국에서 많이 고생했을 구출팀을 위로하기 위해 선물을 미리 준비해 두는 편이 좋겠지.

1001406407.english: - It would be the icing on the cake if we could meet a survivor and bring them back.

1001406408.english: - It would be a good idea to send a few more people to the UK to meet the rescue team.
1001406408.korean: - 영국 쪽으로 몇 명을 더 파견해서, 구출팀을 마중 나가는 것도 괜찮겠지.

1001406409.english: Yes, Feather and Fenrir are off duty this week, so I will be in charge until tomorrow, and starting the day after tomorrow, Black Lilith and Hachiko of Castling will take turns covering the security.
1001406409.korean: 네, 이번 주는 페더와 펜리르가 비번이고, 내일까지 제가, 그리고 모레부터는 리리스 언니와 하치코가 돌아가며 경호를 맡을 예정이에요.

1001406410.english: - Well then... let's think about it.

1001406411.english: - If we were selecting personnel to be temporarily dispatched to Europe today or tomorrow, who would be a good fit...
1001406411.korean: - 오늘이나 내일쯤에 유럽으로 잠시 파견을 나가는 인원을 뽑는다면 누가 좋을까...

1001406412.english: Ah, if you're asking because of meeting the rescue team, I could send Feather and Fenrir.
1001406412.korean: 아, 구출팀 마중 때문에 그러시는 거라면, 페더와 펜리르를 보내도 되는데.

1001406413.english: Hmm, understood. I'll let the two of you rest.
1001406413.korean: 으음, 알겠습니다. 두 사람은 쉬게 내버려 둘게요.

1001406414.english: - Okay, then since we have a bit of spare Battle Maid and Companion, if we dispatch a few of them...
1001406414.korean: - 좋아, 그럼 배틀 메이드와 컴패니언이 조금 여유가 있는 상황이니까, 그 중 몇 명을 파견한다면...

1001406415.english: Because we need to control the survivors...

1001406416.english: I think it would be better if people who can control the survivors well, like Black Lilith, Mr. Blackworm, or Ms. Constantia, went instead.
1001406416.korean: 리리스 언니나 블랙웜 씨, 콘스탄챠 씨 같이 생존자들을 잘 통제하실 수 있는 분들이 가시는 편이 좋을 것 같아요.

1001406417.english: Since there might be injured people, wouldn't it be a good idea for Daphne and the other members of the medical team to go provide support as well?
1001406417.korean: 부상자가 있을 수도 있으니까, 다프네 씨를 비롯한 의료팀 대원들도 지원을 가는게 좋지 않을까요?

1001406418.english: I know Daphne must be very busy, though...

1001406421.english: - Fine, I can't just dump more work on Daphne when she's already so busy...
1001406421.korean: - 좋아, 안 그래도 바쁜 다프네에게 일을 더 넘길 수는 없는 노릇이니...

1001406422.english: - I guess I'll have to get help from the Nature members for the first time in a while.

1001406423.english: - While selecting personnel to be dispatched to Europe based on Perrault's advice, the pager rang loudly.
1001406423.korean: - 페로의 조언을 받아 유럽으로 파견을 나갈 인원을 선정하던 도중, 호출기가 요란하게 울렸다.

1001406424.english: Commander! This is a big problem!

1001406425.english: Iron bugs are pouring out through the tunnel!
1001406425.korean: 터널을 통해 철충들이 쏟아져 나오고 있어!

1001406426.english: I immediately picked up the pager and asked T-14 Miho.
1001406426.korean: - 나는 즉시 호출기를 들어올리며 미호에게 물었다.

1001406427.english: Even considering the detailed situation... without any warning, Iron Bugs poured out through the tunnel!
1001406427.korean: 자세한 상황이라고 해도... 아무런 전조도 없이, 터널을 통해 철충들이 쏟아져 나왔어!

1001406428.english: Our team is holding them off for now, but there are too many Iron Bugs! They keep pouring out endlessly!
1001406428.korean: 일단 우리 팀이 막고 있지만, 철충이 너무 많아! 끝도 없이 밀려나오고 있어!

1001406429.english: The situation was very bad. Retreating to avoid the Iron Bug's attack wouldn't be that difficult, but...
1001406429.korean: - 상황이 매우 좋지 않았다. 철충의 공격을 피해 후퇴하는 것은 그리 어려운 일이 아니겠지만...

1001406430.english: - In that case, it would be difficult for the rescue team to escape using the tunnel.
1001406430.korean: - 그럴 경우 구출팀이 터널을 이용해 빠져나오기는 힘들 것이다.

1001406431.english: - However, even so, it is not a situation where the Mongoose team can be ordered to hold the front line against all those Iron Bugs.
1001406431.korean: - 하지만, 그렇다고 몽구스 팀에게 저 많은 철충들을 상대로 전선을 유지하라고 할 수도 없는 상황.

1001406432.english: What should I do? I did send in a support request, but it will take some time for nearby units to arrive.
1001406432.korean: 어떻게 하지? 지원 요청을 넣긴 했지만, 근처 부대가 도착하기까진 시간이 걸릴 거야.

1001406434.english: - We have no choice but to regroup as quickly as possible and go back to reclaim the tunnel.
1001406434.korean: - 최대한 빠르게 재정비해서, 다시 터널을 수복하러 가는 수 밖에.

1001406436.english: - Something incredibly fast fell from the sky like a comet and trampled the Iron Bugs.
1001406436.korean: - 엄청나게 빠른 뭔가가, 하늘에서 혜성처럼 떨어지며 철충을 짓밟았다.

1001406439.english: Oh dear, did I startle you? Sorry, I was rude.

1001406440.english: I will repay this rudeness by annihilating every single Iron Bug here.
1001406440.korean: 이 무례는 여기 있는 철충을 전부 섬멸하는 것으로 갚도록 하지.

1001406441.english: I couldn't go to England with them because of my height, but...
1001406441.korean: 키 때문에 영국에는 같이 못 따라갔지만...

1001406442.english: That doesn't mean you can stop me from realizing justice!
1001406442.korean: 그렇다고 해서 내가 정의를 실현하는 것을 막을 수는 없다!

1001406443.english: Haha, I'm not the only one here, friend!
1001406443.korean: 하핫, 나만 온 게 아니라고, 친구!

1001406444.english: And, Glacias landed elegantly with Oberonia Rhea on his back.
1001406444.korean: - 그리고, 글라시아스가 등 뒤에 레아를 태운 채로 우아하게 착지했다.

1001406446.english: I'll clean up the scene right now!

1001406447.english: I was talking with Rhea when I heard a distress signal.
1001406447.korean: 레아 씨와 대화를 나누고 있었는데, 구조 요청 신호가 들리지 뭐니.

1001406448.english: It seemed like an urgent matter, so she said she flew all the way to Europe without even thinking to report it.
1001406448.korean: 급한 일 같아서, 보고할 생각도 못하고 유럽까지 날아와 버렸단다.

1001406449.english: You won't scold me for leaving my post, right?

1001406450.english: - Glacias, Oberonia Rhea, and even Peregrinus...

1001406451.english: - With such reliable helpers, there is no reason to give up on the tunnel.
1001406451.korean: - 이런 든든한 조력자들이 있다면, 터널을 포기할 이유가 없다.

1001406452.english: - Okay. Then, we'll have to come up with a new plan.

1001406453.english: - Because we have to re-secure the tunnel and create an escape route for the rescue team.
1001406453.korean: - 터널을 다시 확보하고, 구출팀을 위해 퇴로를 만들어 줘야만 하니까.

1001406454.english: I commanded the troops via communication and began to exterminate the Iron Bug.
1001406454.korean: - 나는 통신으로 대원들을 지휘하며, 철충들을 섬멸하기 시작했다.

1001406455.english: - As a result, the operation was only half successful.
1001406455.korean: - 결과적으로, 작전은 절반의 성공만을 거둘 수 있었다.

1001406456.english: - All the Iron Bug that escaped the tunnel were exterminated, but…

1001406457.english: - The Iron Bug destroyed the tunnel as if to forbid our entry.
1001406457.korean: - 철충들은 우리가 진입하는 것을 허락할 수 없다는 듯, 터널을 파괴했기 때문이다.

1001406458.english: …We cleared the debris blocking the tunnel entrance and checked inside, but…
1001406458.korean: ...터널 입구를 막고 있는 잔해를 치우고, 안쪽까지 진입해서 확인해봤지만...

1001406459.english: - The opposite tunnel entrance was also collapsed.

1001406460.english: - I felt a chill run down my spine as I received C-77 HongRyeon's report.
1001406460.korean: - 나는 홍련의 보고를 받으며 등골이 서늘해지는 것을 느꼈다.

1001406461.english: - The Iron Bug' movements were intelligent and cunning, as if someone were commanding them.
1001406461.korean: - 철충의 움직임은 지능적이고 교활했다. 누군가 녀석들을 지휘하기라도 하는 것처럼.

1001406462.english: - That is… highly likely there is an Metal Parasite Hive in the UK.
1001406462.korean: - 그건, 즉... 영국에 철충 연결체가 있을 가능성이 높다는 뜻이었다.

1001406463.english: I also… agree with Your Majesty's assessment.

1001406464.english: The only time Iron Bug show such tactical movements
1001406464.korean: 철충이 이렇게까지 전술적인 움직임을 펼치는 경우는 오직 한 가지 뿐이었지요.

1001406465.english: Is when there is a Hive controlling them.

1001406466.english: We'll likely need to dispatch additional forces.
1001406466.korean: 추가 병력을 파견하는 수 밖에 없을 것 같아요.

1001406467.english: If we contact the commanders in Europe…

1001406468.english: Yes, the commanders must buy time against Delta's forces in Europe.
1001406468.korean: 예, 지휘관들은 반드시 유럽에서 델타의 세력을 상대로 시간을 끌어줘야만 합니다.

1001406469.english: Although we currently hold the advantage over Delta, we cannot guarantee this will continue.
1001406469.korean: 지금 당장은 델타를 상대로 유리한 고지를 점하고 있지만, 앞으로도 그럴 것이라 장담할 수는 없습니다.

1001406470.english: Thus, only Ark's operatives should go to the UK.
1001406470.korean: 즉, 영국으로 향하는 건 방주의 대원들이어야만 합니다.

1001406471.english: - Correct. Delta still has more troops than we do.
1001406471.korean: - 그렇다. 델타는 아직도 병력의 수에서 우리보다 앞서고 있는 상황.

1001406472.english: - Even after several victories, pulling troops from the European front is too risky a gamble.
1001406472.korean: - 몇 번 승리를 거뒀다고 해서, 유럽 전선에서 병력을 빼는 건 너무 위험한 도박이다.
